    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function ManageProductsPage() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const masjidId = searchParams.get(\"masjidId\") || \"\"\n  const [isCreateDialogOpen, setIsCreateDialogOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [assignDialogOpen, setAssignDialogOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [selectedKiosk, setSelectedKiosk] = useState(null)\n  const [selectedMasjid, setSelectedMasjid] = useState(\"\")\n\n  // Real data states\n  const [products, setProducts] = useState\u003cany[]\u003e([])\n  const [masjids, setMasjids] = useState\u003cany[]\u003e([])\n  const [loadingProducts, setLoadingProducts] = useState(true)\n  const [loadingMasjids, setLoadingMasjids] = useState(true)\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\")\n\n  // State for product creation form\n  const [productDescription, setProductDescription] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"\")\n  const [discountType, setDiscountType] = useState(\"\")\n  const [discountValue, setDiscountValue] = useState(\"\")\n  const [discountStart, setDiscountStart] = useState(\"\")\n  const [discountEnd, setDiscountEnd] = useState(\"\")\n\n  const form = useForm({\n    defaultValues: {\n      name: \"\",\n      description: \"\",\n      images: [] as ProductImage[],\n      type: \"kiosk\",\n      price: \"\",\n      discountType: \"\",\n      discountValue: \"\",\n      discountStart: \"\",\n      discountEnd: \"\",\n    },\n  })\n\n  const { control, register, handleSubmit, setValue, watch, reset } = form\n  const productImages = watch(\"images\")\n  const [imagePreviews, setImagePreviews] = useState\u003cProductImagePreview[]\u003e([])\n\n  // Move fetchProducts out of useEffect so it can be called after product creation\n  async function fetchProducts() {\n    setLoadingProducts(true)\n    setError(\"\")\n    try {\n      const products = await fetch(\"/api/products/mizan\").then(async (res) =\u003e await res.json());\n      setProducts(products);\n    } catch (err) {\n      setError(\"Failed to load products.\")\n    } finally {\n      setLoadingProducts(false)\n    }\n  }\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    fetchProducts()\n  }, [masjidId])",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function ManageProductsPage() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const masjidId = searchParams.get(\"masjidId\") || \"\"\n  const [isCreateDialogOpen, setIsCreateDialogOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [assignDialogOpen, setAssignDialogOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [selectedKiosk, setSelectedKiosk] = useState(null)\n  const [selectedMasjid, setSelectedMasjid] = useState(\"\")\n\n  // Real data states\n  const [products, setProducts] = useState\u003cany[]\u003e([])\n  const [masjids, setMasjids] = useState\u003cany[]\u003e([])\n  const [loadingProducts, setLoadingProducts] = useState(true)\n  const [loadingMasjids, setLoadingMasjids] = useState(true)\n  const [error, setError] = useState(\"\")\n\n  // State for product creation form\n  const [productDescription, setProductDescription] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"\")\n  const [discountType, setDiscountType] = useState(\"\")\n  const [discountValue, setDiscountValue] = useState(\"\")\n  const [discountStart, setDiscountStart] = useState(\"\")\n  const [discountEnd, setDiscountEnd] = useState(\"\")\n\n  const form = useForm({\n    defaultValues: {\n      name: \"\",\n      description: \"\",\n      images: [] as ProductImage[],\n      type: \"kiosk\",\n      price: \"\",\n      discountType: \"\",\n      discountValue: \"\",\n      discountStart: \"\",\n      discountEnd: \"\",\n    },\n  })\n\n  const { control, register, handleSubmit, setValue, watch, reset } = form\n  const productImages = watch(\"images\")\n  const [imagePreviews, setImagePreviews] = useState\u003cProductImagePreview[]\u003e([])\n\n  // Move fetchProducts out of useEffect so it can be called after product creation\n  async function fetchProducts() {\n    setLoadingProducts(true)\n    setError(\"\")\n    try {\n      const products = await fetch(\"/api/products/mizan\").then(async (res) =\u003e await res.json());\n      setProducts(products);\n    } catch (err) {\n      setError(\"Failed to load products.\")\n    } finally {\n      setLoadingProducts(false)\n    }\n  }\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    fetchProducts()\n  }, [masjidId])",

        "contents": "export default function CreateProductPage() {\n\n        ...\n\n        \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cLabel\u003eProduct Images\u003c/Label\u003e\n          \u003cInput type=\"file\" multiple accept=\"image/*\" onChange={handleImageUpload} /\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-wrap gap-2 mt-2\"\u003e\n            {imagePreviews.map((img, idx) =\u003e (\n              \u003cdiv key={idx} className=\"relative w-20 h-20 border rounded overflow-hidden flex flex-col items-center\"\u003e\n                \u003cimg src={img.url} alt={img.alt || \"Product image\"} className=\"object-cover w-full h-full\" /\u003e\n                {/* \u003cInput\n                  className=\"mt-1 text-xs\"\n                  placeholder=\"Alt text\"\n                  value={img.alt}\n                  onChange={e =\u003e {\n                    const newImgs = [...imagePreviews]\n                    newImgs[idx].alt = e.target.value\n                    setImagePreviews(newImgs)\n                  }}\n                /\u003e */}\n                \u003cspan className=\"absolute top-0 left-0 bg-white text-xs px-1 rounded-br\"\u003e{img.order + 1}\u003c/span\u003e\n                \u003cbutton\n                  type=\"button\"\n                  className=\"absolute top-0 right-0 bg-red-500 text-white text-xs px-1 rounded-bl\"\n                  onClick={() =\u003e {\n                    setImagePreviews(imagePreviews.filter((_, i) =\u003e i !== idx))\n                  }}\n                \u003e\n                  ✕\n                \u003c/button\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            ))}\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cLabel\u003eCategory\u003c/Label\u003e\n          \u003cInput {...register(\"category\")} placeholder=\"e.g. Donations, Books, Services\" /\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e",

        "contents": "export default function CreateProductPage() {\n\n        ...\n\n        \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cLabel\u003eDiscount\u003c/Label\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex gap-2\"\u003e\n            \u003cController\n              name=\"discountType\"\n              control={control}\n              render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                \u003cSelect value={field.value} onValueChange={field.onChange}\u003e\n                  \u003cSelectTrigger\u003e\n                    \u003cSelectValue placeholder=\"Type\" /\u003e\n         "originalContents": "\n        \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cLabel\u003eDiscount\u003c/Label\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex gap-2\"\u003e\n            \u003cController\n              name=\"discountType\"\n              control={control}\n              render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n                \u003cSelect value={field.value} onValueChange={field.onChange}\u003e\n                  \u003cSelectTrigger\u003e\n                    \u003cSelectValue placeholder=\"Type\" /\u003e\n                  \u003c/SelectTrigger\u003e\n                  \u003cSelectContent\u003e\n                    \u003cSelectItem value=\"percentage\"\u003ePercentage\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n                    \u003cSelectItem value=\"fixed\"\u003eFixed\u003c/SelectItem\u003e\n                  \u003c/SelectContent\u003e\n                \u003c/Select\u003e\n              )}\n            /\u003e\n            \u003cInput\n              type=\"number\"\n              placeholder=\"Value\"\n              {...register(\"discountValue\")}\n              className=\"w-24\"\n            /\u003e\n            \u003cInput\n              type=\"date\"\n              {...register(\"discountStart\")}\n              className=\"w-36\"\n            /\u003e\n            \u003cInput\n              type=\"date\"\n              {...register(\"discountEnd\")}\n              className=\"w-36\"\n            /\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cLabel\u003eProduct URL\u003c/Label\u003e\n          \u003cController\n            name=\"url\"\n            control={control}\n            render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n              \u003cInput {...field} placeholder=\"https://yourproduct.com\" /\u003e\n            )}\n          /\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cLabel\u003ePopular\u003c/Label\u003e\n          \u003cController\n            name=\"popular\"\n            control={control}\n            render={({ field }) =\u003e (\n              \u003cSwitch checked={field.value} onCheckedChange={field.onChange} /\u003e\n            )}\n          /\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\n// POST /api/products\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    // Auth check using better-auth\n    const user = await getUser()\n    if (!user || !user.admin) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: true, message: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 401 })\n    }\n    const body = await req.json();\n    // Create product in Stripe\n    const stripeProduct = await stripeClient.products.create({\n      name: body.name,\n      description: body.description,\n      images: body.images \u0026\u0026 body.images.length \u003e 0 ? [body.images[0].url] : undefined,\n      metadata: {\n        category: body.category || \"\",\n        type: body.type || \"kiosk\",\n        url: body.url || \"\",\n        popular: body.popular ? \"true\" : \"false\",\n      },\n    })\n    // Accept: name, description, features, price, image, category, type, url, popular, stripeProductId, discountType, discountValue, discountStart, discountEnd, images\n    const product = await prisma.product.create({\n      data: {\n        name: body.name,\n        description: body.description,\n        features: body.features ?? [],\n        price: Number(body.price),\n        image: body.images \u0026\u0026 body.images[0] ? body.images[0].url : undefined,\n        category: body.category ?? \"\",\n        type: body.type ?? \"kiosk\",\n        url: body.url ?? \"\",\n        popular: !!body.popular,\n        stripeProductId: stripeProduct.id,\n        discountType: body.discountType ?? undefined,\n        discountValue: body.discountValue ? Number(body.discountValue) : undefined,\n        discountStart: body.discountStart ? new Date(body.discountStart) : undefined,\n        discountEnd: body.discountEnd ? new Date(body.discountEnd) : undefined,\n        images: body.images \u0026\u0026 body.images.length \u003e 0 ? {\n          create: body.images.map((img: any) =\u003e ({\n            url: img.url,\n            alt: img.alt,\n            order: img.order,\n          }))\n        } : undefined,\n      },\n      include: { images: true },\n    })",

        "originalContents": "\n\n// POST /api/products\nexport async function POST(req: NextRequest) {\n  try {\n    // Auth check using better-auth\n    const user = await getUser()\n    if (!user || !user.admin) {\n      return NextResponse.json({ error: true, message: \"Unauthorized\" }, { status: 401 })\n    }\n    const body = await req.json();\n    // Create product in Stripe\n    const stripeProduct = await stripeClient.products.create({\n      name: body.name,\n      description: body.description,\n      images: body.images \u0026\u0026 body.images.length \u003e 0 ? [body.images[0].url] : undefined,\n      metadata: {\n        category: body.category || \"\",\n        type: body.type || \"kiosk\",\n        url: body.url || \"\",\n        popular: body.popular ? \"true\" : \"false\",\n      },\n    })\n    // Accept: name, description, features, price, image, category, type, url, popular, stripeProductId, discountType, discountValue, discountStart, discountEnd, images\n    const product = await prisma.product.create({\n      data: {\n        name: body.name,\n        description: body.description,\n        features: body.features ?? [],\n        price: Number(body.price),\n        image: body.images \u0026\u0026 body.images[0] ? body.images[0].url : undefined,\n        category: body.category ?? \"\",\n        type: body.type ?? \"kiosk\",\n        url: body.url ?? \"\",\n        popular: !!body.popular,\n        stripeProductId: stripeProduct.id,\n        discountType: body.discountType ?? undefined,\n        discountValue: body.discountValue ? Number(body.discountValue) : undefined,\n        discountStart: body.discountStart ? new Date(body.discountStart) : undefined,\n        discountEnd: body.discountEnd ? new Date(body.discountEnd) : undefined,\n        images: body.images \u0026\u0026 body.images.length \u003e 0 ? {\n          create: body.images.map((img: any) =\u003e ({\n            url: img.url,\n            alt: img.alt,\n            order: img.order,\n          }))\n        } : undefined,\n      },\n      include: { images: true },\n    })",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Plus, Settings, DollarSign } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useSearchParams } from \"next/navigation\"\n\nexport default function ProductsPage() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const masjidId = searchParams.get(\"masjidId\") || \"\"\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18]\"\u003eProducts\u003c/h2\u003e\n          \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003e\n            Manage and configure your masjid's products and services\n          \u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cButton \n            className=\"bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white\"\n            onClick={() =\u003e window.location.href = &#96;/dashboard/products/manage?masjidId=${masjidId}&#96;}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cSettings className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n            Manage Products\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Plus, Settings, DollarSign } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { useSearchParams } from \"next/navigation\"\n\nexport default function ProductsPage() {\n  const searchParams = useSearchParams()\n  const masjidId = searchParams.get(\"masjidId\") || \"\"\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4\"\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003e\n          \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18]\"\u003eProducts\u003c/h2\u003e\n          \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003e\n            Manage and configure your masjid's products and services\n          \u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n          \u003cButton \n            className=\"bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white\"\n            onClick={() =\u003e window.location.href = &#96;/dashboard/products/manage?masjidId=${masjidId}&#96;}\n          \u003e\n            \u003cSettings className=\"mr-2 h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n            Manage Products\n          \u003c/Button\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e",

        "contents": "export default function KioskDashboardPage() {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  // Add New Kiosk validation\n  const validateAddForm = () =\u003e {\n    const errors: any = {};\n    if (!addForm.productId) errors.productId = \"Product is required.\";\n    if (!addForm.masjidId) errors.masjidId = \"Masjid is required.\";\n    if (!addForm.categories || addForm.categories.length === 0) errors.categories = \"Select at least one category.\";\n    return errors;\n  };\n\n  // Configure Kiosk validation\n  const validateConfigForm = () =\u003e {\n    const errors: any = {};\n    if (!configureKiosk?.layout) errors.layout = \"Layout is required.\";\n    if (!configureKiosk?.color) errors.color = \"Color is required.\";\n    if (!configureKiosk?.timeout) errors.timeout = \"Timeout is required.\";\n    if (!configureKiosk?.categories || configureKiosk.categories.length === 0) errors.categories = \"Select at least one category.\";\n    return errors;\n  };",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  // Add New Kiosk validation\n  const validateAddForm = () =\u003e {\n    const errors: any = {};\n    if (!addForm.productId) errors.productId = \"Product is required.\";\n    if (!addForm.masjidId) errors.masjidId = \"Masjid is required.\";\n    if (!addForm.categories || addForm.categories.length === 0) errors.categories = \"Select at least one category.\";\n    return errors;\n  };\n\n  // Configure Kiosk validation\n  const validateConfigForm = () =\u003e {\n    const errors: any = {};\n    if (!configureKiosk?.layout) errors.layout = \"Layout is required.\";\n    if (!configureKiosk?.color) errors.color = \"Color is required.\";\n    if (!configureKiosk?.timeout) errors.timeout = \"Timeout is required.\";\n    if (!configureKiosk?.categories || configureKiosk.categories.length === 0) errors.categories = \"Select at least one category.\";\n    return errors;\n  };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function KioskDashboardPage() {\n...\nexport default function KioskDashboardPage() {\n  const { data: session, isPending } = authClient.useSession();\n\n            ...\n\n            \u003cDialogContent className=\"sm:max-w-[425px]\"\u003e\n              \u003cDialogHeader\u003e\n                \u003cDialogTitle\u003eRegister New Kiosk\u003c/DialogTitle\u003e\n                \u003cDialogDescription\u003e\n                  Register a new kiosk device and assign it to a masjid.         "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\"\nimport Link from \"next/link\"\nimport { Check, ShoppingCart, X, ChevronRight, Tag, Search } from \"lucide-react\"\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\"\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\"\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\"\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardDescription, CardFooter, CardHeader, CardTitle } from \"@/components/ui/card\"\nimport { Separator } from \"@/components/ui/separator\"\nimport {\n  Sheet,\n  SheetContent,\n  SheetDescription,\n  SheetHeader,\n  SheetTitle,\n  SheetTrigger,\n  SheetFooter,\n  SheetClose,\n} from \"@/components/ui/sheet\"\nimport { toast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\"\nimport Navbar from \"../Navbar\"\nimport { Products } from \"@prisma/client\"\nimport useCart from \"@/lib/useCart\"\nimport { v4 as uuid } from \"uuid\";\n\n// Product type definition\ntype Product = {\n  id: string\n  name: string\n  description: string\n  price: number\n  features: string[]\n  image: string\n  category: string\n  popular?: boolean\n}",

        "contents": "export default function ManageProductsPage() {\n\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    async function fetchMasjids() {\n      setLoadingMasjids(true)\n      setError(\"\")\n      try {\n        const masjids = await getMasjids();\n        setMasjids(masjids);\n      } catch (err) {\n        setError(\"Failed to load masjids.\")\n      } finally {\n        setLoadingMasjids(false)\n      }\n    }\n    fetchMasjids()\n  }, [])\n\n  // Placeholder for assigning kiosk\n  const handleAssign = async () =\u003e {\n    try {\n      if (!selectedKiosk) return toast({ title: \"Error\", description: \"No kiosk selected\", variant: \"destructive\" });\n      // TODO: Replace with your real API call\n      // await fetch('/api/products/assign-kiosk', {\n      //   method: 'POST',\n      //   headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },\n      //   body: JSON.stringify({ kioskId: selectedKiosk.id, masjidId: selectedMasjid }),\n      // })\n      const res = await fetch(\"/api/products/assign-kiosk\", {\n        method: \"POST\",\n        headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n        body: JSON.stringify({ kioskId: selectedKiosk.id, masjidId: selectedMasjid }),\n      })\n      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to assign kiosk\");\n      toast({\n        title: \"Kiosk Assigned!\",\n        description: \"Kiosk assigned to masjid successfully.\",\n      })\n    } catch (err) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"Failed to assign kiosk.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setAssignDialogOpen(false)\n      setSelectedMasjid(\"\")\n      setSelectedKiosk(null)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Image upload handler for useForm\n  const handleImageUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent\u003cHTMLInputElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    const files = Array.from(e.target.files || [])\n    if (files.length === 0) return\n    setImagePreviews((prev) =\u003e [\n      ...prev,\n      ...files.map((file, i) =\u003e ({\n        file,\n        url: URL.createObjectURL(file),\n        alt: \"\",\n        order: prev.length + i,\n      })),\n    ])\n  }",

selectedMasjid }),\n      })\n      if (!res.ok) throw new Error(\"Failed to assign kiosk\");\n      toast({\n        title: \"Kiosk Assigned!\",\n        description: \"Kiosk assigned to masjid successfully.\",\n      })\n    } catch (err) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error\",\n        description: \"Failed to assign kiosk.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\",\n      })\n    } finally {\n      setAssignDialogOpen(false)\n      setSelectedMasjid(\"\")\n      setSelectedKiosk(null)\n    }\n  }\n\n  // Image upload handler for useForm\n  const handleImageUpload = (e: React.ChangeEvent\u003cHTMLInputElement\u003e) =\u003e {\n    const files = Array.from(e.target.files || [])\n    if (files.length === 0) return\n    setImagePreviews((prev) =\u003e [\n      ...prev,\n      ...files.map((file, i) =\u003e ({\n        file,\n        url: URL.createObjectURL(file),\n        alt: \"\",\n        order: prev.length + i,\n      })),\n    ])\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  meta_data              Json?\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  meta_data              Json?\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { Product } from \"@prisma/client\";\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\n\n// Function to get all products\nexport async function getProducts() {\n  const products = await prisma.product.findMany();\n\n  return products || [];;\n}",

          {

            "text": "\"use server\";"

          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "// Function to get all products"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "export async function getProducts() {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "  const products = await prisma.product.findMany();"
          },

            "lineNumber": 9
          },
          {

        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { Product } from \"@prisma/client\";\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\n\n// Function to get all products\nexport async function getProducts() {\n  const products = await prisma.product.findMany();\n\n  return products || [];;\n}",

        "contents": "\n\nexport default function ProductsPage({ products }: Props) {\n  const cart = useCart();\n  const [cartOpen, setCartOpen] = useState(false)\n  const [filter, setFilter] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"all\")\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\")\n\n  // Add product to cart\n  const addToCart = (product: Product) =\u003e {\n    cart.addToCart({\n      id: uuid(),\n      name: product.name,\n      productId: product.id,\n      quantity: 1,\n      imagesrc: product.image,\n      price: product.price\n    })\n\n    toast({\n      title: \"Added to cart\",\n      description: &#96;${product.name} has been added to your cart.&#96;,\n    })\n  }\n\n  // Remove product from cart\n  const removeFromCart = (productId: string) =\u003e {\n    cart?.removeFromCart!(productId);\n\n    toast({\n      title: \"Removed from cart\",\n      description: \"Item has been removed from your cart.\",\n      variant: \"destructive\",\n    })\n  }\n\n  // Filter and search products\n  const filteredProducts = products\n    .filter((product) =\u003e filter === \"all\" || product.category.toLowerCase() === filter.toLowerCase())\n    .filter(\n      (product) =\u003e\n        searchQuery === \"\" ||\n        product.name.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n        product.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()),\n    )",

I will create a new API route to handle product updates with PUT method.

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 91, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,91 @@
- 
+ import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from "next/server"
+ import { getUser } from "@/lib/auth"
+ import { prisma } from "@/lib/db"
+ import { stripeClient } from "@/lib/stripe"
+ 
+ // GET /api/products/[id]
+ export async function GET(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: { id: string } }) {
+   try {
+     const product = await prisma.product.findUnique({
+       where: { id: params.id },
+       include: { images: true },
+     })
+     if (!product) {
+       return NextResponse.json({ error: true, message: "Product not found" }, { status: 404 })
+     }
+     return NextResponse.json(product)
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error(error)
+     return NextResponse.json({ error: true, message: "Failed to fetch product" }, { status: 500 })
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ // PUT /api/products/[id]
+ export async function PUT(req: NextRequest, { params }: { params: { id: string } }) {
+   try {
+     // Auth check using better-auth
+     const user = await getUser()
+     if (!user || !user.admin) {
+       return NextResponse.json({ error: true, message: "Unauthorized" }, { status: 401 })
+     }
+ 
+     const body = await req.json()
+     const existingProduct = await prisma.product.findUnique({
+       where: { id: params.id },
+       include: { images: true },
+     })
+ 
+     if (!existingProduct) {
+       return NextResponse.json({ error: true, message: "Product not found" }, { status: 404 })
+     }
+ 
+     // Update product in Stripe
+     if (existingProduct.stripeProductId) {
+       await stripeClient.products.update(existingProduct.stripeProductId, {
+         name: body.name,
+         description: body.description,
+         images: body.images &amp;&amp; body.images.length &gt; 0 ? [body.images[0].url] : undefined,
+         metadata: {
+           category: body.category || "",
+           type: body.type || "kiosk",
+           url: body.url || "",
+           popular: body.popular ? "true" : "false",
+         },
+       })
+     }
+ 
+     // Update product in database
+     const product = await prisma.product.update({
+       where: { id: params.id },
+       data: {
+         name: body.name,
+         description: body.description,
+         features: body.features ?? [],
+         price: Number(body.price),
+         image: body.images &amp;&amp; body.images[0] ? body.images[0].url : undefined,
+         category: body.category ?? "",
+         type: body.type ?? "kiosk",
+         url: body.url ?? "",
+         popular: !!body.popular,
+         discountType: body.discountType ?? undefined,
+         discountValue: body.discountValue ? Number(body.discountValue) : undefined,
+         discountStart: body.discountStart ? new Date(body.discountStart) : undefined,
+         discountEnd: body.discountEnd ? new Date(body.discountEnd) : undefined,
+         images: {
+           deleteMany: {},
+           create: body.images.map((img: any) =&gt; ({
+             url: img.url,
+             alt: img.alt,
+             order: img.order,
+           })),
+         },
+       },
+       include: { images: true },
+     })
+ 
+     return NextResponse.json({ success: true, product })
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error(error)
+     return NextResponse.json({ error: true, message: "Failed to update product" }, { status: 500 })
+   }
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

I've created a complete edit product functionality that includes:

1. A new edit page at `/dashboard/products/edit/[id]/page.tsx` that:
   - Reuses the create product form structure
   - Pre-fills the form with existing product data
   - Handles both existing and new image uploads
   - Updates the product in both Stripe and the database

2. A new API endpoint at `/api/products/[id]/route.ts` that:
   - Handles GET requests to fetch a single product
   - Handles PUT requests to update a product
   - Updates both Stripe and database records
   - Maintains image relationships

3. Added an edit button to the manage products page that links to the edit page

The edit functionality maintains all the features of the create page, including:
- Markdown editor for description
- Image upload and management
- Product type selection
- Price and discount settings
- Features management
- Popular flag toggle

To use the edit functionality:
1. Click the "Edit" button on any product in the manage products page
2. The form will be pre-filled with the product's current data
3. Make your changes
4. Click "Update Product" to save the changes

The system will:
1. Upload any new images
2. Keep existing images that weren't deleted
3. Update the product in Stripe
4. Update the product in the database
5. Redirect back to the manage products page on success

Would you like me to make any adjustments to this implementation?

_**Agent**_

I've updated both the create and edit product pages to handle product sizes. Here's what I've added:

1. Added a `sizes` array to the `meta_data` object in the form's default values
2. Added state management for sizes with:
   - `addSize()`: Adds a new size option
   - `removeSize()`: Removes a size option
   - `updateSize()`: Updates a size's name or price
3. Added a conditional render of the sizes section that only appears when `productType === "physical"`
4. In the edit page, added proper loading of existing sizes from the product's `meta_data`

The sizes section includes:
- A button to add new sizes
- For each size:
  - An input for the size name (e.g., Small, Medium, Large)
  - An input for the size-specific price
  - A button to remove the size

The UI will:
1. Only show the sizes section for physical products
2. Allow adding/removing/editing sizes
3. Save the sizes in the product's `meta_data`
4. Load existing sizes when editing a product

The sizes are stored in the format:
```typescript
meta_data: {
  sizes: [
    { name: "Small", price: 10 },
    { name: "Medium", price: 15 },
    { name: "Large", price: 20 }
  ]
}
```

I've updated both the create and edit pages to use the new size format with three fields:
1. `name`: The product name/variant (e.g., "Men's T-Shirt")
2. `size`: The size option (e.g., "Small", "Medium", "Large")
3. `price`: The price for this specific size

The changes include:
1. Updated the type definition in the form's default values
2. Modified the `addSize` function to include the new `size` field
3. Updated the `updateSize` function to handle the new field
4. Added a new input field for the size in the UI
5. Updated the placeholders to be more descriptive

Now when you add a size, you can specify:
- The product name/variant (e.g., "Men's T-Shirt", "Women's Hoodie")
- The size option (e.g., "Small", "Medium", "Large", "XL")
- The price for that specific size

The data will be stored in the format:
```typescript
meta_data: {
  sizes: [
    { name: "Men's T-Shirt", size: "Small", price: 25 },
    { name: "Men's T-Shirt", size: "Medium", price: 25 },
    { name: "Men's T-Shirt", size: "Large", price: 25 }
  ]
}
```

  export default function ProductDetailClient({ product, relatedProducts }: { product: Products; relatedProducts: Products[] }) {
    const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(1)
+   const [selectedSize, setSelectedSize] = useState&lt;string | null&gt;(null)
    const { addToCart } = useCart()
  
    const handleAddToCart = () =&gt; {
+     if (product.meta_data?.sizes &amp;&amp; !selectedSize) {
+       toast({
+         title: "Size Required",
+         description: "Please select a size before adding to cart.",
+         variant: "destructive"
+       })
+       return
+     }
+ 
      addToCart({

        productId: product.id,
        name: product.name,
-       price: product.price,

+         : product.price,
        quantity: quantity,
        imagesrc: product.image,
+       size: selectedSize
      })
  
      toast({
        title: "Added to cart",
-       description: &#96;${product.name} has been added to your cart.&#96;,
+       description: &#96;${product.name}${selectedSize ? &#96; (${selectedSize})&#96; : ''} has been added to your cart.&#96;,

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport useCartStore from './useCartStore';\nimport { CartItem, validateCartItem } from './cartItemSchema';\n\nconst useCart = () =\u003e {\n  const { cart, addItem, removeItem, clearCart, calculateTotal, discount, setDiscount } = useCartStore();\n\n  const addToCart = (item: CartItem) =\u003e {\n    try {\n      const validatedItem = validateCartItem(item);\n      addItem(validatedItem);\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"Item validation failed:\", error.message);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getTotal = () =\u003e {\n    calculateTotal();\n    return useCartStore.getState().total;\n  };\n\n  return {\n    cart,\n    addToCart,\n    removeFromCart: removeItem,\n    clearCart,\n    getTotal,\n    discount,\n    setDiscount\n  };\n};",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport useCartStore from './useCartStore';\nimport { CartItem, validateCartItem } from './cartItemSchema';\n\nconst useCart = () =\u003e {\n  const { cart, addItem, removeItem, clearCart, calculateTotal, discount, setDiscount } = useCartStore();\n\n  const addToCart = (item: CartItem) =\u003e {\n    try {\n      const validatedItem = validateCartItem(item);\n      addItem(validatedItem);\n    } catch (error: any) {\n      console.error(\"Item validation failed:\", error.message);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const getTotal = () =\u003e {\n    calculateTotal();\n    return useCartStore.getState().total;\n  };\n\n  return {\n    cart,\n    addToCart,\n    removeFromCart: removeItem,\n    clearCart,\n    getTotal,\n    discount,\n    setDiscount\n  };\n};",

        "contents": "\n\n// Form schemas\nconst shippingSchema = z.object({\n  fullName: z.string().min(2, { message: \"Full name is required\" }),\n  email: z.string().email({ message: \"Please enter a valid email address\" }),\n  phone: z.string().min(10, { message: \"Please enter a valid phone number\" }),\n  address: z.string().min(5, { message: \"Address is required\" }),\n  city: z.string().min(2, { message: \"City is required\" }),\n  state: z.string().min(2, { message: \"State is required\" }),\n  zipCode: z.string().min(5, { message: \"ZIP code is required\" }),\n  country: z.string().min(2, { message: \"Country is required\" }),\n  saveInfo: z.boolean().default(false).optional(),\n  masjid: z.string().optional(),\n})\n\nconst paymentSchema = z.object({\n  cardholderName: z.string().min(2, { message: \"Cardholder name is required\" }),\n  billingAddress: z.enum([\"same\", \"different\"]),\n  saveCard: z.boolean().default(false).optional(),\n  address: z.string().optional(),\n  city: z.string().optional(),\n  state: z.string().optional(),\n  zipCode: z.string().optional(),\n  country: z.string().optional(),\n})\n\ntype CartItems = {\n  id: string\n  name: string\n  price: number\n  quantity: number\n  imagesrc: string\n  productId: string\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\nexport const createCheckoutSession = async ({ cart, discount, card }: CreateCheckoutSessionProps) =\u003e {\n  const products = [];\n  const line_items = [];\n\n  for (const product of cart) {\n    const pro = await prisma.product.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        id: product.id\n      }\n    });\n    if(!pro) return;\n    products.push(pro);\n    line_items.push({\n      price_data: {\n        currency: \"USD\",\n        product_data: {\n          name: pro.name,\n          images: [pro.image],\n        },\n        unit_amount: Math.round(Number(product.price) * 100),\n      },\n      quantity: 1,\n    })\n  };\n\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 17

        "originalContents": "\nexport const createCheckoutSession = async ({ cart, discount, card }: CreateCheckoutSessionProps) =\u003e {\n  const products = [];\n  const line_items = [];\n\n  for (const product of cart) {\n    const pro = await prisma.product.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        id: product.id\n      }\n    });\n    if(!pro) return;\n    products.push(pro);\n    line_items.push({\n      price_data: {\n        currency: \"USD\",\n        product_data: {\n          name: pro.name,\n          images: [pro.image],\n        },\n        unit_amount: Math.round(Number(product.price) * 100),\n      },\n      quantity: 1,\n    })\n  };\n\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport {\n  ArrowLeft,\n  ChevronRight,\n  ShoppingCart,\n  Trash2,\n  X,\n  CreditCard,\n  Check,\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\";\nimport { Separator } from \"@/components/ui/separator\";\nimport {\n  Card,\n  CardContent,\n  CardFooter,\n  CardHeader,\n  CardTitle,\n} from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { toast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\";\nimport {\n  Table,\n  TableBody,\n  TableCell,\n  TableHead,\n  TableHeader,\n  TableRow,\n} from \"@/components/ui/table\";\nimport {\n  Accordion,\n  AccordionContent,\n  AccordionItem,\n  AccordionTrigger,\n} from \"@/components/ui/accordion\";\nimport Navbar from \"@/components/Navbar\";\n// import { withSSR, useCart } from \"cart\"\nimport { Products } from \"@prisma/client\";\nimport useCart from \"@/lib/useCart\";\nimport { v4 as uuid } from \"uuid\";\nimport { createCheckoutPage } from \"@/lib/actions/payment\";\nimport { redirect, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport { loadStripe } from \"@stripe/stripe-js\";\n\n// Product type definition\ntype Product = {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  description: string;\n  price: number;\n  features: string[];\n  image: string;\n  category: string;\n  popular?: boolean;\n};",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState } from \"react\";\nimport Link from \"next/link\";\nimport {\n  ArrowLeft,\n  ChevronRight,\n  ShoppingCart,\n  Trash2,\n  X,\n  CreditCard,\n  Check,\n} from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\";\nimport { Separator } from \"@/components/ui/separator\";\nimport {\n  Card,\n  CardContent,\n  CardFooter,\n  CardHeader,\n  CardTitle,\n} from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { toast } from \"@/hooks/use-toast\";\nimport {\n  Table,\n  TableBody,\n  TableCell,\n  TableHead,\n  TableHeader,\n  TableRow,\n} from \"@/components/ui/table\";\nimport {\n  Accordion,\n  AccordionContent,\n  AccordionItem,\n  AccordionTrigger,\n} from \"@/components/ui/accordion\";\nimport Navbar from \"@/components/Navbar\";\n// import { withSSR, useCart } from \"cart\"\nimport { Products } from \"@prisma/client\";\nimport useCart from \"@/lib/useCart\";\nimport { v4 as uuid } from \"uuid\";\nimport { createCheckoutPage } from \"@/lib/actions/payment\";\nimport { redirect, useRouter } from \"next/navigation\";\nimport { loadStripe } from \"@stripe/stripe-js\";\n\n// Product type definition\ntype Product = {\n  id: string;\n  name: string;\n  description: string;\n  price: number;\n  features: string[];\n  image: string;\n  category: string;\n  popular?: boolean;\n};",
        "range": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nconst stripePromise = loadStripe(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY!);\n\nexport default function CartPage({ products }: Props) {\n  const {\n    addToCart,\n    cart,\n    clearCart,\n    getTotal,\n    removeFromCart: removeFCart,\n    setDiscount: setDiscountStore,\n    discount: discountData\n  } = useCart();\n  const [promoCode, setPromoCode] = useState(\"\");\n  const [promoApplied, setPromoApplied] = useState(false);\n  const [discount, setDiscount] = useState(0);\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const router = useRouter();\n\n  // Calculate subtotal\n  const subtotal =\n    cart.reduce((total, item) =\u003e total + item.price! * item.quantity, 0) || 0;\n\n  // Calculate discount amount\n  const discountAmount = promoApplied ? subtotal * (discount / 100) : 0;\n\n  // Calculate total\n  const total = subtotal - discountAmount;\n\n  // Update product quantity in cart\n  const updateQuantity = (productId: string, newQuantity: number) =\u003e {\n    if (newQuantity \u003c 1) {\n      removeFromCart(productId);\n      return;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Remove product from cart\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) =\u003e {\n    removeFCart(itemId);\n\n    toast({\n      title: \"Removed from cart\",\n      description: \"Item has been removed from your cart.\",\n      variant: \"destructive\",\n    });\n  };",

        "originalContents": "\n\nconst stripePromise = loadStripe(process.env.NEXT_PUBLIC_STRIPE_PUBLISHABLE_KEY!);\n\nexport default function CartPage({ products }: Props) {\n  const {\n    addToCart,\n    cart,\n    clearCart,\n    getTotal,\n    removeFromCart: removeFCart,\n    setDiscount: setDiscountStore,\n    discount: discountData\n  } = useCart();\n  const [promoCode, setPromoCode] = useState(\"\");\n  const [promoApplied, setPromoApplied] = useState(false);\n  const [discount, setDiscount] = useState(0);\n  const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const router = useRouter();\n\n  // Calculate subtotal\n  const subtotal =\n    cart.reduce((total, item) =\u003e total + item.price! * item.quantity, 0) || 0;\n\n  // Calculate discount amount\n  const discountAmount = promoApplied ? subtotal * (discount / 100) : 0;\n\n  // Calculate total\n  const total = subtotal - discountAmount;\n\n  // Update product quantity in cart\n  const updateQuantity = (productId: string, newQuantity: number) =\u003e {\n    if (newQuantity \u003c 1) {\n      removeFromCart(productId);\n      return;\n    }\n  };\n\n  // Remove product from cart\n  const removeFromCart = (itemId: string) =\u003e {\n    removeFCart(itemId);\n\n    toast({\n      title: \"Removed from cart\",\n      description: \"Item has been removed from your cart.\",\n      variant: \"destructive\",\n    });\n  };",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function ProductDetailClient({ product, relatedProducts }: { product: ExtendedProduct; relatedProducts: ExtendedProduct[] }) {\n  const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(1)\n  const [selectedSize, setSelectedSize] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(product.meta_data?.sizes?.[0]?.size || null);\n  const [selectedSizePrice, setSelectedSizePrice] = useState\u003cnumber | null\u003e(product.price);\n  const { addToCart } = useCart()\n  console.log(product)\n\n  const handleAddToCart = () =\u003e {\n    const metaData = product.meta_data as ProductMetaData\n    if (metaData?.sizes \u0026\u0026 !selectedSize) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Size Required\",\n        description: \"Please select a size before adding to cart.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\"\n      })\n      return\n    }\n\n    addToCart({\n      id: product.id,\n      productId: product.id,\n      name: product.name,\n      price: selectedSizePrice,\n      quantity: quantity,\n      imagesrc: product.image,\n      size: selectedSize\n    } as CartItem)\n\n    toast({\n      title: \"Added to cart\",\n      description: &#96;${product.name}${selectedSize ? &#96; (${selectedSize})&#96; : ''} has been added to your cart.&#96;,\n    })\n    setSelectedSizePrice(selectedSize ? metaData?.sizes?.find(s =\u003e s.size === selectedSize)?.price || product.price : product.price)\n    setSelectedSize(selectedSize ? selectedSize : null)\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function ProductDetailClient({ product, relatedProducts }: { product: ExtendedProduct; relatedProducts: ExtendedProduct[] }) {\n  const [quantity, setQuantity] = useState(1)\n  const [selectedSize, setSelectedSize] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(product.meta_data?.sizes?.[0]?.size || null);\n  const [selectedSizePrice, setSelectedSizePrice] = useState\u003cnumber | null\u003e(product.price);\n  const { addToCart } = useCart()\n  console.log(product)\n\n  const handleAddToCart = () =\u003e {\n    const metaData = product.meta_data as ProductMetaData\n    if (metaData?.sizes \u0026\u0026 !selectedSize) {\n      toast({\n        title: \"Size Required\",\n        description: \"Please select a size before adding to cart.\",\n        variant: \"destructive\"\n      })\n      return\n    }\n\n    addToCart({\n      id: product.id,\n      productId: product.id,\n      name: product.name,\n      price: selectedSizePrice,\n      quantity: quantity,\n      imagesrc: product.image,\n      size: selectedSize\n    } as CartItem)\n\n    toast({\n      title: \"Added to cart\",\n      description: &#96;${product.name}${selectedSize ? &#96; (${selectedSize})&#96; : ''} has been added to your cart.&#96;,\n    })\n    setSelectedSizePrice(selectedSize ? metaData?.sizes?.find(s =\u003e s.size === selectedSize)?.price || product.price : product.price)\n    setSelectedSize(selectedSize ? selectedSize : null)\n  }",

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\nexport async function createPaymentIntent({ amount, cart, discount, shippingData }: CreatePaymentIntentParams) {\n  const user = await getUser();\n  if(!user) return {\n    error: true,\n    message: \"Please login\"\n  };\n  try {\n    // Create a PaymentIntent with the order amount and currency\n    const paymentIntent = await stripeClient.paymentIntents.create({\n      amount: Math.round(amount * 100), // Convert to cents\n      currency: \"usd\",\n      automatic_payment_methods: {\n        enabled: true,\n      },\n      customer: user.stripeCustomerId || \"\",\n      metadata: {\n        cart_items: JSON.stringify(\n          cart.map((item) =\u003e ({\n            id: item.productId,\n            name: item.name,\n            quantity: item.quantity,\n            price: item.price,\n          })),\n        ),\n        discount_code: discount?.code || \"\",\n        discount_percent: discount?.percent?.toString() || \"0\",\n      },\n    });\n\n    const dbIntent = await prisma.checkoutSessions.create({\n      data: {\n        id: v4(),\n        cart: JSON.stringify(cart),\n        completed: \"pending\",\n        paymentType: 'payment',\n        sessionId: paymentIntent.id,\n        userId: user.id,\n        shippingData: shippingData\n      }\n    });\n\n\n    return {\n      clientSecret: paymentIntent.client_secret,\n      id: paymentIntent.id\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error creating payment intent:\", error)\n    throw new Error(\"Failed to create payment intent\")\n  }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 140
          },

        ],
        "originalContents": "\nexport async function createPaymentIntent({ amount, cart, discount, shippingData }: CreatePaymentIntentParams) {\n  const user = await getUser();\n  if(!user) return {\n    error: true,\n    message: \"Please login\"\n  };\n  try {\n    // Create a PaymentIntent with the order amount and currency\n    const paymentIntent = await stripeClient.paymentIntents.create({\n      amount: Math.round(amount * 100), // Convert to cents\n      currency: \"usd\",\n      automatic_payment_methods: {\n        enabled: true,\n      },\n      customer: user.stripeCustomerId || \"\",\n      metadata: {\n        cart_items: JSON.stringify(\n          cart.map((item) =\u003e ({\n            id: item.productId,\n            name: item.name,\n            quantity: item.quantity,\n            price: item.price,\n          })),\n        ),\n        discount_code: discount?.code || \"\",\n        discount_percent: discount?.percent?.toString() || \"0\",\n      },\n    });\n\n    const dbIntent = await prisma.checkoutSessions.create({\n      data: {\n        id: v4(),\n        cart: JSON.stringify(cart),\n        completed: \"pending\",\n        paymentType: 'payment',\n        sessionId: paymentIntent.id,\n        userId: user.id,\n        shippingData: shippingData\n      }\n    });\n\n\n    return {\n      clientSecret: paymentIntent.client_secret,\n      id: paymentIntent.id\n    }\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error creating payment intent:\", error)\n    throw new Error(\"Failed to create payment intent\")\n  }\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 191
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 140
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport const createCheckoutPage = async ({\n  cart,\n  discount,\n}: CreateCheckoutPageProps) =\u003e {\n  const user = await getUser();\n  if(!user) return {\n    error: true,\n    message: \"Please login\"\n  };\n  const products = [];\n  const line_items = [];\n\n  for (const product of cart) {\n    const pro = await prisma.product.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        id: product.productId\n      }\n    });\n    if(pro) {\n      console.log(pro);\n      products.push(pro);\n      line_items.push({\n        price_data: {\n          currency: \"USD\",\n          product_data: {\n            name: pro.name,\n            images: [pro.image],\n          },\n          unit_amount: Math.round(Number(product.price) * 100),\n        },\n        quantity: 1,\n      })\n    }\n  };\n\n  if(products.find((e) =\u003e e?.requiredSubscriptionId \u0026\u0026 e?.requiredSubscriptionId.length \u003c 1) \u0026\u0026 products.length \u003e 1) return {\n    error: true,\n    message: \"When purchasing a subscription please only have the subscription in your cart. Jazakallahu Khair\"\n  };\n\n  const subscription = products.find((e) =\u003e e?.requiredSubscriptionId \u0026\u0026 e?.requiredSubscriptionId.length \u003e 1) || null ;\n\n  if(!subscription) return {\n    redirect: true\n  };\n\n  // @ts-ignore Ignore\n  const session = await stripeClient.checkout.sessions.create({\n    payment_method_types: ['card'],\n    line_items: subscription ? [{\n      price: subscription?.requiredSubscriptionId,\n      quantity: 1\n    }] : line_items,\n    mode: subscription ? \"subscription\" : 'payment', // or 'payment' for one-time purchases\n    success_url: &#96;${process.env.DOMAIN}/order-confirmation?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}&#96;,\n    cancel_url: &#96;${process.env.DOMAIN}/cart&#96;,\n    customer: user.stripeCustomerId || null,\n    shipping_address_collection: {\n      allowed_countries: [\n        \"US\"\n      ]\n    },\n  });",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport const createCheckoutPage = async ({\n  cart,\n  discount,\n}: CreateCheckoutPageProps) =\u003e {\n  const user = await getUser();\n  if(!user) return {\n    error: true,\n    message: \"Please login\"\n  };\n  const products = [];\n  const line_items = [];\n\n  for (const product of cart) {\n    const pro = await prisma.product.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        id: product.productId\n      }\n    });\n    if(pro) {\n      console.log(pro);\n      products.push(pro);\n      line_items.push({\n        price_data: {\n          currency: \"USD\",\n          product_data: {\n            name: pro.name,\n            images: [pro.image],\n          },\n          unit_amount: Math.round(Number(product.price) * 100),\n        },\n        quantity: 1,\n      })\n    }\n  };\n\n  if(products.find((e) =\u003e e?.requiredSubscriptionId \u0026\u0026 e?.requiredSubscriptionId.length \u003c 1) \u0026\u0026 products.length \u003e 1) return {\n    error: true,\n    message: \"When purchasing a subscription please only have the subscription in your cart. Jazakallahu Khair\"\n  };\n\n  const subscription = products.find((e) =\u003e e?.requiredSubscriptionId \u0026\u0026 e?.requiredSubscriptionId.length \u003e 1) || null ;\n\n  if(!subscription) return {\n    redirect: true\n  };\n\n  // @ts-ignore Ignore\n  const session = await stripeClient.checkout.sessions.create({\n    payment_method_types: ['card'],\n    line_items: subscription ? [{\n      price: subscription?.requiredSubscriptionId,\n      quantity: 1\n    }] : line_items,\n    mode: subscription ? \"subscription\" : 'payment', // or 'payment' for one-time purchases\n    success_url: &#96;${process.env.DOMAIN}/order-confirmation?session_id={CHECKOUT_SESSION_ID}&#96;,\n    cancel_url: &#96;${process.env.DOMAIN}/cart&#96;,\n    customer: user.stripeCustomerId || null,\n    shipping_address_collection: {\n      allowed_countries: [\n        \"US\"\n      ]\n    },\n  });",

_**Agent**_

The changes I made should fix the cart validation error by ensuring that:
1. The price is always a number by using `Number(price)`
2. We have a fallback to the product's base price if `selectedSizePrice` is null
3. The size field is properly included in the cart item

The remaining linter error is about TypeScript's strict null checks, but it shouldn't affect the functionality. The cart item validation should now work correctly.

Try adding a product to your cart now. If you're still seeing the validation error, please let me know and I can help investigate further.

        "originalContents": "model Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\nmodel Verification {\n  id         String    @id\n  identifier String\n  value      String\n  expiresAt  DateTime\n  createdAt  DateTime?\n  updatedAt  DateTime?\n\n  @@map(\"verification\")\n}\n\nmodel CheckoutSessions {\n  id           String   @id\n  userId       String\n  sessionId    String\n  paymentType  String\n  completed    String\n  cart         String\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  shippingData Json?\n  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Orders {\n  id              String    @id\n  userId          String\n  stripeSessionId String?\n  status          String\n  cart            String\n  trackingNumber  String?\n  createdAt       DateTime  @default(now())\n  masjidId        String?\n  meta_data Json?\n  MizanTv         MizanTv[]\n  masjid          Masjid?   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user            User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MizanTv {\n  id         String @id\n  userId     String\n  orderId    String\n  accessCode String\n  order      Orders @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user       User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 292
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 226
          }
        },

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const orders = await prisma.orders.findMany({\n    orderBy: {\n      createdAt: \"desc\",\n    },\n    include: {\n      masjid: true,\n      user: true,\n    },\n  });\n  return NextResponse.json(orders);\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\";\n\nexport async function GET(request: NextRequest) {\n  const orders = await prisma.orders.findMany({\n    orderBy: {\n      createdAt: \"desc\",\n    },\n    include: {\n      masjid: true,\n      user: true,\n    },\n  });\n  return NextResponse.json(orders);\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  meta_data              Json?\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  meta_data              Json?\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "\n\n// Update an order (status, tracking number, etc.)\nexport const updateOrder = async (id: string, data: { status?: string; trackingNumber?: string }) =\u003e {\n  const o = await prisma.orders.update({\n    where: { id },\n    data\n  });\n  return o;\n};",

        "originalContents": "\n\n// Update an order (status, tracking number, etc.)\nexport const updateOrder = async (id: string, data: { status?: string; trackingNumber?: string }) =\u003e {\n  const o = await prisma.orders.update({\n    where: { id },\n    data\n  });\n  return o;\n};",

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\nimport { stripeClient } from \"../stripe\";\n\nexport const getSessionAndOrder = async (sessionId: string) =\u003e {\n  const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      sessionId\n    },\n    include: {\n      user: true\n    }\n  });\n  const order = await prisma.orders.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      stripeSessionId: sessionId\n    }\n  });\n  if (!checkoutSession) {\n    return {\n      order: null,\n      checkoutSession: null,\n      stripeSession: null\n    };\n  }\n  const stripeSession = await stripeClient.checkout.sessions.retrieve(checkoutSession?.sessionId as string);\n\n  return {\n    order,\n    checkoutSession,\n    stripeSession: stripeSession ? {\n      amount_total: stripeSession.amount_total,\n      created: stripeSession.created\n    } : null\n  };\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use server\";"

            "lineNumber": 28

            "lineNumber": 29,
            "text": "  return {"

            "lineNumber": 30,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"../db\";\nimport { stripeClient } from \"../stripe\";\n\nexport const getSessionAndOrder = async (sessionId: string) =\u003e {\n  const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      sessionId\n    },\n    include: {\n      user: true\n    }\n  });\n  const order = await prisma.orders.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      stripeSessionId: sessionId\n    }\n  });\n  if (!checkoutSession) {\n    return {\n      order: null,\n      checkoutSession: null,\n      stripeSession: null\n    };\n  }\n  const stripeSession = await stripeClient.checkout.sessions.retrieve(checkoutSession?.sessionId as string);\n\n  return {\n    order,\n    checkoutSession,\n    stripeSession: stripeSession ? {\n      amount_total: stripeSession.amount_total,\n      created: stripeSession.created\n    } : null\n  };\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Event {\n  id                    String    @id @default(cuid())\n  title                 String\n  date                  DateTime\n  timeStart             DateTime\n  timeEnd               DateTime\n  location              String\n  description           String\n  type                  String\n  tagColor              String\n  masjidId              String\n  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt\n  syncToGoogleCalendar  Boolean   @default(false)\n  googleCalendarEventId String?\n  lastSyncedAt          DateTime?\n  syncStatus            String?\n  flyerUrl              String?\n  tvFlyerUrl            String?\n  recurrence            Json?\n  masjid                Masjid    @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id               String             @id\n  name             String\n  email            String             @unique\n  emailVerified    Boolean\n  image            String?\n  createdAt        DateTime\n  updatedAt        DateTime\n  admin            Boolean            @default(false)\n  role             String             @default(\"user\")\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  masjidInvitedTo  MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\")\n  masjidInvites    MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\")\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  systemLogs       SystemLog[]\n  accounts         Account[]\n         "contents": "model DonationCategory {\n  id                    String     @id @default(cuid())\n  name                  String\n  description           String?\n  color                 String     @default(\"#550C18\")\n  icon                  String?\n  defaultAmounts        String?\n  min                   Int        @default(1)\n  max                   Int        @default(10000)\n  restricted            Boolean    @default(false)\n  active                Boolean    @default(true)\n  order                 Int        @default(0)\n  masjidId              String\n  createdAt             DateTime   @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime   @updatedAt\n  allowAnonymous        Boolean    @default(false)\n  allowComments         Boolean    @default(false)\n  allowCustomAmount     Boolean    @default(true)\n  allowPledge           Boolean    @default(false)\n  amountDonated         Int        @default(0)\n  amountsPerInterval    Json?\n  appreciation String[]\n  enableAppleGooglePay  Boolean    @default(false)\n  enforceMax            Boolean    @default(false)\n  excludeFromReceipts   Boolean    @default(false)\n  featured              Boolean    @default(false)\n  featuredImage         String?\n  goalAmount            Int?\n  headerBgColor         String?\n  hideTitle             Boolean    @default(false)\n  intervals             String[]\n  logo                  String?\n  mailingListOptIn      Boolean    @default(false)\n  quickDonate           Boolean    @default(false)\n  recurringCountOptions Int[]\n  redirectUrl           String?\n  showLogo              Boolean    @default(true)\n  showOnKiosk           Boolean    @default(true)\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE \"account\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"accountId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"providerId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"accessToken\" TEXT,\n    \"refreshToken\" TEXT,\n    \"idToken\" TEXT,\n    \"accessTokenExpiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"refreshTokenExpiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"scope\" TEXT,\n    \"password\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"account_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"verification\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"identifier\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"value\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"expiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"verification_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"CheckoutSessions\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"sessionId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"paymentType\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"completed\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"cart\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"CheckoutSessions_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"Orders\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"stripeSessionId\" TEXT,\n    \"status\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"cart\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"trackingNumber\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"Orders_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"MizanTv\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"orderId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"accessCode\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"MizanTv_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\n",

        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE \"account\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"accountId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"providerId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"accessToken\" TEXT,\n    \"refreshToken\" TEXT,\n    \"idToken\" TEXT,\n    \"accessTokenExpiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"refreshTokenExpiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"scope\" TEXT,\n    \"password\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"account_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"verification\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"identifier\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"value\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"expiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"verification_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"CheckoutSessions\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"sessionId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"paymentType\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"completed\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"cart\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"CheckoutSessions_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"Orders\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"stripeSessionId\" TEXT,\n    \"status\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"cart\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"trackingNumber\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"Orders_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"MizanTv\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"orderId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"accessCode\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"MizanTv_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\n",
        "range": {

'yes' : 'no');\n    return order;\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error fetching order:', error);\n    throw error;\n  }\n}",

           String              @id @default(cuid())\n  name                      String\n  description               String\n  address                   String?\n  city                      String\n  postal                    String\n  country                   String\n  email                     String\n  websiteUrl                String\n  phone                     String\n  googleCalendarId          String              @default(\"\")\n  googleCalendarCredentials Json?\n  googleCalendarPfp         String?\n  latitude                  String\n  longitude                 String\n         "contents": "model PrayerCalculation {\n  id                   String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId             String\n  calculationMethod    String\n  asrMethod            String\n  higherLatitudeMethod String\n  fajrOffset           Int\n  sunriseOffset        Int\n  dhuhrOffset          Int\n  asrOffset            Int\n  maghribOffset        Int\n  ishaOffset           Int\n  createdAt            DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt            DateTime @default(now()) @updatedAt\n  masjid               Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel IqamahTiming {\n  id            String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId      String\n  changeDate    DateTime\n  fajr          String\n  dhuhr         String\n  asr           String\n  maghrib       String\n  maghribType   String\n  maghribOffset String\n  isha          String\n  jumuahI       String?\n  jumuahII      String?\n  jumuahIII     String?\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n  masjid        Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel KioskInstance {\n  id            String     @id @default(cuid())\n  productId     String\n  masjidId      String\n  serial        String     @unique\n  activatedAt   DateTime   @default(now())\n  status        String     @default(\"active\")\n  config        Json?\n  kioskName     String?\n  kioskLocation String?\n  donations     Donation[]\n  masjid        Masjid     @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product       Product    @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport const getPaymentAndOrder = async (sessionId: string) =\u003e {\n  const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      sessionId\n    },\n    include: {\n      user: true\n    }\n  });\n  const order = await prisma.orders.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      stripeSessionId: sessionId\n    }\n  });\n\n  const stripeSession = await stripeClient.paymentIntents.retrieve(checkoutSession?.sessionId as string);\n\n  return {\n    order,\n    checkoutSession,\n    stripeSession: stripeSession ? {\n      amount_total: stripeSession.amount,\n      created: stripeSession.created,\n    } : null\n  };\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 37
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 38
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 39,
            "text": "export const getPaymentAndOrder = async (sessionId: string) =\u003e {"
          },
          {

            "text": "  });"
          },

            "lineNumber": 53

            "lineNumber": 54,

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport const getPaymentAndOrder = async (sessionId: string) =\u003e {\n  const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      sessionId\n    },\n    include: {\n      user: true\n    }\n  });\n  const order = await prisma.orders.findFirst({\n    where: {\n      stripeSessionId: sessionId\n    }\n  });\n\n  const stripeSession = await stripeClient.paymentIntents.retrieve(checkoutSession?.sessionId as string);\n\n  return {\n    order,\n    checkoutSession,\n    stripeSession: stripeSession ? {\n      amount_total: stripeSession.amount,\n      created: stripeSession.created,\n    } : null\n  };\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 64
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 37
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function DELETE(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: any\n) {\n  const { id } = await params\n  try {\n    await prisma.orders.delete({\n      where: { id: id },\n    })\n    return NextResponse.json({ message: \"Order deleted successfully\" })\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error deleting order:\", error)\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to delete order\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    )\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "/*\n  Warnings:\n\n  - The primary key for the &#96;_AnnouncementToTVDisplay&#96; table will be changed.
