      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model MasjidInvite {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  userId      String\n  invitedById String\n  status      String    @default(\"pending\")\n  token       String\n  expiresAt   DateTime\n  joinDate    DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n  invitedBy   User      @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\", fields: [invitedById], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid      Masjid    @relation(\"MasjidInviteToMasjid\", fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user        User      @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel SystemLog {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  action     String\n  entityType String\n  entityId   String\n  userId     String\n  details    String?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  user       User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([entityType, entityId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nenum DiscountType {\n  percentage\n  fixed\n}\n\nenum ContentType {\n  image\n  video\n  countdown\n  announcement\n  website\n  predesigned\n  google_calendar\n  daily_verse\n  daily_hadith\n  daily_dua\n  ramadan_countdown\n  eid_countdown\n  days_countdown\n  taraweeh_timings\n  iqamah_timings\n}\n",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "model MasjidInvite {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  userId      String\n  invitedById String\n  status      String    @default(\"pending\")\n  token       String\n  expiresAt   DateTime\n  joinDate    DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n  invitedBy   User      @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\", fields: [invitedById], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid      Masjid    @relation(\"MasjidInviteToMasjid\", fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user        User      @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel SystemLog {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  action     String\n  entityType String\n  entityId   String\n  userId     String\n  details    String?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  user       User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([entityType, entityId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nenum DiscountType {\n  percentage\n  fixed\n}\n\nenum ContentType {\n  image\n  video\n  countdown\n  announcement\n  website\n  predesigned\n  google_calendar\n  daily_verse\n  daily_hadith\n  daily_dua\n  ramadan_countdown\n  eid_countdown\n  days_countdown\n  taraweeh_timings\n  iqamah_timings\n}\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 533
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 480
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "prisma/schema.prisma"
      },
      "score": 0.3798828125
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\"\nimport { getPaymentAndOrder, getSessionAndOrder } from \"@/lib/actions/order\";\nimport EasyPost from \"@easypost/api\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  request: NextRequest,\n  { params }: any\n) {\n  const { id } = await params\n  try {\n    const order = await prisma.orders.findUnique({\n      where: { id: id },\n      include: {\n        masjid: true,\n        user: true\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!order) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Order not found\" },\n        { status: 404 }\n      )\n    }\n    let stripeAndOrder = null;\n    if(order.stripeSessionId?.startsWith(\"pi_\")) {\n      stripeAndOrder = await getPaymentAndOrder(order.stripeSessionId);\n    } else {\n      stripeAndOrder = await getSessionAndOrder(order.stripeSessionId as string);\n    }\n\n    const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        sessionId: order.stripeSessionId as string\n      }\n    });\n\n    if(!checkoutSession) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Checkout session not found\" },\n        { status: 404 }\n      )\n    }\n\n    let trackingDetails = null;\n    if (order.trackingNumber) {\n      try {\n        const apiKey = process.env.EASYPOST_API_KEY;\n        if (apiKey) {\n          const client = new EasyPost(apiKey);\n          // Try to fetch tracker by tracking code (auto-detect carrier)\n          // If you store carrier, pass it as { carrier: order.carrier }\n          const tracker = await client.Tracker.create({ tracking_code: order.trackingNumber });\n          trackingDetails = tracker;\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"EasyPost tracking fetch failed:\", err);\n        trackingDetails = { error: \"Failed to fetch tracking info\" };\n      }\n    }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use server\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {

          },

          },

            "lineNumber": 63,

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { NextRequest, NextResponse } from \"next/server\"\nimport { getPaymentAndOrder, getSessionAndOrder } from \"@/lib/actions/order\";\nimport EasyPost from \"@easypost/api\";\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";\n\nexport async function GET(\n  request: NextRequest,\n  { params }: any\n) {\n  const { id } = await params\n  try {\n    const order = await prisma.orders.findUnique({\n      where: { id: id },\n      include: {\n        masjid: true,\n        user: true\n      },\n    });\n\n    if (!order) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Order not found\" },\n        { status: 404 }\n      )\n    }\n    let stripeAndOrder = null;\n    if(order.stripeSessionId?.startsWith(\"pi_\")) {\n      stripeAndOrder = await getPaymentAndOrder(order.stripeSessionId);\n    } else {\n      stripeAndOrder = await getSessionAndOrder(order.stripeSessionId as string);\n    }\n\n    const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n      where: {\n        sessionId: order.stripeSessionId as string\n      }\n    });\n\n    if(!checkoutSession) {\n      return NextResponse.json(\n        { error: \"Checkout session not found\" },\n        { status: 404 }\n      )\n    }\n\n    let trackingDetails = null;\n    if (order.trackingNumber) {\n      try {\n        const apiKey = process.env.EASYPOST_API_KEY;\n        if (apiKey) {\n          const client = new EasyPost(apiKey);\n          // Try to fetch tracker by tracking code (auto-detect carrier)\n          // If you store carrier, pass it as { carrier: order.carrier }\n          const tracker = await client.Tracker.create({ tracking_code: order.trackingNumber });\n          trackingDetails = tracker;\n        }\n      } catch (err) {\n        console.error(\"EasyPost tracking fetch failed:\", err);\n        trackingDetails = { error: \"Failed to fetch tracking info\" };\n      }\n    }",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 6,
            "line": 63
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "app/api/orders/[id]/route.ts"
      },
      "score": 0.37890625
    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "  subtitle              String?\n  donations             Donation[]\n  masjid                Masjid     @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Donation {\n  id              String           @id @default(cuid())\n  amount          Int\n  donorName       String?\n  donorEmail      String?\n  masjidId        String\n  categoryId      String\n  kioskInstanceId String?\n  status          String           @default(\"pending\")\n  paymentMethod   String\n  transactionId   String?\n  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt       DateTime         @updatedAt\n  category        DonationCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  kioskInstance   KioskInstance?   @relation(fields: [kioskInstanceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid          Masjid           @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel TVDisplay {\n  id                String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId          String\n  name              String\n  location          String?\n  isActive          Boolean        @default(true)\n  lastSeen          DateTime?\n  ipAddress         String?\n  status            String         @default(\"offline\")\n  layout            String?\n  config            Json?\n  assignedContentId String?\n  createdAt         DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt         DateTime       @updatedAt\n  assignedContent   Content?       @relation(\"AssignedContent\", fields: [assignedContentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid            Masjid         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  announcements     Announcement[] @relation(\"AnnouncementToTVDisplay\")\n  displayedContent  Content[]      @relation(\"DisplayContent\")\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "  subtitle              String?\n  donations             Donation[]\n  masjid                Masjid     @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Donation {\n  id              String           @id @default(cuid())\n  amount          Int\n  donorName       String?\n  donorEmail      String?\n  masjidId        String\n  categoryId      String\n  kioskInstanceId String?\n  status          String           @default(\"pending\")\n  paymentMethod   String\n  transactionId   String?\n  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt       DateTime         @updatedAt\n  category        DonationCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  kioskInstance   KioskInstance?   @relation(fields: [kioskInstanceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid          Masjid           @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel TVDisplay {\n  id                String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId          String\n  name              String\n  location          String?\n  isActive          Boolean        @default(true)\n  lastSeen          DateTime?\n  ipAddress         String?\n  status            String         @default(\"offline\")\n  layout            String?\n  config            Json?\n  assignedContentId String?\n  createdAt         DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt         DateTime       @updatedAt\n  assignedContent   Content?       @relation(\"AssignedContent\", fields: [assignedContentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid            Masjid         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  announcements     Announcement[] @relation(\"AnnouncementToTVDisplay\")\n  displayedContent  Content[]      @relation(\"DisplayContent\")\n}\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function PUT(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: any\n) {\n  const { id } = await params\n  try {\n    const data = await request.json()\n    console.log(data)\n    const order = await prisma.orders.update({\n      where: { id: id },\n      data: data,\n      include: {\n        masjid: true,\n        user: true,\n      },\n    })\n    return NextResponse.json(order)\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error updating order:\", error)\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to update order\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    )\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport async function PUT(\n  request: Request,\n  { params }: any\n) {\n  const { id } = await params\n  try {\n    const data = await request.json()\n    console.log(data)\n    const order = await prisma.orders.update({\n      where: { id: id },\n      data: data,\n      include: {\n        masjid: true,\n        user: true,\n      },\n    })\n    return NextResponse.json(order)\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error updating order:\", error)\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to update order\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    )\n  }\n}",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\"\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\"\nimport { v4 } from \"uuid\"\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request) {\n  const body = await request.text()\n  const signature = request.headers.get(\"stripe-signature\") as string\n\n  try {\n    // In a real implementation, you would verify the webhook signature\n    // const event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, signature, process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET)\n\n    // For now, we'll just parse the JSON\n    const event = JSON.parse(body)\n\n\n    // Handle different event types\n    switch (event.type) {\n      case \"checkout.session.completed\":\n\n        const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n          where: {\n            sessionId: event.data.id\n          }\n        });\n        if(!checkoutSession) return;\n        // 1. Update your database with the order status\n        await prisma.checkoutSessions.update({\n          where: {\n            id: checkoutSession.id\n          },\n          data: {\n            completed: \"paid\",\n          }\n        });\n\n        await prisma.orders.create({\n          data: {\n            cart: checkoutSession.cart,\n            id: &#96;mizan_${v4()}_${new Date().getMilliseconds()}&#96;,\n            status: \"processing\",\n            stripeSessionId: checkoutSession.sessionId,\n            userId: checkoutSession.userId,\n            masjidId: checkoutSession.shippingData?.masjid as string\n          }\n        });\n        // 2. Send confirmation emails\n        // 3. Provision access to purchased products\n        break",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "import { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\"\nimport { NextResponse } from \"next/server\"\nimport { v4 } from \"uuid\"\n\nexport async function POST(request: Request) {\n  const body = await request.text()\n  const signature = request.headers.get(\"stripe-signature\") as string\n\n  try {\n    // In a real implementation, you would verify the webhook signature\n    // const event = stripe.webhooks.constructEvent(body, signature, process.env.STRIPE_WEBHOOK_SECRET)\n\n    // For now, we'll just parse the JSON\n    const event = JSON.parse(body)\n\n\n    // Handle different event types\n    switch (event.type) {\n      case \"checkout.session.completed\":\n\n        const checkoutSession = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n          where: {\n            sessionId: event.data.id\n          }\n        });\n        if(!checkoutSession) return;\n        // 1. Update your database with the order status\n        await prisma.checkoutSessions.update({\n          where: {\n            id: checkoutSession.id\n          },\n          data: {\n            completed: \"paid\",\n          }\n        });\n\n        await prisma.orders.create({\n          data: {\n            cart: checkoutSession.cart,\n            id: &#96;mizan_${v4()}_${new Date().getMilliseconds()}&#96;,\n            status: \"processing\",\n            stripeSessionId: checkoutSession.sessionId,\n            userId: checkoutSession.userId,\n            masjidId: checkoutSession.shippingData?.masjid as string\n          }\n        });\n        // 2. Send confirmation emails\n        // 3. Provision access to purchased products\n        break",
        "range": {

            "column": 1,

          }

        "contents": "export async function GET(\n  request: NextRequest,\n  { params }: any\n) {\n\n\n    ...\n\n\n    const newOrder = {\n      ...order,\n      ...stripeAndOrder,\n      checkoutSession,\n      items: JSON.parse(checkoutSession.cart).map((e: any) =\u003e {\n        return {\n          id: e.productId,\n          name: e.name,\n          price: e.price,\n          quantity: e.quantity\n        }\n      }),\n      trackingDetails,\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json(newOrder)\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error fetching order:\", error)\n    return NextResponse.json(\n      { error: \"Failed to fetch order\" },\n      { status: 500 }\n    )\n  }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export async function POST(request: Request) {\n\n\n      ...\n\n\n      case \"payment_intent.succeeded\":\n        const paymentIntent = await prisma.checkoutSessions.findFirst({\n          where: {\n            sessionId: event.data.id\n          }\n        });\n      \n        if(!paymentIntent) return;\n        // 1. Update your database with the order status\n        await prisma.checkoutSessions.update({\n          where: {\n            id: paymentIntent.id\n          },\n          data: {\n            completed: \"paid\",\n          }\n        });\n\n        await prisma.orders.create({\n          data: {\n            cart: paymentIntent.cart,\n            id: &#96;mizan_${v4()}_${new Date().getMilliseconds()}&#96;,\n            status: \"processing\",\n            stripeSessionId: paymentIntent.sessionId,\n            userId: paymentIntent.userId,\n            masjidId: paymentIntent.shippingData?.masjid as string\n          }\n        });\n      break\n\n      case \"invoice.payment_succeeded\":\n        // Continue to provision the subscription as payments continue to be made\n        // Store the status in your database and check when a user accesses your service\n        break\n\n      default:\n        // Unexpected event type\n        console.log(&#96;Unhandled event type ${event.type}&#96;)\n    }\n\n    return NextResponse.json({ received: true })\n  } catch (err) {\n    console.error(\"Webhook error:\", err)\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: \"Webhook handler failed\" }, { status: 400 })\n  }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Content {\n  id                 String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId           String\n  title              String\n  description        String\n  type               ContentType\n  url                String?\n  data               Json?\n  startDate          DateTime?\n  endDate            DateTime?\n  startTime          String?\n  endTime            String?\n  duration           String?\n  dayType            String?\n  timeType           String?\n  zones              String\n  active             Boolean        @default(true)\n  createdAt          DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime       @updatedAt\n  displayLocations   String[]\n  fullscreen         Boolean\n  announcements      Announcement[]\n  masjid             Masjid         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  assignedToDisplays TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"AssignedContent\")\n  displays           TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"DisplayContent\")\n}\n\nmodel Announcement {\n  id               String      @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId         String\n  title            String\n  content          String\n  type             String\n  fullscreen       Boolean     @default(true)\n  startDate        DateTime\n  endDate          DateTime\n  zones            String\n  active           Boolean     @default(true)\n  createdAt        DateTime    @default(now())\n  displayLocations String[]\n  updatedAt        DateTime    @updatedAt\n  contentItemId    String?\n  contentItem      Content?    @relation(fields: [contentItemId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid           Masjid      @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  displays         TVDisplay[] @relation(\"AnnouncementToTVDisplay\")\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "model Device {\n  id             String      @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId       String\n  name           String\n  location       String?\n  isActive       Boolean     @default(true)\n  lastSeen       DateTime?\n  registeredAt   DateTime    @default(now())\n  ipAddress      String?\n  currentThemeId String?\n  currentTheme   Theme?      @relation(fields: [currentThemeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid         Masjid      @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  screenLogs     ScreenLog[]\n}\n\nmodel ScreenLog {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId  String\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n  action    String\n  details   String?\n  device    Device   @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Theme {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  name       String\n  configJson Json\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  devices    Device[]\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel PrayerTime {\n  id           String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId     String\n  date         DateTime\n  fajr         DateTime\n  sunrise      DateTime\n  dhuhr        DateTime\n  asr          DateTime\n  maghrib      DateTime\n  isha         DateTime\n  isCalculated Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt\n  month        String\n  year         Int\n  masjid       Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, date])\n  @@index([masjidId])\n  @@index([date])\n}\n\nmodel Flyer {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId  String\n  title     String\n  imageUrl  String\n  startTime DateTime\n  endTime   DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid    Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

_**Agent (2025-06-13 21:35:42Z)**_

The issue in your screenshot is that the sidebar and the main header ("Dashboard") are not vertically aligned—the header is lower than the sidebar logo/title. This is a common flexbox alignment issue.

**How to fix:**
- The sidebar header and the main header should be aligned at the top.
- The sidebar header (`SidebarHeader`) uses `py-3` (padding-y), while the main header uses `p-4 py-4` (padding all and extra vertical padding).
- The main header is inside a `header` with `p-4 py-4 flex items-center ...`, which may add extra vertical space.

**Solution:**
- Make sure both the sidebar header and the main header have the same vertical padding.
- Adjust the main header's padding to match the sidebar, or vice versa.
- You may also want to set a fixed height for both headers for perfect alignment.

---

2. Ensure both headers use the same vertical alignment and padding.

_**User (2025-06-15 22:36:54Z)**_

Absolutely! Here’s how you can architect a system where masjid admins (or users) can customize slides and themes from your ` dashboard, and have those customizations reflected on the signage display app.

---

## 1. **Frontend Dashboard: Customization Flow**

### A. **Slide & Theme Editor UI**
- Let users:
  - Add/remove/reorder slides (e.g., Prayer Times, Announcements, Custom).
  - For each slide, pick a template (Modern, Classic, etc.) and customize colors, images, text, etc.
  - Preview their display in real time.
- Store each slide’s config as a JSON object (type, template, theme, content, etc.).

### B. **Save Customization to Backend**
- When the user saves, POST the full config (array of slides, order, theme, etc.) to your backend, associated with their masjidId.

**Example config:**
```json
{
  "masjidId": "abc123",
  "slides": [
    {
      "type": "prayerTimes",
      "template": "modern",
      "theme": { "primary": "#4CAF50", "background": "#fff" }
    },
    {
      "type": "announcements",
      "template": "classic",
      "theme": { "primary": "#2196F3", "background": "#f5f5f5" }
    },
    {
      "type": "custom",
      "template": "custom1",
      "content": { "title": "Welcome!", "subtitle": "Eid Mubarak!" }
    }
  ]
}
```

---

## 2. **Backend: Store & Serve Config**
- Store the config in your DB (e.g., Mongo, Postgres, etc.) keyed by `masjidId`.
- Expose an endpoint like `/api/masjids/{masjidId}/signage-config` that returns the config JSON.

---

## 3. **Signage App: Fetch & Render Slides**
- On startup, the signage app fetches `/api/masjids/{masjidId}/signage-config`.
- It dynamically renders the slides in the order and with the themes/templates specified.

---

## 4. **How to Build the Frontend Editor (in **

### A. **Data Model**
- Create a TypeScript type for a slide config:
```ts
export type SlideConfig = {
  type: 'prayerTimes' | 'announcements' | 'custom';
  template: string;
  theme?: Record<string, string>;
  content?: Record<string, any>;
};
```

### B. **UI Components**
- **SlidesList**: Shows current slides, allows reordering, adding, removing.
- **SlideEditor**: For each slide, lets user pick template, edit theme/colors, and content.
- **ThemePicker**: Color pickers, font selectors, etc.
- **Preview**: Shows a live preview of the current config.

### C. **Saving**
- When the user clicks “Save”, POST the config to your backend.

---

## 5. **Example: Minimal Slide Editor UI (React/Next.js)**

```tsx
// pages/signage-config.tsx
import { useState } from 'react';
import { SlideConfig } from '@/types/slideConfig';

export default function SignageConfigPage() {
  const [slides, setSlides] = useState<SlideConfig[]>([
    { type: 'prayerTimes', template: 'modern', theme: { primary: '#4CAF50' } }
  ]);

  function addSlide(type: SlideConfig['type']) {
    setSlides([...slides, { type, template: 'modern' }]);
  }

  function saveConfig() {
    fetch('/api/masjids/abc123/signage-config', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify({ slides }),
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
    });
  }

  return (
    <div>
      <h1>Signage Slides</h1>
      {slides.map((slide, i) => (
        <div key={i}>
          <span>{slide.type}</span>
          {/* Add template/theme/content editors here */}
        </div>
      ))}
      <button onClick={() => addSlide('announcements')}>Add Announcements Slide</button>
      <button onClick={saveConfig}>Save</button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## 6. **Next Steps**

1. **Do you want a minimal working version of the slide config editor in your frontend?**
2. **Do you want a more advanced drag-and-drop UI, or just basic add/remove/edit for now?**
3. **Do you want to start with just theme and order, or also allow custom content per slide?**

---

**Let me know your preferred starting point, and I’ll generate the code for your Next.js frontend!**  
(For example: “Start with a basic add/remove/edit UI for slides and theme, with a Save button.”)


Great question! You’re now at the exciting part: making your signage system truly dynamic and customizable for different masjids or users.

Here’s a practical, scalable approach for supporting custom designs and user-imported slides/pages:

---

## 1. **Component-Based Slide System**

- Each slide is a React component.
- You can have a set of built-in slides (e.g., PrayerTimesSlide, AnnouncementsSlide).
- For custom slides, you can:
  - Allow users to pick from a set of templates (with theme/colors/images/text options).
  - Or, for advanced users, allow them to upload or write their own React code (with some security/sandboxing).

---

## 2. **How to Support Custom Designs**

### **A. Theming and Templates (Recommended for Most Users)**
- Build a set of flexible slide templates (e.g., “Modern”, “Classic”, “Minimal”).
- Each template accepts a `theme` prop (colors, fonts, logo, etc.) and content props (text, images, etc.).
- Users pick a template and customize its look via a settings UI (stored in the DB or local storage).

**Example:**
```tsx
<PrayerTimesSlide theme={userTheme} layout="modern" />
<AnnouncementsSlide theme={userTheme} layout="classic" />
```

### **B. User-Defined Slides (Advanced)**
- Allow users to upload a JSON config that describes the layout, colors, and content.
- For power users, you could allow uploading a JS/TS file that exports a React component (with strict sandboxing and validation).

---

## 3. **How to Import/Use Custom Slides**

### **A. JSON/Config-Driven Slides**
- Users create a JSON file describing their slide (background, text, images, etc.).
- Your app reads the config and renders a generic `CustomSlide` component.

**Example config:**
```json
{
  "background": "#fff",
  "elements": [
    { "type": "text", "value": "Welcome!", "color": "#333", "size": 32 },
    { "type": "image", "src": "https://..." }
  ]
}
```
**Rendering:**
```tsx
<CustomSlide config={userConfig} />
```

### **B. Code-Driven Slides (for Developers)**
- Users can upload a JS/TS file that exports a React component.
- You dynamically import and render it:
```tsx
const CustomComponent = require('./user-slides/MyCustomSlide').default;
<CustomComponent data={...} />
```
- **Warning:** This is powerful but risky (security, stability). Only do this for trusted users or in a sandboxed environment.

---

## 4. **How to Organize This in Your Codebase**

- `components/`
  - `PrayerTimesSlide.tsx`
  - `AnnouncementsSlide.tsx`
  - `CustomSlide.tsx` (renders from JSON/config)
  - `UserImportedSlide.tsx` (renders from user-uploaded code, if you support this)
- `user-slides/` (optional, for uploaded code)
- `themes/` (for built-in and user themes)

---

## 5. **How to Let Users Pick/Add Slides**

- Build a settings UI where users can:
  - Pick which slides to show and in what order.
  - Pick a template or upload a config/code for each slide.
  - Customize the theme/colors for each slide or the whole display.

---

## 6. **Example: Rendering a Dynamic Slide List**

```tsx
import { SlideContainer } from './components/SlideContainer';
import { PrayerTimesSlide } from './components/PrayerTimesSlide';
import { AnnouncementsSlide } from './components/AnnouncementsSlide';
import { CustomSlide } from './components/CustomSlide';

const slides = [
  <PrayerTimesSlide key="prayer" theme={userTheme} />,
  <AnnouncementsSlide key="ann" theme={userTheme} />,
  <CustomSlide key="custom" config={userConfig} />,
  // ...dynamically import user code if needed
];

<SlideContainer slides={slides} duration={10000} />
```

---

## 7. **What’s Next?**

- Do you want to start with a JSON/config-driven `CustomSlide`?
- Or do you want to build a UI for users to pick templates and customize themes?
- Or do you want to support uploading code for advanced users?

**Let me know which direction you want to go, and I’ll help you implement the next step!**

_**Agent (2025-06-15 22:36:54Z)**_

Fantastic! You’re ready to build a **customizable signage system** for masjid admins, with a dashboard UI for editing slides/themes and a display app (like MizanTv) that renders those customizations.

Here’s a step-by-step plan and a minimal working example to get you started on the **frontend customization UI** in Next.js/React:

---

## 1. **Data Model**

Create a type for a slide config (in `types/slideConfig.ts`):

```ts
export type SlideConfig = {
  type: 'prayerTimes' | 'announcements' | 'custom';
  template: string;
  theme?: Record<string, string>;
  content?: Record<string, any>;
};
```

---

## 2. **Minimal Slide Editor UI**

Create a page like `app/dashboard/signage-config.tsx`:

```tsx
import { useState } from 'react';

export type SlideConfig = {
  type: 'prayerTimes' | 'announcements' | 'custom';
  template: string;
  theme?: Record<string, string>;
  content?: Record<string, any>;
};

const defaultSlides: SlideConfig[] = [
  { type: 'prayerTimes', template: 'modern', theme: { primary: '#4CAF50' } }
];

export default function SignageConfigPage() {
  const [slides, setSlides] = useState<SlideConfig[]>(defaultSlides);

  function addSlide(type: SlideConfig['type']) {
    setSlides([...slides, { type, template: 'modern' }]);
  }

  function updateSlide(index: number, newSlide: SlideConfig) {
    setSlides(slides.map((s, i) => (i === index ? newSlide : s)));
  }

  function removeSlide(index: number) {
    setSlides(slides.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
  }

  function saveConfig() {
    fetch('/api/masjids/abc123/signage-config', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify({ slides }),
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' }
    });
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-2xl mx-auto p-6">
      <h1 className="text-2xl font-bold mb-4">Signage Slides</h1>
      {slides.map((slide, i) => (
        <div key={i} className="border p-4 mb-2 rounded">
          <div className="flex items-center gap-2 mb-2">
            <span className="font-semibold">{slide.type}</span>
            <button onClick={() => removeSlide(i)} className="text-red-500">Remove</button>
          </div>
          <label>
            Template:
            <select
              value={slide.template}
              onChange={e =>
                updateSlide(i, { ...slide, template: e.target.value })
              }
              className="ml-2"
            >
              <option value="modern">Modern</option>
              <option value="classic">Classic</option>
            </select>
          </label>
          {/* Add more theme/content editors here */}
        </div>
      ))}
      <div className="flex gap-2 mb-4">
        <button onClick={() => addSlide('prayerTimes')}>Add Prayer Times</button>
        <button onClick={() => addSlide('announcements')}>Add Announcements</button>
        <button onClick={() => addSlide('custom')}>Add Custom Slide</button>
      </div>
      <button onClick={saveConfig} className="bg-green-600 text-white px-4 py-2 rounded">Save</button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## 3. **Next Steps / Customization Options**

- **Theme Editor:** Add color pickers for `theme.primary`, `theme.background`, etc.
- **Content Editor:** For custom slides, let users edit text/images.
- **Drag-and-Drop:** Use a library like `react-beautiful-dnd` for reordering slides.
- **Preview:** Render a live preview of the current slide config.

---

## 4. **Backend API**

- Create an endpoint like `/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config` to save/load the config.
- Store the config JSON in your DB, keyed by `masjidId`.

---

## 5. **Display App (MizanTv)**

- On startup, fetch `/api/masjids/{masjidId}/signage-config`.
- Dynamically render slides in the order and with the themes/templates specified.

---

## 6. **How to Expand**

- Add more templates and theme options.
- Allow uploading images or custom backgrounds.
- Add a “Preview” pane to show what the signage will look like.

---

- Do you want a more advanced drag-and-drop UI?
- Should I scaffold the backend API route for you?
- Do you want a live preview component for the slides?

Perfect! Here’s how I’ll proceed:

- **UI:** Use shadcn/ui components (Button, Card, Select, Input, etc.) for a polished, modern look.
- **Theme:** Match your site’s color palette (e.g., `#550C18` for primary, rounded corners, padding, etc.).
- **Features:**  
  - Add, remove, reorder slides (with drag-and-drop).
  - Edit slide type, template, theme colors, and content (for custom slides).
  - Live preview of each slide.
  - Save button (POSTs config to backend).
- **Structure:**  
  - All in a new page: `app/dashboard/signage-config.tsx`
  - Types in `types/slideConfig.ts` (if not already present).

---

## 1. **Type Definition (`types/slideConfig.ts`)**

```ts
export type SlideConfig = {
  type: 'prayerTimes' | 'announcements' | 'custom';
  template: string;
  theme?: {
    primary?: string;
    background?: string;
    [key: string]: string | undefined;
  };
  content?: Record<string, any>;
};
```

---

## 2. **Signage Config Editor Page (`app/dashboard/signage-config.tsx`)**

This will use shadcn/ui and your color theme.

```tsx
'use client';

import { useState } from 'react';
import { Button } from '@/components/ui/button';
import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from '@/components/ui/card';
import { Input } from '@/components/ui/input';
import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from '@/components/ui/select';
import { Badge } from '@/components/ui/badge';
import { toast } from '@/hooks/use-toast';
import { GripVertical, Trash2, Plus, Eye } from 'lucide-react';
import { SlideConfig } from '@/types/slideConfig';
import { cn } from '@/lib/utils';

const slideTypes = [
  { value: 'prayerTimes', label: 'Prayer Times' },
  { value: 'announcements', label: 'Announcements' },
  { value: 'custom', label: 'Custom' },
];

const templates = [
  { value: 'modern', label: 'Modern' },
  { value: 'classic', label: 'Classic' },
];

const defaultTheme = {
  primary: '#550C18',
  background: '#fff',
};

export default function SignageConfigPage() {
  const [slides, setSlides] = useState<SlideConfig[]>([
    { type: 'prayerTimes', template: 'modern', theme: { ...defaultTheme } },
  ]);
  const [dragIndex, setDragIndex] = useState<number | null>(null);

  function addSlide(type: SlideConfig['type']) {
    setSlides([
      ...slides,
      { type, template: 'modern', theme: { ...defaultTheme } },
    ]);
    toast({ title: 'Slide added', description: `Added a ${type} slide.` });
  }

  function updateSlide(index: number, newSlide: SlideConfig) {
    setSlides(slides.map((s, i) => (i === index ? newSlide : s)));
  }

  function removeSlide(index: number) {
    setSlides(slides.filter((_, i) => i !== index));
    toast({ title: 'Slide removed' });
  }

  function moveSlide(from: number, to: number) {
    if (to < 0 || to >= slides.length) return;
    const updated = [...slides];
    const [moved] = updated.splice(from, 1);
    updated.splice(to, 0, moved);
    setSlides(updated);
  }

  function saveConfig() {
    fetch('/api/masjids/abc123/signage-config', {
      method: 'POST',
      body: JSON.stringify({ slides }),
      headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/json' },
    }).then(() => {
      toast({ title: 'Saved!', description: 'Signage config updated.' });
    });
  }

  return (
    <div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto p-8">
      <h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#550C18] mb-6">Signage Slides</h1>
      <div className="space-y-4">
        {slides.map((slide, i) => (
          <Card key={i} className="relative group border-[#550C18]/20">
            <CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2">
              <div className="flex items-center gap-2">
                <button
                  className="cursor-grab"
                  onMouseDown={() => setDragIndex(i)}
                  onMouseUp={() => setDragIndex(null)}
                  title="Drag to reorder"
                >
                  <GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-[#550C18]/60" />
                </button>
                <Badge className="bg-[#550C18]/10 text-[#550C18]">
                  {slideTypes.find(t => t.value === slide.type)?.label}
                </Badge>
                <span className="text-xs text-[#3A3A3A]/60 ml-2">
                  {templates.find(t => t.value === slide.template)?.label}
                </span>
              </div>
              <Button
                variant="ghost"
                size="icon"
                className="text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50"
                onClick={() => removeSlide(i)}
              >
                <Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" />
              </Button>
            </CardHeader>
            <CardContent className="space-y-3">
              <div className="flex gap-4">
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Type</label>
                  <Select
                    value={slide.type}
                    onValueChange={val =>
                      updateSlide(i, { ...slide, type: val as SlideConfig['type'] })
                    }
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      {slideTypes.map(t => (
                        <SelectItem key={t.value} value={t.value}>
                          {t.label}
                        </SelectItem>
                      ))}
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Template</label>
                  <Select
                    value={slide.template}
                    onValueChange={val =>
                      updateSlide(i, { ...slide, template: val })
                    }
                  >
                    <SelectTrigger>
                      <SelectValue />
                    </SelectTrigger>
                    <SelectContent>
                      {templates.map(t => (
                        <SelectItem key={t.value} value={t.value}>
                          {t.label}
                        </SelectItem>
                      ))}
                    </SelectContent>
                  </Select>
                </div>
              </div>
              <div className="flex gap-4">
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Primary Color</label>
                  <Input
                    type="color"
                    value={slide.theme?.primary || defaultTheme.primary}
                    onChange={e =>
                      updateSlide(i, {
                        ...slide,
                        theme: { ...slide.theme, primary: e.target.value },
                      })
                    }
                    className="w-12 h-8 p-0 border-none bg-transparent"
                  />
                </div>
                <div className="flex-1">
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Background</label>
                  <Input
                    type="color"
                    value={slide.theme?.background || defaultTheme.background}
                    onChange={e =>
                      updateSlide(i, {
                        ...slide,
                        theme: { ...slide.theme, background: e.target.value },
                      })
                    }
                    className="w-12 h-8 p-0 border-none bg-transparent"
                  />
                </div>
              </div>
              {slide.type === 'custom' && (
                <div>
                  <label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1">Custom Content</label>
                  <Input
                    placeholder="Title"
                    value={slide.content?.title || ''}
                    onChange={e =>
                      updateSlide(i, {
                        ...slide,
                        content: { ...slide.content, title: e.target.value },
                      })
                    }
                    className="mb-2"
                  />
                  <Input
                    placeholder="Subtitle"
                    value={slide.content?.subtitle || ''}
                    onChange={e =>
                      updateSlide(i, {
                        ...slide,
                        content: { ...slide.content, subtitle: e.target.value },
                      })
                    }
                  />
                </div>
              )}
              {/* Live preview (optional, can be expanded) */}
              <div className="mt-2">
                <Button
                  variant="outline"
                  size="sm"
                  className="flex items-center gap-2"
                  onClick={() => toast({ title: 'Preview', description: 'Preview coming soon!' })}
                >
                  <Eye className="h-4 w-4" /> Preview
                </Button>
              </div>
            </CardContent>
          </Card>
        ))}
      </div>
      <div className="flex gap-2 mt-6">
        {slideTypes.map(t => (
          <Button
            key={t.value}
            variant="outline"
            className="border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5"
            onClick={() => addSlide(t.value as SlideConfig['type'])}
          >
            <Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /> Add {t.label}
          </Button>
        ))}
      </div>
      <Button
        className="mt-8 w-full bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white"
        onClick={saveConfig}
      >
        Save Configuration
      </Button>
    </div>
  );
}
```

---

## 3. **How to Use/Expand**

- **Drag-and-drop:** For full drag-and-drop, integrate `react-beautiful-dnd` or similar.
- **Preview:** Replace the preview button with a real preview component.
- **API:** Adjust the POST URL and payload as needed for your backend.

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: app/dashboard/signage-config.tsx</summary>

Create a beautiful signage config editor page using shadcn/ui components, following the site's theme and structure, with add/remove/edit/reorder/preview/save for slides.

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 259, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,259 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import { useState } from "react";
+ import { Button } from "@/components/ui/button";
+ import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader, CardTitle } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
+ import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
+ import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
+ import { toast } from "@/hooks/use-toast";
+ import { GripVertical, Trash2, Plus, Eye, ArrowUp, ArrowDown } from "lucide-react";
+ import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+ 
+ export type SlideConfig = {
+   type: "prayerTimes" | "announcements" | "custom";
+   template: string;
+   theme?: {
+     primary?: string;
+     background?: string;
+     [key: string]: string | undefined;
+   };
+   content?: Record&lt;string, any&gt;;
+ };
+ 
+ const slideTypes = [
+   { value: "prayerTimes", label: "Prayer Times" },
+   { value: "announcements", label: "Announcements" },
+   { value: "custom", label: "Custom" },
+ ];
+ 
+ const templates = [
+   { value: "modern", label: "Modern" },
+   { value: "classic", label: "Classic" },
+ ];
+ 
+ const defaultTheme = {
+   primary: "#550C18",
+   background: "#fff",
+ };
+ 
+ export default function SignageConfigPage() {
+   const [slides, setSlides] = useState&lt;SlideConfig[]&gt;([
+     { type: "prayerTimes", template: "modern", theme: { ...defaultTheme } },
+   ]);
+ 
+   function addSlide(type: SlideConfig["type"]) {
+     setSlides([
+       ...slides,
+       { type, template: "modern", theme: { ...defaultTheme } },
+     ]);
+     toast({ title: "Slide added", description: &#96;Added a ${type} slide.&#96; });
+   }
+ 
+   function updateSlide(index: number, newSlide: SlideConfig) {
+     setSlides(slides.map((s, i) =&gt; (i === index ? newSlide : s)));
+   }
+ 
+   function removeSlide(index: number) {
+     setSlides(slides.filter((_, i) =&gt; i !== index));
+     toast({ title: "Slide removed" });
+   }
+ 
+   function moveSlide(from: number, to: number) {
+     if (to &lt; 0 || to &gt;= slides.length) return;
+     const updated = [...slides];
+     const [moved] = updated.splice(from, 1);
+     updated.splice(to, 0, moved);
+     setSlides(updated);
+   }
+ 
+   function saveConfig() {
+     fetch("/api/masjids/abc123/signage-config", {
+       method: "POST",
+       body: JSON.stringify({ slides }),
+       headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+     }).then(() =&gt; {
+       toast({ title: "Saved!", description: "Signage config updated." });
+     });
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="max-w-3xl mx-auto p-8"&gt;
+       &lt;h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#550C18] mb-6"&gt;Signage Slides&lt;/h1&gt;
+       &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+         {slides.map((slide, i) =&gt; (
+           &lt;Card key={i} className="relative group border-[#550C18]/20"&gt;
+             &lt;CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                 &lt;Button
+                   variant="ghost"
+                   size="icon"
+                   className="cursor-pointer"
+                   onClick={() =&gt; moveSlide(i, i - 1)}
+                   disabled={i === 0}
+                   title="Move up"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;ArrowUp className="h-4 w-4 text-[#550C18]/60" /&gt;
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+                 &lt;Button
+                   variant="ghost"
+                   size="icon"
+                   className="cursor-pointer"
+                   onClick={() =&gt; moveSlide(i, i + 1)}
+                   disabled={i === slides.length - 1}
+                   title="Move down"
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;ArrowDown className="h-4 w-4 text-[#550C18]/60" /&gt;
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+                 &lt;GripVertical className="h-4 w-4 text-[#550C18]/60 ml-2" /&gt;
+                 &lt;Badge className="bg-[#550C18]/10 text-[#550C18]"&gt;
+                   {slideTypes.find((t) =&gt; t.value === slide.type)?.label}
+                 &lt;/Badge&gt;
+                 &lt;span className="text-xs text-[#3A3A3A]/60 ml-2"&gt;
+                   {templates.find((t) =&gt; t.value === slide.template)?.label}
+                 &lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;Button
+                 variant="ghost"
+                 size="icon"
+                 className="text-red-500 hover:bg-red-50"
+                 onClick={() =&gt; removeSlide(i)}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;Trash2 className="h-4 w-4" /&gt;
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+             &lt;CardContent className="space-y-3"&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex gap-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1"&gt;Type&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;Select
+                     value={slide.type}
+                     onValueChange={(val) =&gt;
+                       updateSlide(i, { ...slide, type: val as SlideConfig["type"] })
+                     }
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;SelectTrigger&gt;
+                       &lt;SelectValue /&gt;
+                     &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;
+                     &lt;SelectContent&gt;
+                       {slideTypes.map((t) =&gt; (
+                         &lt;SelectItem key={t.value} value={t.value}&gt;
+                           {t.label}
+                         &lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                       ))}
+                     &lt;/SelectContent&gt;
+                   &lt;/Select&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1"&gt;Template&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;Select
+                     value={slide.template}
+                     onValueChange={(val) =&gt;
+                       updateSlide(i, { ...slide, template: val })
+                     }
+                   &gt;
+                     &lt;SelectTrigger&gt;
+                       &lt;SelectValue /&gt;
+                     &lt;/SelectTrigger&gt;
+                     &lt;SelectContent&gt;
+                       {templates.map((t) =&gt; (
+                         &lt;SelectItem key={t.value} value={t.value}&gt;
+                           {t.label}
+                         &lt;/SelectItem&gt;
+                       ))}
+                     &lt;/SelectContent&gt;
+                   &lt;/Select&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex gap-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1"&gt;Primary Color&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     type="color"
+                     value={slide.theme?.primary || defaultTheme.primary}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt;
+                       updateSlide(i, {
+                         ...slide,
+                         theme: { ...slide.theme, primary: e.target.value },
+                       })
+                     }
+                     className="w-12 h-8 p-0 border-none bg-transparent"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="flex-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1"&gt;Background&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     type="color"
+                     value={slide.theme?.background || defaultTheme.background}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt;
+                       updateSlide(i, {
+                         ...slide,
+                         theme: { ...slide.theme, background: e.target.value },
+                       })
+                     }
+                     className="w-12 h-8 p-0 border-none bg-transparent"
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               {slide.type === "custom" &amp;&amp; (
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;label className="block text-sm font-medium mb-1"&gt;Custom Content&lt;/label&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     placeholder="Title"
+                     value={slide.content?.title || ""}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt;
+                       updateSlide(i, {
+                         ...slide,
+                         content: { ...slide.content, title: e.target.value },
+                       })
+                     }
+                     className="mb-2"
+                   /&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     placeholder="Subtitle"
+                     value={slide.content?.subtitle || ""}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt;
+                       updateSlide(i, {
+                         ...slide,
+                         content: { ...slide.content, subtitle: e.target.value },
+                       })
+                     }
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               )}
+               {/* Live preview (optional, can be expanded) */}
+               &lt;div className="mt-2"&gt;
+                 &lt;Button
+                   variant="outline"
+                   size="sm"
+                   className="flex items-center gap-2"
+                   onClick={() =&gt; toast({ title: "Preview", description: "Preview coming soon!" })}
+                 &gt;
+                   &lt;Eye className="h-4 w-4" /&gt; Preview
+                 &lt;/Button&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/CardContent&gt;
+           &lt;/Card&gt;
+         ))}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;div className="flex gap-2 mt-6"&gt;
+         {slideTypes.map((t) =&gt; (
+           &lt;Button
+             key={t.value}
+             variant="outline"
+             className="border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5"
+             onClick={() =&gt; addSlide(t.value as SlideConfig["type"])}
+           &gt;
+             &lt;Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /&gt; Add {t.label}
+           &lt;/Button&gt;
+         ))}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       &lt;Button
+         className="mt-8 w-full bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white"
+         onClick={saveConfig}
+       &gt;
+         Save Configuration
+       &lt;/Button&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

---

## 1. **Drag-and-Drop Reordering**
- Integrate `react-beautiful-dnd` for intuitive slide reordering.

## 2. **Live Preview**
- Add a preview pane that renders a visual mockup of the current slide (matching your theme/templates).

## 3. **Backend API Scaffolding**
- Create `/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config`:
  - `GET` returns the config JSON.
  - `POST` saves the config JSON.

## 4. **Advanced Theme/Content Editing**
- Add more controls for theme (font, more colors, etc.).
- For custom slides, allow editing of more fields (images, rich text, etc.).

## 5. **Connect to Display App**
- Show how the display app fetches and renders the config.

    function removeSlide(index: number) {

+   function onDragEnd(result: DropResult) {
+     if (!result.destination) return;
+     const reordered = Array.from(slides);
+     const [removed] = reordered.splice(result.source.index, 1);
+     reordered.splice(result.destination.index, 0, removed);
+     setSlides(reordered);
+     setSelectedIndex(result.destination.index);
    }
  
```

-             className="border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5"
-             onClick={() =&gt; addSlide(t.value as SlideConfig["type"])}
-           &gt;
-             &lt;Plus className="h-4 w-4 mr-1" /&gt; Add {t.label}
-           &lt;/Button&gt;
-         ))}
+           &lt;/&gt;
+         )}
        &lt;/div&gt;
-       &lt;Button
-         className="mt-8 w-full bg-[#550C18] hover:bg-[#78001A] text-white"
-         onClick={saveConfig}
-       &gt;
-         Save Configuration
-       &lt;/Button&gt;
      &lt;/div&gt;
    );
```

</details>

</tool-use>

**Done!**

- You now have **drag-and-drop reordering** of slides (using react-beautiful-dnd).
- There’s a **live preview** pane for the currently selected slide.
- The UI is split: left for slide list/reordering, right for editing and preview.
- All styling matches your site’s theme.

### **Next Steps: Backend API Scaffolding**

I’ll now scaffold `/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config` for GET/POST (saving/loading config).

Would you like this as a file in `app/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config/route.ts`?  
And do you want to use a simple file/JSON store, or should I use Prisma/Postgres (if you have a `Masjid` or `SignageConfig` model)?

**Let me know your backend preference and I’ll proceed!**

\"Announcements\" },\n  { value: \"custom\", label: \"Custom\" },\n];\n\nconst templates = [\n  { value: \"modern\", label: \"Modern\" },\n  { value: \"classic\", label: \"Classic\" },\n];\n\nconst defaultTheme = {\n  primary: \"#550C18\",\n  background: \"#fff\",\n};\n\nfunction SlidePreview({ slide }: { slide: SlideConfig }) {\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv\n      className=\"rounded-lg border p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center\"\n      style={{\n        background: slide.theme?.background || defaultTheme.background,\n        color: slide.theme?.primary || defaultTheme.primary,\n        minHeight: 180,\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      {slide.type === \"prayerTimes\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold className=\"text-sm opacity-70\"\u003e(Preview)\u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      )}\n      {slide.type === \"custom\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-2\"\u003e{slide.content?.title || \"Custom Slide\"}\u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-base opacity-70\"\u003e{slide.content?.subtitle || \"(Preview)\"}\u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      )}\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  );\n}\n\nexport default function SignageConfigPage() {\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Device {\n  id             String      @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId       String\n  name           String\n  location       String?\n  isActive       Boolean     @default(true)\n  lastSeen       DateTime?\n  registeredAt   DateTime    @default(now())\n  ipAddress      String?\n  currentThemeId String?\n  currentTheme   Theme?      @relation(fields: [currentThemeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid         Masjid      @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  screenLogs     ScreenLog[]\n}\n\nmodel ScreenLog {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId  String\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n  action    String\n  details   String?\n  device    Device   @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Theme {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  name       String\n  configJson Json\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  devices    Device[]\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel PrayerTime {\n  id           String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId     String\n  date         DateTime\n  fajr         DateTime\n  sunrise      DateTime\n  dhuhr        DateTime\n  asr          DateTime\n  maghrib      DateTime\n  isha         DateTime\n  isCalculated Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt\n  month        String\n  year         Int\n  masjid       Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, date])\n  @@index([masjidId])\n  @@index([date])\n}\n\nmodel Flyer {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId  String\n  title     String\n  imageUrl  String\n  startTime DateTime\n  endTime   DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid    Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "model Device {\n  id             String      @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId       String\n  name           String\n  location       String?\n  isActive       Boolean     @default(true)\n  lastSeen       DateTime?\n  registeredAt   DateTime    @default(now())\n  ipAddress      String?\n  currentThemeId String?\n  currentTheme   Theme?      @relation(fields: [currentThemeId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid         Masjid      @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  screenLogs     ScreenLog[]\n}\n\nmodel ScreenLog {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  deviceId  String\n  timestamp DateTime @default(now())\n  action    String\n  details   String?\n  device    Device   @relation(fields: [deviceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Theme {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  name       String\n  configJson Json\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  devices    Device[]\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel PrayerTime {\n  id           String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId     String\n  date         DateTime\n  fajr         DateTime\n  sunrise      DateTime\n  dhuhr        DateTime\n  asr          DateTime\n  maghrib      DateTime\n  isha         DateTime\n  isCalculated Boolean  @default(true)\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt    DateTime @updatedAt\n  month        String\n  year         Int\n  masjid       Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, date])\n  @@index([masjidId])\n  @@index([date])\n}\n\nmodel Flyer {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId  String\n  title     String\n  imageUrl  String\n  startTime DateTime\n  endTime   DateTime\n  createdAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid    Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

 \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"masjidId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"name\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"location\" TEXT,\n    \"isActive\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,\n    \"lastSeen\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n \"name\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"configJson\" JSONB NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"Theme_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n--         "contents": "generator client {\n  provider = \"prisma-client-js\"\n}\n\ndatasource db {\n  provider = \"postgresql\"\n  url      = env(\"DATABASE_URL\")\n}\n\nmodel Masjid {\n  id                        String              @id @default(cuid())\n  name                      String\n  description               String\n  address                   String?\n  city                      String\n  postal                    String\n  country                   String\n  email                     String\n  websiteUrl                String\n  phone                     String\n  googleCalendarId          String              @default(\"\")\n  googleCalendarCredentials Json?\n  googleCalendarPfp         String?\n  latitude                  String\n  longitude                 String\n  locationAddress           String\n  logo                      String              @default(\"https://encrypted-tbn0.gstatic.com/images?q=tbn:ANd9GcSIC25nqru3yN9lhtoTwdBWt_u0QlOcPzw3Bw\u0026s\")\n  timezone                  String\n  createdAt                 DateTime            @default(now())\n  updatedAt                 DateTime            @updatedAt\n  ownerId                   String\n  announcements             Announcement[]\n  contents                  Content[]\n  devices                   Device[]\n  donations                 Donation[]\n  donationCategories        DonationCategory[]\n  events                    Event[]\n  flyers                    Flyer[]\n  iqamahTimings             IqamahTiming[]\n  kioskInstances            KioskInstance[]\n  owner                     User                @relation(fields: [ownerId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjidInvites             MasjidInvite[]      @relation(\"MasjidInviteToMasjid\")\n  masjidProducts            MasjidProduct[]\n  Orders                    Orders[]\n  prayerCalculation         PrayerCalculation[]\n  prayerTimes               PrayerTime[]\n  tvDisplays                TVDisplay[]\n  themes                    Theme[]\n  users                     User[]              @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n}\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model DonationCategory {\n  id                    String     @id @default(cuid())\n  name                  String\n  description           String?\n  color                 String     @default(\"#550C18\")\n  icon                  String?\n  defaultAmounts        String?\n  min                   Int        @default(1)\n  max                   Int        @default(10000)\n  restricted            Boolean    @default(false)\n  active                Boolean    @default(true)\n  order                 Int        @default(0)\n  masjidId              String\n  createdAt             DateTime   @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime   @updatedAt\n  allowAnonymous        Boolean    @default(false)\n  allowComments         Boolean    @default(false)\n  allowCustomAmount     Boolean    @default(true)\n  allowPledge           Boolean    @default(false)\n  amountDonated         Int        @default(0)\n  amountsPerInterval    Json?\n  appreciation          String?\n  collectAddress        Boolean    @default(false)\n  collectPhone          Boolean    @default(false)\n  complianceText        String?\n  coverFee              Boolean    @default(false)\n  coverFeeDefault       Boolean    @default(false)\n  ctaMessage            String?\n  customLabel           String?\n  defaultInterval       String?\n  designations          String[]\n  enableAppleGooglePay  Boolean    @default(false)\n  enforceMax            Boolean    @default(false)\n  excludeFromReceipts   Boolean    @default(false)\n  featured              Boolean    @default(false)\n  featuredImage         String?\n  goalAmount            Int?\n  headerBgColor         String?\n  hideTitle             Boolean    @default(false)\n  intervals             String[]\n  logo                  String?\n  mailingListOptIn      Boolean    @default(false)\n  quickDonate           Boolean    @default(false)\n  recurringCountOptions Int[]\n  redirectUrl           String?\n  showLogo              Boolean    @default(true)\n  showOnKiosk           Boolean    @default(true)\n",

        "originalContents": "model DonationCategory {\n  id                    String     @id @default(cuid())\n  name                  String\n  description           String?\n  color                 String     @default(\"#550C18\")\n  icon                  String?\n  defaultAmounts        String?\n  min                   Int        @default(1)\n  max                   Int        @default(10000)\n  restricted            Boolean    @default(false)\n  active                Boolean    @default(true)\n  order                 Int        @default(0)\n  masjidId              String\n  createdAt             DateTime   @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime   @updatedAt\n  allowAnonymous        Boolean    @default(false)\n  allowComments         Boolean    @default(false)\n  allowCustomAmount     Boolean    @default(true)\n  allowPledge           Boolean    @default(false)\n  amountDonated         Int        @default(0)\n  amountsPerInterval    Json?\n  appreciation          String?\n  collectAddress        Boolean    @default(false)\n  collectPhone          Boolean    @default(false)\n  complianceText        String?\n  coverFee              Boolean    @default(false)\n  coverFeeDefault       Boolean    @default(false)\n  ctaMessage            String?\n  customLabel           String?\n  defaultInterval       String?\n  designations          String[]\n  enableAppleGooglePay  Boolean    @default(false)\n  enforceMax            Boolean    @default(false)\n  excludeFromReceipts   Boolean    @default(false)\n  featured              Boolean    @default(false)\n  featuredImage         String?\n  goalAmount            Int?\n  headerBgColor         String?\n  hideTitle             Boolean    @default(false)\n  intervals             String[]\n  logo                  String?\n  mailingListOptIn      Boolean    @default(false)\n  quickDonate           Boolean    @default(false)\n  recurringCountOptions Int[]\n  redirectUrl           String?\n  showLogo              Boolean    @default(true)\n  showOnKiosk           Boolean    @default(true)\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\nfu\n\n  ...\n\n  function addSlide(type: SlideConfig[\"type\"]) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = [\n        ...prev,\n        { type, template: \"modern\", theme: { ...defaultTheme } },\n      ];\n      setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n    toast({ title: \"Slide added\", description: &#96;Added a ${type} slide.&#96; });\n  }\n\n  function updateSlide(index: number, newSlide: SlideConfig) {\n    setSlides(slides.map((s, i) =\u003e (i === index ? newSlide : s)));\n  }\n\n  function removeSlide(index: number) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = prev.filter((_, i) =\u003e i !== index);\n      if (selectedIndex \u003e= newSlides.length) setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n    toast({ title: \"Slide removed\" });\n  }\n\n  function onDragEnd(result: DropResult) {\n    if (!result.destination) return;\n    const reordered = Array.from(slides);\n    const [removed] = reordered.splice(result.source.index, 1);\n    reordered.splice(result.destination.index, 0, removed);\n    setSlides(reordered);\n    setSelectedIndex(result.destination.index);\n  }\n\n  function saveConfig() {\n    fetch(\"/api/masjids/abc123/signage-config\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: JSON.stringify({ slides }),\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    }).then(() =\u003e {\n      toast({ title: \"Saved!\", description: \"Signage config updated.\" });\n    });\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"max-w",

        "originalContents": "\n  function addSlide(type: SlideConfig[\"type\"]) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = [\n        ...prev,\n        { type, template: \"modern\", theme: { ...defaultTheme } },\n      ];\n      setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n    toast({ title: \"Slide added\", description: &#96;Added a ${type} slide.&#96; });\n  }\n\n  function updateSlide(index: number, newSlide: SlideConfig) {\n    setSlides(slides.map((s, i) =\u003e (i === index ? newSlide : s)));\n  }\n\n  function removeSlide(index: number) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = prev.filter((_, i) =\u003e i !== index);\n      if (selectedIndex \u003e= newSlides.length) setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n    toast({ title: \"Slide removed\" });\n  }\n\n  function onDragEnd(result: DropResult) {\n    if (!result.destination) return;\n    const reordered = Array.from(slides);\n    const [removed] = reordered.splice(result.source.index, 1);\n    reordered.splice(result.destination.index, 0, removed);\n    setSlides(reordered);\n    setSelectedIndex(result.destination.index);\n  }\n\n  function saveConfig() {\n    fetch(\"/api/masjids/abc123/signage-config\", {\n      method: \"POST\",\n      body: JSON.stringify({ slides }),\n      headers: { \"Content-Type\": \"application/json\" },\n    }).then(() =\u003e {\n      toast({ title: \"Saved!\", description: \"Signage config updated.\" });\n    });\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"max-w",

        "contents": "  subtitle              String?\n  donations             Donation[]\n  masjid                Masjid     @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Donation {\n  id              String           @id @default(cuid())\n  amount          Int\n  donorName       String?\n  donorEmail      String?\n  masjidId        String\n  categoryId      String\n  kioskInstanceId String?\n  status          String           @default(\"pending\")\n  paymentMethod   String\n  transactionId   String?\n  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt       DateTime         @updatedAt\n  category        DonationCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  kioskInstance   KioskInstance?   @relation(fields: [kioskInstanceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid          Masjid           @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel TVDisplay {\n  id                String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId          String\n  name              String\n  location          String?\n  isActive          Boolean        @default(true)\n  lastSeen          DateTime?\n  ipAddress         String?\n  status            String         @default(\"offline\")\n  layout            String?\n  config            Json?\n  assignedContentId String?\n  createdAt         DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt         DateTime       @updatedAt\n  code              String?\n  orderId           String?\n  assignedContent   Content?         "originalContents": "  subtitle              String?\n  donations             Donation[]\n  masjid                Masjid     @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Donation {\n  id              String           @id @default(cuid())\n  amount          Int\n  donorName       String?\n  donorEmail      String?\n  masjidId        String\n  categoryId      String\n  kioskInstanceId String?\n  status          String           @default(\"pending\")\n  paymentMethod   String\n  transactionId   String?\n  createdAt       DateTime         @default(now())\n  updatedAt       DateTime         @updatedAt\n  category        DonationCategory @relation(fields: [categoryId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  kioskInstance   KioskInstance?   @relation(fields: [kioskInstanceId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid          Masjid           @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel TVDisplay {\n  id                String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId          String\n  name              String\n  location          String?\n  isActive          Boolean        @default(true)\n  lastSeen          DateTime?\n  ipAddress         String?\n  status            String         @default(\"offline\")\n  layout            String?\n  config            Json?\n  assignedContentId String?\n  createdAt         DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt         DateTime       @updatedAt\n  code              String?\n  orderId           String?\n  assignedContent   Content?       @relation(\"AssignedContent\", fields: [assignedContentId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid            Masjid         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  Orders            Orders?        @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  announcements     Announcement[] @relation(\"AnnouncementToTVDisplay\")\n  displayedContent  Content[]      @relation(\"DisplayContent\")\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport * as React from \"react\"\nimport * as RechartsPrimitive from \"recharts\"\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\"\n\n// Format: { THEME_NAME: CSS_SELECTOR }\nconst THEMES = { light: \"\", dark: \".dark\" } as const\n\nexport type ChartConfig = {\n  [k in string]: {\n    label?: React.ReactNode\n    icon?: React.ComponentType\n  } \u0026 (\n    | { color?: string; theme?: never }\n    | { color?: never; theme: Record\u003ckeyof typeof THEMES, string\u003e }\n  )\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport * as React from \"react\"\nimport * as RechartsPrimitive from \"recharts\"\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\"\n\n// Format: { THEME_NAME: CSS_SELECTOR }\nconst THEMES = { light: \"\", dark: \".dark\" } as const\n\nexport type ChartConfig = {\n  [k in string]: {\n    label?: React.ReactNode\n    icon?: React.ComponentType\n  } \u0026 (\n    | { color?: string; theme?: never }\n    | { color?: never; theme: Record\u003ckeyof typeof THEMES, string\u003e }\n  )\n}",
