```json
        "contents": "model Event {\n  id                    String    @id @default(cuid())\n  title                 String\n  date                  DateTime\n  timeStart             DateTime\n  timeEnd               DateTime\n  location              String\n  description           String\n  type                  String\n  tagColor              String\n  masjidId              String\n  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt\n  syncToGoogleCalendar  Boolean   @default(false)\n  googleCalendarEventId String?\n  lastSyncedAt          DateTime?\n  syncStatus            String?\n  flyerUrl              String?\n  tvFlyerUrl            String?\n  recurrence            Json?\n  masjid                Masjid    @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id               String             @id\n  name             String\n  email            String             @unique\n  emailVerified    Boolean\n  image            String?\n  createdAt        DateTime\n  updatedAt        DateTime\n  admin            Boolean            @default(false)\n  role             String             @default(\"user\")\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  masjidInvitedTo  MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\")\n  masjidInvites    MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\")\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  systemLogs       SystemLog[]\n  accounts         Account[]\n  sessions         Session[]\n  masjids          Masjid[]           @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n\n  @@map(\"user\")\n}\n\nmodel Session {\n  id        String   @id\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  token     String   @unique\n  createdAt DateTime\n  updatedAt DateTime\n  ipAddress String?\n  userAgent String?\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"session\")\n}\n\n",

 timeEnd               DateTime\n  location              String\n  description           String\n  type                  String\n  tagColor              String\n  masjidId              String\n  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt\n  syncToGoogleCalendar  Boolean   @default(false)\n  googleCalendarEventId String?\n  lastSyncedAt          DateTime?\n  syncStatus            String?\n  flyerUrl              String?\n  tvFlyerUrl            String?\n  recurrence            Json?\n  masjid                Masjid    @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id               String             @id\n  name             String\n  email            String             @unique\n  emailVerified    Boolean\n  image            String?\n  createdAt        DateTime\n  updatedAt        DateTime\n  admin            Boolean            @default(false)\n  role             String             @default(\"user\")\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  masjidInvitedTo  MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\")\n         "contents": "model Content {\n  id                 String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId           String\n  title              String\n  description        String\n  type               ContentType\n  url                String?\n  data               Json?\n  startDate          DateTime?\n  endDate            DateTime?\n  startTime          String?\n  endTime            String?\n  duration           String?\n  dayType            String?\n  timeType           String?\n  zones              String\n  active             Boolean        @default(true)\n  createdAt          DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime       @updatedAt\n  displayLocations   String[]\n  fullscreen         Boolean\n  announcements      Announcement[]\n  masjid             Masjid         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  assignedToDisplays TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"AssignedContent\")\n  displays           TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"DisplayContent\")\n}\n\nmodel Announcement {\n  id               String      @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId         String\n  title            String\n  content          String\n  type             String\n  fullscreen       Boolean     @default(true)\n  startDate        DateTime\n  endDate          DateTime\n  zones            String\n  active           Boolean     @default(true)\n  createdAt        DateTime    @default(now())\n  displayLocations String[]\n  updatedAt        DateTime    @updatedAt\n  contentItemId    String?\n  contentItem      Content?    @relation(fields: [contentItemId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid           Masjid      @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  displays         TVDisplay[] @relation(\"AnnouncementToTVDisplay\")\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "model Content {\n  id                 String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId           String\n  title              String\n  description        String\n  type               ContentType\n  url                String?\n  data               Json?\n  startDate          DateTime?\n  endDate            DateTime?\n  startTime          String?\n  endTime            String?\n  duration           String?\n  dayType            String?\n  timeType           String?\n  zones              String\n  active             Boolean        @default(true)\n  createdAt          DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime       @updatedAt\n  displayLocations   String[]\n  fullscreen         Boolean\n  announcements      Announcement[]\n  masjid             Masjid         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  assignedToDisplays TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"AssignedContent\")\n  displays           TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"DisplayContent\")\n}\n\nmodel Announcement {\n  id               String      @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId         String\n  title            String\n  content          String\n  type             String\n  fullscreen       Boolean     @default(true)\n  startDate        DateTime\n  endDate          DateTime\n  zones            String\n  active           Boolean     @default(true)\n  createdAt        DateTime    @default(now())\n  displayLocations String[]\n  updatedAt        DateTime    @updatedAt\n  contentItemId    String?\n  contentItem      Content?    @relation(fields: [contentItemId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid           Masjid      @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  displays         TVDisplay[] @relation(\"AnnouncementToTVDisplay\")\n}\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model MasjidInvite {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  userId      String\n  invitedById String\n  status      String    @default(\"pending\")\n  token       String\n  expiresAt   DateTime\n  joinDate    DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n  invitedBy   User      @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\", fields: [invitedById], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid      Masjid    @relation(\"MasjidInviteToMasjid\", fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user        User      @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel SystemLog {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  action     String\n  entityType String\n  entityId   String\n  userId     String\n  details    String?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  user       User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([entityType, entityId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nenum DiscountType {\n  percentage\n  fixed\n}\n\nenum ContentType {\n  image\n  video\n  countdown\n  announcement\n  website\n  predesigned\n  google_calendar\n  daily_verse\n  daily_hadith\n  daily_dua\n  ramadan_countdown\n  eid_countdown\n  days_countdown\n  taraweeh_timings\n  iqamah_timings\n}\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 487,
            "text": "model MasjidInvite {"

        "originalContents": "model MasjidInvite {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  userId      String\n  invitedById String\n  status      String    @default(\"pending\")\n  token       String\n  expiresAt   DateTime\n  joinDate    DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n  invitedBy   User      @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\", fields: [invitedById], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid      Masjid    @relation(\"MasjidInviteToMasjid\", fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user        User      @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel SystemLog {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  action     String\n  entityType String\n  entityId   String\n  userId     String\n  details    String?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  user       User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([entityType, entityId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nenum DiscountType {\n  percentage\n  fixed\n}\n\nenum ContentType {\n  image\n  video\n  countdown\n  announcement\n  website\n  predesigned\n  google_calendar\n  daily_verse\n  daily_hadith\n  daily_dua\n  ramadan_countdown\n  eid_countdown\n  days_countdown\n  taraweeh_timings\n  iqamah_timings\n}\n",
        "range": {

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\nmodel Verification {\n  id         String    @id\n  identifier String\n  value      String\n  expiresAt  DateTime\n  createdAt  DateTime?\n  updatedAt  DateTime?\n\n  @@map(\"verification\")\n}\n\nmodel CheckoutSessions {\n  id           String   @id\n  userId       String\n  sessionId    String\n  paymentType  String\n  completed    String\n  cart         String\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  shippingData Json?\n  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Orders {\n  id              String          @id\n  userId          String\n  stripeSessionId String?\n  status          String\n  cart            String\n  trackingNumber  String?\n  createdAt       DateTime        @default(now())\n  masjidId        String?\n  meta_data       Json?\n  MizanTv         MizanTv[]\n  masjid          Masjid?         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user            User            @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  TVDisplay       TVDisplay[]\n  KioskInstance   KioskInstance[]\n}\n\nmodel MizanTv {\n  id         String @id\n  userId     String\n  orderId    String\n  accessCode String\n  order      Orders @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user       User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "model Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\nmodel Verification {\n  id         String    @id\n  identifier String\n  value      String\n  expiresAt  DateTime\n  createdAt  DateTime?\n  updatedAt  DateTime?\n\n  @@map(\"verification\")\n}\n\nmodel CheckoutSessions {\n  id           String   @id\n  userId       String\n  sessionId    String\n  paymentType  String\n  completed    String\n  cart         String\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  shippingData Json?\n  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Orders {\n  id              String          @id\n  userId          String\n  stripeSessionId String?\n  status          String\n  cart            String\n  trackingNumber  String?\n  createdAt       DateTime        @default(now())\n  masjidId        String?\n  meta_data       Json?\n  MizanTv         MizanTv[]\n  masjid          Masjid?         "contents": "{\n  \"$schema\": \"https://ui.shadcn.com/schema.json\",\n  \"style\": \"default\",\n  \"rsc\": true,\n  \"tsx\": true,\n  \"tailwind\": {\n    \"config\": \"tailwind.config.ts\",\n    \"css\": \"app/globals.css\",\n    \"baseColor\": \"neutral\",\n    \"cssVariables\": true,\n    \"prefix\": \"\"\n  },\n  \"aliases\": {\n    \"components\": \"@/components\",\n    \"utils\": \"@/lib/utils\",\n    \"ui\": \"@/components/ui\",\n    \"lib\": \"@/lib\",\n    \"hooks\": \"@/hooks\"\n  },\n  \"iconLibrary\": \"lucide\"\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "{"

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  meta_data              Json?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  meta_data              Json?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",

        "contents": "/*\n  Warnings:\n\n  - You are about to drop the column &#96;recurring&#96; on the &#96;DonationCategory&#96; table. All the data in the column will be lost.\n\n*/\n-- CreateEnum\nCREATE TYPE \"ContentType\" AS ENUM ('image', 'video', 'countdown', 'announcement', 'website', 'predesigned', 'google_calendar', 'daily_verse', 'daily_hadith', 'daily_dua', 'ramadan_countdown', 'eid_countdown', 'days_countdown', 'taraweeh_timings', 'iqamah_timings');\n\n-- DropIndex\nDROP INDEX \"DonationCategory_masjidId_idx\";\n\n-- AlterTable\nALTER TABLE \"DonationCategory\" DROP COLUMN \"recurring\",\nADD COLUMN     \"allowAnonymous\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"allowComments\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"allowCustomAmount\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT true,\nADD COLUMN     \"allowPledge\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"amountDonated\" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 0,\nADD COLUMN     \"amountsPerInterval\" JSONB,\nADD COLUMN     \"appreciation\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"collectAddress\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"collectPhone\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"complianceText\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"coverFee\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"coverFeeDefault\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"ctaMessage\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"customLabel\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"defaultInterval\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"designations\" TEXT[],\nADD COLUMN     \"enableAppleGooglePay\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"enforceMax\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"excludeFromReceipts\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"featured\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"featuredImage\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"goalAmount\" INTEGER,\nADD COLUMN     \"headerBgColor\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"hideTitle\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"intervals\" TEXT[],\nADD COLUMN     \"logo\" TEXT,\nADD COLUMN     \"mailingListOptIn\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\nADD COLUMN     \"quickDonate\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\n",

        "contents": "{\n  \"name\": \"mizan-management-frontend\",\n  \"version\": \"0.3\",\n  \"private\": true,\n  \"scripts\": {\n    \"dev\": \"prisma generate \u0026\u0026 next dev\",\n    \"build\": \"next build\",\n    \"start\": \"next start\",\n    \"lint\": \"next lint\"\n  },\n  \"dependencies\": {\n    \"@better-auth/stripe\": \"^1.2.7\",\n    \"@bprogress/next\": \"^3.2.12\",\n    \"@dnd-kit/core\": \"^6.3.1\",\n    \"@dnd-kit/modifiers\": \"^9.0.0\",\n    \"@dnd-kit/sortable\": \"^10.0.0\",\n    \"@dnd-kit/utilities\": \"^3.2.2\",\n    \"@easypost/api\": \"^8.1.0\",\n    \"@fullcalendar/core\": \"^6.1.17\",\n    \"@fullcalendar/daygrid\": \"^6.1.17\",\n    \"@fullcalendar/interaction\": \"^6.1.17\",\n    \"@fullcalendar/react\": \"^6.1.17\",\n    \"@fullcalendar/timegrid\": \"^6.1.17\",\n    \"@hookform/resolvers\": \"^3.9.1\",\n    \"@prisma/client\": \"^6.5.0\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-accordion\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-alert-dialog\": \"^1.1.6\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-aspect-ratio\": \"^1.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-avatar\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-checkbox\": \"^1.1.3\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-collapsible\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-context-menu\": \"^2.2.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-dialog\": \"^1.1.6\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-dropdown-menu\": \"^2.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-hover-card\": \"^1.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-label\": \"^2.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-menubar\": \"^1.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-navigation-menu\": \"^1.2.3\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-popover\": \"^1.1.6\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-progress\": \"latest\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-radio-group\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-scroll-area\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-select\": \"^2.1.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-separator\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-slider\": \"^1.2.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-slot\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-switch\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-tabs\": \"^1.1.2\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-toast\": \"^1.2.4\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-toggle\": \"^1.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-toggle-group\": \"^1.1.1\",\n    \"@radix-ui/react-tooltip\": \"^1.1.8\",\n    \"@square/web-sdk\": \"^2.1.0\",\n    \"@stripe/react-stripe-js\": \"^3.6.0\",\n",

        "contents": "import type { Config } from \"tailwindcss\"\nimport { withUt } from \"uploadthing/tw\";\n\nconst config = {\n  darkMode: [\"class\"],\n  content: [\n    \"./pages/**/*.{ts,tsx}\",\n    \"./components/**/*.{ts,tsx}\",\n    \"./app/**/*.{ts,tsx}\",\n    \"./src/**/*.{ts,tsx}\",\n    \"*.{js,ts,jsx,tsx,mdx}\",\n  ],\n  prefix: \"\",\n  theme: {\n  \tcontainer: {\n  \t\tcenter: true,\n  \t\tpadding: '2rem',\n  \t\tscreens: {\n  \t\t\t'2xl': '1400px'\n  \t\t}\n  \t},\n  \textend: {\n  \t\tcolors: {\n  \t\t\tborder: 'hsl(var(--border))',\n  \t\t\tinput: 'hsl(var(--input))',\n  \t\t\tring: 'hsl(var(--ring))',\n  \t\t\tbackground: 'hsl(var(--background))',\n  \t\t\tforeground: 'hsl(var(--foreground))',\n  \t\t\tprimary: {\n       "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "ALTER TABLE \"_AnnouncementToTVDisplay\" ADD CONSTRAINT \"_AnnouncementToTVDisplay_AB_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"A\", \"B\");\n\n-- DropIndex\nDROP INDEX \"_AnnouncementToTVDisplay_AB_unique\";\n\n-- AlterTable\nALTER TABLE \"_DisplayContent\" ADD CONSTRAINT \"_DisplayContent_AB_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"A\", \"B\");\n\n-- DropIndex\nDROP INDEX \"_DisplayContent_AB_unique\";\n\n-- AlterTable\nALTER TABLE \"_MasjidUsers\" ADD CONSTRAINT \"_MasjidUsers_AB_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"A\", \"B\");\n\n-- DropIndex\nDROP INDEX \"_MasjidUsers_AB_unique\";\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"MasjidInvite\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"masjidId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"invitedById\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"status\" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',\n    \"token\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"expiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"joinDate\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"MasjidInvite_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"SystemLog\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"action\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"entityType\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"entityId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"details\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"SystemLog_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateIndex\nCREATE INDEX \"SystemLog_userId_idx\" ON \"SystemLog\"(\"userId\");\n\n-- CreateIndex\nCREATE INDEX \"SystemLog_entityType_entityId_idx\" ON \"SystemLog\"(\"entityType\", \"entityId\");\n\n-- CreateIndex\nCREATE INDEX \"SystemLog_createdAt_idx\" ON \"SystemLog\"(\"createdAt\");\n\n-- AddForeignKey\nALTER TABLE \"Device\" ADD CONSTRAINT \"Device_masjidId_fkey\" FOREIGN KEY (\"masjidId\") REFERENCES \"Masjid\"(\"id\") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;\n\n-- AddForeignKey\nALTER TABLE \"Device\" ADD CONSTRAINT \"Device_currentThemeId_fkey\" FOREIGN KEY (\"currentThemeId\") REFERENCES \"Theme\"(\"id\") ON DELETE CASCADE ON UPDATE CASCADE;\n\n-- AddForeignKey\n",
```

_**Agent**_

There is **no signage config field or model** in your current Prisma schema.  
**Recommended approach:**  
- Add a new model called `SignageConfig` with a `masjidId` (relation to Masjid) and a `config` (JSON) field.

---

## **Prisma Schema Addition**

Add this to your `schema.prisma`:

```prisma
model SignageConfig {
  id        String   @id @default(cuid())
  masjidId  String   @unique
  config    Json
  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt
  masjid    Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)
}
```

- This ensures each masjid can have one signage config.
- The config is stored as JSON.

---

**Please add this to your schema and run `prisma migrate dev` or `prisma db push`.  
Let me know when it’s done, and I’ll generate the API route code for `/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config`.**

---

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: app/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config/route.ts</summary>

Create an API route for GET and POST to fetch and update the signage config for a masjid from the SignageConfig table. Use Prisma. GET returns config or empty array if not set. POST upserts config. Assume req.body is { slides: ... }.

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 36, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,36 @@
- 
+ import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
+ import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
+ 
+ export async function GET(
+   req: NextRequest,
+   { params }: { params: { masjidId: string } }
+ ) {
+   const { masjidId } = params;
+   try {
+     const signageConfig = await prisma.signageConfig.findUnique({
+       where: { masjidId },
+     });
+     return NextResponse.json(signageConfig?.config || { slides: [] });
+   } catch (error) {
+     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to fetch signage config' }, { status: 500 });
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ export async function POST(
+   req: NextRequest,
+   { params }: { params: { masjidId: string } }
+ ) {
+   const { masjidId } = params;
+   try {
+     const body = await req.json();
+     const config = body;
+     const signageConfig = await prisma.signageConfig.upsert({
+       where: { masjidId },
+       update: { config },
+       create: { masjidId, config },
+     });
+     return NextResponse.json(signageConfig.config);
+   } catch (error) {
+     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to save signage config' }, { status: 500 });
+   }
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

_**Agent**_

Your API route is now set up at `/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config`:

- **GET**: Returns the signage config JSON for the masjid, or `{ slides: [] }` if not set.
- **POST**: Upserts the signage config for the masjid (saves whatever is sent in the body).

**You can now connect your frontend signage editor to this endpoint for full CRUD!**

_**Agent (2025-06-15 22:43:02Z)**_

You are seeing this error:

```
Error: You cannot use different slug names for the same dynamic path ('id' !== 'masjidId').
```

**What this means:**  
Next.js does not allow you to have two dynamic route segments in the same directory level with different names that refer to the same parameter. For example, you cannot have both:

- `app/api/masjids/[id]/signage-config/route.ts`
- `app/api/masjids/[masjidId]/signage-config/route.ts`

in your project, or any other dynamic routes at the same level that use `[id]` and `[masjidId]` for the same path segment.

---

## **How to Fix**

1. **Standardize your dynamic segment name.**
   - Pick either `[id]` or `[masjidId]` and use it everywhere for that path segment.
   - For your signage config API, since you used `[masjidId]`, make sure all other routes under `/api/masjids/` use `[masjidId]` as well.

2. **Rename any conflicting folders/files.**
   - If you have `app/api/masjids/[id]/...`, rename the `[id]` folder to `[masjidId]` (or vice versa, but be consistent).

---

### **Example Directory Structure (Correct):**

```
app/
  api/
    masjids/
      [masjidId]/
        signage-config/
          route.ts
        other-endpoint/
          route.ts
```

---

### **What to do next:**

- Search your `app/api/masjids/` directory for any `[id]` folders and rename them to `[masjidId]` (or the other way around, but be consistent).
- Make sure all your dynamic route segments for masjid use the same name.

---

**Let me know if you want me to check and propose the exact rename for you!**  
Or, if you want to proceed with the display app signage rendering code, just confirm and I’ll generate that next.

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,154 @@
- 
+ "use client";
+ 
+ import { useState } from "react";
+ import { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from "@/components/ui/card";
+ import { Input } from "@/components/ui/input";
+ import { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from "@/components/ui/select";
+ import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";
+ import { cn } from "@/lib/utils";
+ import { DragDropContext, Droppable, Draggable, DropResult } from "react-beautiful-dnd";
+ 
+ export type SlideConfig = {
+   type: "prayerTimes" | "announcements" | "custom";
+   template: string;
+   theme?: {
+     primary?: string;
+     background?: string;
+     text?: string;
+     accent?: string;
+     font?: string;
+     [key: string]: string | undefined;
+   };
+   content?: Record&lt;string, any&gt;;
+ };
+ 
+ const slideTypes = [
+   { value: "prayerTimes", label: "Prayer Times" },
+   { value: "announcements", label: "Announcements" },
+   { value: "custom", label: "Custom" },
+ ];
+ 
+ const templates = [
+   { value: "modern", label: "Modern" },
+   { value: "classic", label: "Classic" },
+ ];
+ 
+ const defaultTheme = {
+   primary: "#550C18",
+   background: "#fff",
+   text: "#222",
+   accent: "#78001A",
+   font: "Philosopher",
+ };
+ 
+ const fontFamilies = [
+   { value: 'Philosopher', label: 'Philosopher' },
+   { value: 'Roboto', label: 'Roboto' },
+   { value: 'Inter', label: 'Inter' },
+   { value: 'Arial', label: 'Arial' },
+   { value: 'Georgia', label: 'Georgia' },
+ ];
+ 
+ function SlidePreview({ slide }: { slide: SlideConfig }) {
+   return (
+     &lt;div
+       className="rounded-lg border p-6 flex flex-col items-center justify-center"
+       style={{
+         background: slide.theme?.background || defaultTheme.background,
+         color: slide.theme?.primary || defaultTheme.primary,
+         minHeight: 180,
+       }}
+     &gt;
+       {slide.type === "prayerTimes" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="text-center"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="text-lg font-bold mb-2"&gt;Prayer Times&lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="text-sm opacity-70"&gt;(Preview)&lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+       {slide.type === "announcements" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="text-center"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="text-lg font-bold mb-2"&gt;Announcements&lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="text-sm opacity-70"&gt;(Preview)&lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+       {slide.type === "custom" &amp;&amp; (
+         &lt;div className="text-center"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="text-lg font-bold mb-2"&gt;{slide.content?.title || "Custom Slide"}&lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="text-base opacity-70"&gt;{slide.content?.subtitle || "(Preview)"}&lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+       )}
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ export default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[] }) {
+   const [slides, setSlides] = useState&lt;SlideConfig[]&gt;(initialSlides);
+   const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState&lt;number&gt;(0);
+ 
+   function onDragEnd(result: DropResult) {
+     if (!result.destination) return;
+     const reordered = Array.from(slides);
+     const [removed] = reordered.splice(result.source.index, 1);
+     reordered.splice(result.destination.index, 0, removed);
+     setSlides(reordered);
+     setSelectedIndex(result.destination.index);
+   }
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div className="max-w-4xl mx-auto p-8 grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 gap-8"&gt;
+       &lt;div&gt;
+         &lt;h1 className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#550C18] mb-6"&gt;Signage Slides&lt;/h1&gt;
+         &lt;DragDropContext onDragEnd={onDragEnd}&gt;
+           &lt;Droppable droppableId="slides"&gt;
+             {(provided) =&gt; (
+               &lt;div ref={provided.innerRef} {...provided.droppableProps} className="space-y-4"&gt;
+                 {slides.map((slide, i) =&gt; (
+                   &lt;Draggable key={i} draggableId={i.toString()} index={i}&gt;
+                     {(provided, snapshot) =&gt; (
+                       &lt;Card
+                         ref={provided.innerRef}
+                         {...provided.draggableProps}
+                         className={cn(
+                           "relative group border-[#550C18]/20 cursor-pointer transition-shadow",
+                           selectedIndex === i &amp;&amp; "ring-2 ring-[#550C18]"
+                         )}
+                         onClick={() =&gt; setSelectedIndex(i)}
+                         style={{ ...provided.draggableProps.style }}
+                       &gt;
+                         &lt;CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between pb-2"&gt;
+                           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+                             &lt;div {...provided.dragHandleProps} title="Drag to reorder"&gt;
+                               &lt;span className="inline-block align-middle"&gt;
+                                 &lt;svg width="18" height="18" fill="#550C18" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;&lt;circle cx="5" cy="5" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="19" cy="5" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="5" cy="12" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="19" cy="12" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="5" cy="19" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="12" cy="19" r="2"/&gt;&lt;circle cx="19" cy="19" r="2"/&gt;&lt;/svg&gt;
+                               &lt;/span&gt;
+                             &lt;/div&gt;
+                             &lt;Badge className="bg-[#550C18]/10 text-[#550C18]"&gt;
+                               {slideTypes.find((t) =&gt; t.value === slide.type)?.label}
+                             &lt;/Badge&gt;
+                             &lt;span className="text-xs text-[#3A3A3A]/60 ml-2"&gt;
+                               {templates.find((t) =&gt; t.value === slide.template)?.label}
+                             &lt;/span&gt;
+                           &lt;/div&gt;
+                         &lt;/CardHeader&gt;
+                       &lt;/Card&gt;
+                     )}
+                   &lt;/Draggable&gt;
+                 ))}
+                 {provided.placeholder}
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             )}
+           &lt;/Droppable&gt;
+         &lt;/DragDropContext&gt;
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+       {/* Slide Preview */}
+       &lt;div&gt;
+         {slides[selectedIndex] &amp;&amp; (
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;span className="font-semibold text-[#550C18] mb-2 block"&gt;Live Preview&lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;SlidePreview slide={slides[selectedIndex]} /&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+         )}
+       &lt;/div&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ } 
```

_**Agent (2025-06-15 23:39:31Z)**_

The error:

```
Invariant failed: isCombineEnabled must be a boolean
```

is caused by a **mismatch in the props** passed to the `Droppable` component from `react-beautiful-dnd`.  
This usually happens if you pass an unexpected prop (like `isDropDisabled={false}`) or if the library version is mismatched.

---

## **How to Fix**

- **Remove the `isDropDisabled={false}` prop** from your `<Droppable>` component unless you specifically need it and are sure of the version.
- The correct usage for a basic droppable is:
  ```tsx
  <Droppable droppableId="slides">
    {(provided) => (
      <div ref={provided.innerRef} {...provided.droppableProps}>
        {/* ... */}
      </div>
    )}
  </Droppable>
  ```
- If you want to disable dropping, use `isDropDisabled={true}` (not `false`), but for most use cases, just omit it.

---

## **Action:**
**Edit your code to:**
```tsx
<Droppable droppableId="slides">
  {(provided) => (
    <div ref={provided.innerRef} {...provided.droppableProps}>
      {/* ... */}
    </div>
  )}
</Droppable>
```

---

If you want, I can edit the file for you—just let me know the exact path (e.g., `app/dashboard/tv-displays/signage-config/SignageConfig.tsx`) and I’ll make the fix!

_**Agent (2025-06-15 23:49:37Z)**_

You are still seeing:

```
Invariant failed: isCombineEnabled must be a boolean
```

even after removing `isDropDisabled={false}`.  
This error is almost always caused by one of the following:

---

## 1. **Multiple Versions of react-beautiful-dnd**
- If you have more than one version installed (e.g., in both root and a subfolder, or via a dependency), this error can occur.
- **Solution:** Run:
  ```sh
  npm ls react-beautiful-dnd
  ```
  or
  ```sh
  pnpm ls react-beautiful-dnd
  ```
  Make sure only one version is installed.

---

## 2. **Incorrect Import or Build Cache**
- Sometimes, a stale build or incorrect import can cause this.
- **Solution:** Delete `.next`, `node_modules`, and lockfile, then reinstall:
  ```sh
  rm -rf node_modules .next pnpm-lock.yaml # or package-lock.json/yarn.lock
  pnpm install # or npm install/yarn install
  ```

---

## 3. **Incorrect Usage of Droppable/Draggable**
- Make sure you are not passing any unexpected props to `<Droppable>` or `<Draggable>`.
- The only required prop for `<Droppable>` is `droppableId`.

---

## 4. **TypeScript Types**
- If you are using TypeScript, and you see errors about missing types, install:
  ```sh
  pnpm add -D @types/react-beautiful-dnd
  ```
  or the npm/yarn equivalent.

---

## 5. **Check for Custom Wrappers**
- If you have a custom wrapper or HOC around `Droppable` or `Draggable`, make sure it is not injecting any unexpected props.

---

## 6. **Check for Old/Corrupt Version**
- Make sure you are using a supported version of `react-beautiful-dnd` for your React version.

---

### **What to do next:**

1. **Double-check your `<Droppable>` and `<Draggable>` usage:**  
   - Only use supported props.
   - No `isDropDisabled` unless you want to disable dropping (and then it must be a boolean).

2. **Check for multiple versions:**  
   - Run `pnpm ls react-beautiful-dnd` and ensure only one version is present.

3. **Clear node_modules and reinstall:**  
   - Run the clean install commands above.

4. **Install types if using TypeScript:**  
   - `pnpm add -D @types/react-beautiful-dnd`

---

If you want, I can propose the exact terminal commands for you to run, or review your full component code for any other issues.  
**Let me know how you want to proceed!**

---

Great choice! `dnd-kit` is modern, maintained, and more flexible than `react-beautiful-dnd`.

**Here’s what I’ll do:**
- Refactor your signage slides drag-and-drop UI to use `@dnd-kit/core` and `@dnd-kit/sortable`.
- The UI/UX will remain the same (drag to reorder, select to preview/edit).
- No more `react-beautiful-dnd` errors or warnings.

---

**Let’s proceed:**

1. **Update dependencies:**  
   You already have `@dnd-kit/core` and `@dnd-kit/sortable` in your `package.json` (from earlier context). If not, run:
   ```sh
   pnpm add @dnd-kit/core @dnd-kit/sortable
   ```

```diff
@@ -81,16 +94,36 @@
    );
  }
+ 
+ function SortableSlide({ id, children, selected, onClick }: { id: string; children: React.ReactNode; selected: boolean; onClick: () =&gt; void }) {
+   const { attributes, listeners, setNodeRef, transform, transition, isDragging } = useSortable({ id });
+   const style = {
+     transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
+     transition,
+     zIndex: isDragging ? 50 : undefined,
+     cursor: 'grab',
+   };
+   return (
+     &lt;div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners} onClick={onClick}&gt;
+       {children}
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
  
  export default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[] }) {
    const [slides, setSlides] = useState&lt;SlideConfig[]&gt;(initialSlides);
    const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState&lt;number&gt;(0);
  
-   function onDragEnd(result: DropResult) {
-     if (!result.destination) return;
-     const reordered = Array.from(slides);
-     const [removed] = reordered.splice(result.source.index, 1);
-     reordered.splice(result.destination.index, 0, removed);
-     setSlides(reordered);
-     setSelectedIndex(result.destination.index);
+   const sensors = useSensors(
+     useSensor(PointerSensor, { activationConstraint: { distance: 5 } })
+   );
+ 
+   function handleDragEnd(event: any) {
+     const { active, over } = event;
+     if (active.id !== over?.id) {
+       const oldIndex = slides.findIndex((_, i) =&gt; i.toString() === active.id);
+       const newIndex = slides.findIndex((_, i) =&gt; i.toString() === over.id);
+       setSlides((slides) =&gt; arrayMove(slides, oldIndex, newIndex));
+       setSelectedIndex(newIndex);
+     }
    }
  
```

_**Agent (2025-06-15 23:49:37Z)**_

Perfect! Here’s how you can architect and implement this advanced, flexible signage system:

---

## 1. **Choose from Content Library**
- **Show a list of available content** (from your content library, e.g. announcements, images, videos, etc.).
- Allow users to **add any content item as a slide** (with drag-and-drop ordering).
- Each slide can reference a content item by ID, and you can display a preview.

## 2. **Custom Slides (from GitHub, split screens, etc.)**
- Allow users to **add a “Custom” slide**:
  - **From GitHub:** Let them paste a GitHub URL or select from a list of registered custom slide components (that you’ve whitelisted or loaded from a repo).
  - **Split screens:** Let them pick a “Split” layout and assign content to each region (e.g., left: prayer times, right: announcement).

## 3. **UI/UX**
- Add a “+ Add Slide” menu with:
  - “From Content Library”
  - “Custom Slide” (with options: GitHub, Split, etc.)
- When adding from the library, show a modal or side panel to pick content.
- When adding a custom slide, show a form for GitHub URL or split config.

---

## **Implementation Plan**

### **A. Slide Data Model**
Expand your `SlideConfig` type:
```ts
export type SlideConfig = {
  type: 'prayerTimes' | 'announcements' | 'custom' | 'content' | 'split';
  template: string;
  theme?: Record<string, string>;
  content?: Record<string, any>;
  contentId?: string; // for content library slides
  customComponentUrl?: string; // for GitHub custom slides
  splitConfig?: { left: SlideConfig; right: SlideConfig }; // for split screens
};
```

### **B. UI Changes**
- Add a button/menu: “Add Slide” → “From Library”, “Custom”, “Split Screen”
- For “From Library”: open a modal, fetch and list content items, let user pick one.
- For “Custom”: input for GitHub URL or select from registered custom slides.
- For “Split Screen”: UI to pick what goes left/right (could be content or custom).

### **C. Rendering**
- For content slides: fetch content by `contentId` and render.
- For custom slides: dynamically import the component from GitHub or a registry.
- For split: render two slides side by side.

---

## **Sample UI Pseudocode**

```tsx
<Button onClick={() => setAddMenuOpen(true)}>+ Add Slide</Button>
{addMenuOpen && (
  <Menu>
    <MenuItem onClick={() => setShowLibraryModal(true)}>From Content Library</MenuItem>
    <MenuItem onClick={() => setShowCustomModal(true)}>Custom Slide (GitHub)</MenuItem>
    <MenuItem onClick={() => setShowSplitModal(true)}>Split Screen</MenuItem>
  </Menu>
)}
{showLibraryModal && <ContentLibraryModal onSelect={addContentSlide} />}
{showCustomModal && <CustomSlideModal onSubmit={addCustomSlide} />}
{showSplitModal && <SplitConfigModal onSubmit={addSplitSlide} />}
```

---

## **Next Steps**

1. **Do you want me to scaffold the “Add Slide” menu and modal logic?**
2. **Do you want a sample Content Library modal with mock data?**
3. **Do you want a sample Custom Slide modal for GitHub URL input?**
4. **Do you want a Split Screen config modal?**

**Let me know which you want to start with, or if you want all of them scaffolded!**  
(For example: “Start with the content library modal and add slide menu.”)

---

```json
        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function ContentLibraryPage() {\n  const [searchQuery, setSearchQuery] = useState(\"\");\n  const [contentItems, setContentItems] = useState\u003cContentItem[]\u003e([]);\n  const [announcements, setAnnouncements] = useState\u003cAnnouncement[]\u003e([]);\n  const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);\n  const [error, setError] = useState\u003cstring | null\u003e(null);\n  const [addDialogOpen, setAddDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [editDialogOpen, setEditDialogOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [editItem, setEditItem] = useState\u003cany\u003e(null);\n  const [form, setForm] = useState\u003cany\u003e({\n    title: \"\",\n    type: \"announcement\",\n    description: \"\",\n    content: \"\",\n    tags: \"\",\n  });\n  const masjidId = useSearchParams().get(\"masjidId\");\n  const [typeFilter, setTypeFilter] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"all\");\n  const [activeFilter, setActiveFilter] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"all\");\n  const [displayFilter, setDisplayFilter] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"all\");\n  const [zonesFilter, setZonesFilter] = useState\u003cstring\u003e(\"all\");\n  const [pageSize, setPageSize] = useState\u003cnumber\u003e(5);\n  const [currentPage, setCurrentPage] = useState\u003cnumber\u003e(1);\n\n  // Live polling\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    fetchData();\n    const interval = setInterval(fetchData, 10000);\n    return () =\u003e clearInterval(interval);\n  }, [masjidId]);",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function ContentLibraryPage() {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const fetchData = async () =\u003e {\n    if(!masjidId) return;\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const data = await getAllContent(masjidId);\n      // Map zones from string to array if needed\n      const mappedData = data.map((item: any) =\u003e ({\n        ...item,\n        zones: Array.isArray(item.zones)\n          ? item.zones\n          : typeof item.zones === 'string' \u0026\u0026 item.zones.startsWith('[')\n            ? JSON.parse(item.zones)\n            : item.zones ? [item.zones] : [],\n      }));\n      setContentItems(mappedData);\n      const announcements = await getAllAnnouncements(masjidId);\n      setAnnouncements(announcements);\n      setError(null);\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to fetch content\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n  const handleDelete = async (id: string) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await deleteContent(id);\n      toast({\n        title: \"Content Deleted\",\n        description: \"Content has been deleted successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to delete content\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDeleteAnnouncement = async (id: string) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await deleteAnnouncement(id);\n      toast({\n        title: \"Announcement Deleted\",\n        description: \"Announcement has been deleted successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.log(\"Error deleting announcement\", err);\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error Deleting Announcement\",\n        description: \"Failed to delete announcement\",\n      });\n      setError(\"Failed to delete announcement\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }",

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  const fetchData = async () =\u003e {\n    if(!masjidId) return;\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      const data = await getAllContent(masjidId);\n      // Map zones from string to array if needed\n      const mappedData = data.map((item: any) =\u003e ({\n        ...item,\n        zones: Array.isArray(item.zones)\n          ? item.zones\n          : typeof item.zones === 'string' \u0026\u0026 item.zones.startsWith('[')\n            ? JSON.parse(item.zones)\n            : item.zones ? [item.zones] : [],\n      }));\n      setContentItems(mappedData);\n      const announcements = await getAllAnnouncements(masjidId);\n      setAnnouncements(announcements);\n      setError(null);\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to fetch content\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n  const handleDelete = async (id: string) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await deleteContent(id);\n      toast({\n        title: \"Content Deleted\",\n        description: \"Content has been deleted successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to delete content\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  };\n\n  const handleDeleteAnnouncement = async (id: string) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await deleteAnnouncement(id);\n      toast({\n        title: \"Announcement Deleted\",\n        description: \"Announcement has been deleted successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      console.log(\"Error deleting announcement\", err);\n      toast({\n        title: \"Error Deleting Announcement\",\n        description: \"Failed to delete announcement\",\n      });\n      setError(\"Failed to delete announcement\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function ContentLibraryPage() {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const handleHideAnnouncement = async (id: string) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await updateAnnouncement(id, { active: false });\n      toast({\n        title: \"Announcement Hidden\",\n        description: \"Announcement has been hidden successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to hide announcement\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n\n  const handleHide = async (id: string, active: boolean) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await updateContent(id, { active });\n      toast({\n        title: \"Content Hidden\",\n        description: \"Content has been hidden successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to hide content\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  const filteredContent = contentItems\n    .filter((item: ContentItem) =\u003e\n      (typeFilter === \"all\" || item.type === typeFilter) \u0026\u0026\n      (activeFilter === \"all\" || (activeFilter === \"yes\" ? item.active : !item.active)) \u0026\u0026\n      (displayFilter === \"all\" || (item.displays \u0026\u0026 item.displays.some((d: any) =\u003e d.name === displayFilter))) \u0026\u0026\n      (zonesFilter === \"all\" || (item.zones \u0026\u0026 item.zones.includes(zonesFilter))) \u0026\u0026\n      (\n        item.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n        (item.description \u0026\u0026 item.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) ||\n        (item.data?.tags \u0026\u0026 item.data.tags.some((tag: string) =\u003e tag.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())))\n      )\n    )\n    .slice((currentPage - 1) * pageSize, currentPage * pageSize);",

        "originalContents": "\n\n  const handleHideAnnouncement = async (id: string) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await updateAnnouncement(id, { active: false });\n      toast({\n        title: \"Announcement Hidden\",\n        description: \"Announcement has been hidden successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to hide announcement\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n\n  const handleHide = async (id: string, active: boolean) =\u003e {\n    setLoading(true);\n    try {\n      await updateContent(id, { active });\n      toast({\n        title: \"Content Hidden\",\n        description: \"Content has been hidden successfully\",\n      });\n      fetchData();\n    } catch (err: any) {\n      setError(\"Failed to hide content\");\n    } finally {\n      setLoading(false);\n    }\n  }\n\n  const filteredContent = contentItems\n    .filter((item: ContentItem) =\u003e\n      (typeFilter === \"all\" || item.type === typeFilter) \u0026\u0026\n      (activeFilter === \"all\" || (activeFilter === \"yes\" ? item.active : !item.active)) \u0026\u0026\n      (displayFilter === \"all\" || (item.displays \u0026\u0026 item.displays.some((d: any) =\u003e d.name === displayFilter))) \u0026\u0026\n      (zonesFilter === \"all\" || (item.zones \u0026\u0026 item.zones.includes(zonesFilter))) \u0026\u0026\n      (\n        item.title.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase()) ||\n        (item.description \u0026\u0026 item.description.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())) ||\n        (item.data?.tags \u0026\u0026 item.data.tags.some((tag: string) =\u003e tag.toLowerCase().includes(searchQuery.toLowerCase())))\n      )\n    )\n    .slice((currentPage - 1) * pageSize, currentPage * pageSize);",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "const CONTENT_TYPES = [\n\n  ...\n\n  {\n    type: \"days_countdown\",\n    icon: \u003cCalendar className=\"h-8 w-8 text-[#550C18]\" /\u003e,\n    title: \"Days Countdown\",\n    description: \"Display a Days countdown on the screen.\"\n  },\n  {\n    type: \"taraweeh_timings\",\n    icon: \u003cClock className=\"h-8 w-8 text-[#550C18]\" /\u003e,\n    title: \"Taraweeh Timings\",\n    description: \"Display taraweeh timings on the screen.\"\n  },\n];\n\n// Add interfaces for content item and announcement\ninterface ContentItem {\n  id: string;\n  type: string;\n  title: string;\n  description?: string;\n  createdAt: string | Date;\n  active: boolean;\n  data?: {\n    tags?: string[];\n    [key: string]: any;\n  };\n  displays?: { name: string }[];\n  zones?: string[];\n  [key: string]: any;\n}",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\n  {\n    type: \"days_countdown\",\n    icon: \u003cCalendar className=\"h-8 w-8 text-[#550C18]\" /\u003e,\n    title: \"Days Countdown\",\n    description: \"Display a Days countdown on the screen.\"\n  },\n  {\n    type: \"taraweeh_timings\",\n    icon: \u003cClock className=\"h-8 w-8 text-[#550C18]\" /\u003e,\n    title: \"Taraweeh Timings\",\n    description: \"Display taraweeh timings on the screen.\"\n  },\n];\n\n// Add interfaces for content item and announcement\ninterface ContentItem {\n  id: string;\n  type: string;\n  title: string;\n  description?: string;\n  createdAt: string | Date;\n  active: boolean;\n  data?: {\n    tags?: string[];\n    [key: string]: any;\n  };\n  displays?: { name: string }[];\n  zones?: string[];\n  [key: string]: any;\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function ContentLibraryPage() {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  const getIconForType = (type: string) =\u003e {\n    switch (type) {\n      case \"document\":\n        return \u003cFileText className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"image\":\n        return \u003cImageIcon className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"video\":\n        return \u003cVideo className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"audio\":\n        return \u003cMusic className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"website\":\n        return \u003cGlobe className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      default:\n        return \u003cFileIcon className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv\u003e\n        \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18] mb-2\"\u003eAdd New Content\u003c/h2\u003e\n        \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70 mb-4\"\u003eClick on a tile to display that content on your TV/App\u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8\"\u003e\n          {CONTENT_TYPES.map((ct) =\u003e (\n            \u003cLink\n              key={ct.type}\n              href={&#96;/dashboard/content-library/create/${ct.type}?masjidId=${masjidId}&#96;}\n              className={&#96;rounded-lg border border-[#550C18]/10 bg-white p-6 flex flex-col items-center shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#550C18]&#96;}\n            \u003e\n              {ct.icon}\n              \u003cdiv className=\"mt-3 font-semibold text-[#3A3A3A] text-lg\"\u003e{ct.title}\u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"mt-1 text-[#3A3A3A]/70 text-sm text-center\"\u003e{ct.description}\u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/Link\u003e\n          ))}\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e",
        "detailedLines": [

          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\n  const getIconForType = (type: string) =\u003e {\n    switch (type) {\n      case \"document\":\n        return \u003cFileText className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"image\":\n        return \u003cImageIcon className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"video\":\n        return \u003cVideo className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"audio\":\n        return \u003cMusic className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      case \"website\":\n        return \u003cGlobe className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n      default:\n        return \u003cFileIcon className=\"h-6 w-6\" /\u003e;\n    }\n  };\n\n  return (\n    \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-6\"\u003e\n      \u003cdiv\u003e\n        \u003ch2 className=\"text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18] mb-2\"\u003eAdd New Content\u003c/h2\u003e\n        \u003cp className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70 mb-4\"\u003eClick on a tile to display that content on your TV/App\u003c/p\u003e\n        \u003cdiv className=\"grid grid-cols-1 sm:grid-cols-2 md:grid-cols-3 lg:grid-cols-4 gap-4 mb-8\"\u003e\n          {CONTENT_TYPES.map((ct) =\u003e (\n            \u003cLink\n              key={ct.type}\n              href={&#96;/dashboard/content-library/create/${ct.type}?masjidId=${masjidId}&#96;}\n              className={&#96;rounded-lg border border-[#550C18]/10 bg-white p-6 flex flex-col items-center shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow focus:outline-none focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#550C18]&#96;}\n            \u003e\n              {ct.icon}\n              \u003cdiv className=\"mt-3 font-semibold text-[#3A3A3A] text-lg\"\u003e{ct.title}\u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"mt-1 text-[#3A3A3A]/70 text-sm text-center\"\u003e{ct.description}\u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/Link\u003e\n          ))}\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 13,
            "line": 337
          },
          "startPosition": {

            "line": 300
          }

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { ContentType } from \"@prisma/client\";\n\nexport const getAllContent = async (masjidId: string) =\u003e {\n  return prisma.content.findMany({\n    where: masjidId ? { masjidId } : undefined,\n    include: { displays: true, assignedToDisplays: true, announcements: true },\n    orderBy: { createdAt: \"desc\" },\n  });\n};",
        "detailedLines": [

        "contents": "export default function ContentLibraryPage() {\n\n\n      ...\n\n\n      \u003cCard className=\"bg-white border-[#550C18]/10\"\u003e\n        \u003cCardHeader\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv\u003e\n              \u003cCardTitle className=\"text-xl font-semibold text-[#3A3A3A]\"\u003e\n                Content Files\n              \u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n              \u003cCardDescription className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003e\n                Browse and manage your content library\n              \u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"relative w-full md:w-[300px]\"\u003e\n                \u003cSearch className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-[#3A3A3A]/50\" /\u003e\n                \u003cInput\n                  placeholder=\"Search content...\"\n                  className=\"pl-10 border-[#550C18]/20 focus:border-[#550C18] focus:ring-[#550C18]\"\n                  value={searchQuery}\n                  onChange={(e) =\u003e setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003cButton\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"icon\"\n                className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#3A3A3A] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5\"\n              \u003e\n                \u003cFilter className=\"h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n              \u003c/Button\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/CardHeader\u003e",

        "originalContents": "\n\n      \u003cCard className=\"bg-white border-[#550C18]/10\"\u003e\n        \u003cCardHeader\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col md:flex-row md:items-center md:justify-between gap-4\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv\u003e\n              \u003cCardTitle className=\"text-xl font-semibold text-[#3A3A3A]\"\u003e\n                Content Files\n              \u003c/CardTitle\u003e\n              \u003cCardDescription className=\"text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003e\n                Browse and manage your content library\n              \u003c/CardDescription\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv className=\"relative w-full md:w-[300px]\"\u003e\n                \u003cSearch className=\"absolute left-3 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 h-4 w-4 text-[#3A3A3A]/50\" /\u003e\n                \u003cInput\n                  placeholder=\"Search content...\"\n                  className=\"pl-10 border-[#550C18]/20 focus:border-[#550C18] focus:ring-[#550C18]\"\n                  value={searchQuery}\n                  onChange={(e) =\u003e setSearchQuery(e.target.value)}\n                /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003cButton\n                variant=\"outline\"\n                size=\"icon\"\n                className=\"border-[#550C18]/20 text-[#3A3A3A] hover:bg-[#550C18]/5\"\n              \u003e\n                \u003cFilter className=\"h-4 w-4\" /\u003e\n              \u003c/Button\u003e\n            \u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/CardHeader\u003e",

        "contents": "export default function ContentLibraryPage() {\n\n                ...\n\n                \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-2\"\u003e\n                  \u003cButton\n                    variant=\"outline\"\n                    size=\"sm\"\n                    onClick={() =\u003e setCurrentPage(page =\u003e Math.max(1, page - 1))}\n                    disabled={currentPage === 1}\n                  \u003e\n                    Previous\n                  \u003c/Button\u003e\n                  \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-1\"\u003e\n                    {Array.from({length: Math.ceil(contentItems.length / pageSize)}, (_, i) =\u003e i + 1).map(page =\u003e (\n                      \u003cButton\n                        key={page}\n                        variant={currentPage === page ? \"default\" : \"outline\"}\n                        size=\"sm\"\n                        onClick={() =\u003e setCurrentPage(page)}\n                      \u003e\n                        {page}\n                      \u003c/Button\u003e\n                    ))}\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003cButton\n                    variant=\"outline\"\n                    size=\"sm\"\n                    onClick={() =\u003e setCurrentPage(page =\u003e Math.min(Math.ceil(contentItems.length / pageSize), page + 1))}\n                    disabled={currentPage === Math.ceil(contentItems.length / pageSize)}\n                  \u003e\n                    Next\n                  \u003c/Button\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            )}\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n      \u003c/Card\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { revalidatePath } from \"next/cache\";\n\nexport async function getAllContentTemplates(masjidId: string) {\n  try {\n    const templates = await prisma.content.findMany({\n      where: {\n        masjidId: masjidId\n      },\n      orderBy: {\n        createdAt: \"desc\",\n      },\n    });\n    return templates;\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error fetching content templates:\", error);\n    throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch content templates\");\n  }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,
            "text": "\"use server\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 2
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 3,
            "text": "import { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 4,
            "text": "import { revalidatePath } from \"next/cache\";"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 5
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 6,
            "text": "export async function getAllContentTemplates(masjidId: string) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 7,
            "text": "  try {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 8,
            "text": "    const templates = await prisma.content.findMany({"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 9,
            "text": "      where: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 10,
            "text": "        masjidId: masjidId"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "      },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 12,
            "text": "      orderBy: {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 13,
            "text": "        createdAt: \"desc\","
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 14,
            "text": "      },"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 15,
            "text": "    });"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 16,
            "text": "    return templates;"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 17,
            "text": "  } catch (error) {"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 18,
            "text": "    console.error(\"Error fetching content templates:\", error);"
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 19,
            "text": "    throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch content templates\");"
          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 21,
            "text": "}"
          }
        ],
        "originalContents": "\"use server\";\n\nimport { prisma } from \"@/lib/db\";\nimport { revalidatePath } from \"next/cache\";\n\nexport async function getAllContentTemplates(masjidId: string) {\n  try {\n    const templates = await prisma.content.findMany({\n      where: {\n        masjidId: masjidId\n      },\n      orderBy: {\n        createdAt: \"desc\",\n      },\n    });\n    return templates;\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error(\"Error fetching content templates:\", error);\n    throw new Error(\"Failed to fetch content templates\");\n  }\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 21
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 1
          }
        },
        "relativeWorkspacePath": "lib/actions/content-templates.ts"
      },
      "score": 0.3144530951976776
    },

        "contents": "export default function ContentLibraryPage() {\n\n          ...\n\n          \u003cdiv className=\"overflow-x-auto\"\u003e\n            \u003cTable\u003e\n              \u003cTableHeader\u003e\n                \u003cTableRow\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003e\u003cBookMarked className=\"h-4 w-4 ml-3\" /\u003e\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003eTitle\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003eType\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003eCreated At\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead\u003eStatus\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                  \u003cTableHead className=\"ml-auto text-right\"\u003eActions\u003c/TableHead\u003e\n                \u003c/TableRow\u003e\n              \u003c/TableHeader\u003e\n              \u003cTableBody\u003e\n                {filteredContent.length \u003e 0 ? (\n                  filteredContent.map((item) =\u003e (\n                    \u003cTableRow key={item.id}\u003e\n                      \u003cTableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cdiv className=\"flex items-center gap-3\"\u003e\n                          \u003cdiv className=\"flex flex-col items-center justify-center w-10 h-10 rounded-md bg-[#550C18]/10 text-[#550C18]\"\u003e\n                            {getIconForType(item.type)}\n                          \u003c/div\u003e\n                        \u003c/div\u003e\n                      \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                      \u003cTableCell className=\"font-medium\"\u003e{item.title}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                      \u003cTableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cBadge variant=\"outline\" className=\"bg-[#550C18]/10 text-[#550C18]\"\u003e\n                          {item.type.toUpperCase()}\n                        \u003c/Badge\u003e\n                      \u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                      \u003cTableCell\u003e{new Date(item.createdAt).toLocaleDateString()}\u003c/TableCell\u003e\n                      \u003cTableCell\u003e\n                        \u003cBadge variant={item.active ? \"success\" : \"danger\"}\u003e{item.active ? 'Active' : 'Inactive'}\u003c/Badge\u003e\n                      \u003c/TableCell\u003e",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function EditImageForm({ id }: { id: string }) {\n\n\n  ...\n\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    async function fetchData() {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const data = await getContentById(id);\n        if (!data) throw new Error(\"Content not found\");\n        setExistingImage(data.url || null);\n        form.reset({\n          title: data.title || \"\",\n          description: data.data?.description || data.description || \"\",\n          file: undefined,\n          displayLocations: data.displayLocations || [],\n          fullscreen: data.fullscreen ?? true,\n          zones: Array.isArray(data.zones) ? data.zones[0] : (typeof data.zones === \"string\" ? data.zones : \"All\"),\n          startDate: data.startDate ? new Date(data.startDate) : new Date(),\n          endDate: data.endDate ? new Date(data.endDate) : new Date(),\n          timeType: data.timeType || \"Fixed\",\n          startTime: data.startTime || \"12:00\",\n          endTime: data.endTime || \"12:00\",\n          duration: data.duration || \"60\",\n          dayType: data.dayType || \"Daily\",\n          status: data.status || \"Active\",\n        });\n        setError(null);\n      } catch (err: any) {\n        setError(err.message || \"Failed to fetch content\");\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }\n    fetchData();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line\n  }, [id]);",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    async function fetchData() {\n      setLoading(true);\n      try {\n        const data = await getContentById(id);\n        if (!data) throw new Error(\"Content not found\");\n        setExistingImage(data.url || null);\n        form.reset({\n          title: data.title || \"\",\n          description: data.data?.description || data.description || \"\",\n          file: undefined,\n          displayLocations: data.displayLocations || [],\n          fullscreen: data.fullscreen ?? true,\n          zones: Array.isArray(data.zones) ? data.zones[0] : (typeof data.zones === \"string\" ? data.zones : \"All\"),\n          startDate: data.startDate ? new Date(data.startDate) : new Date(),\n          endDate: data.endDate ? new Date(data.endDate) : new Date(),\n          timeType: data.timeType || \"Fixed\",\n          startTime: data.startTime || \"12:00\",\n          endTime: data.endTime || \"12:00\",\n          duration: data.duration || \"60\",\n          dayType: data.dayType || \"Daily\",\n          status: data.status || \"Active\",\n        });\n        setError(null);\n      } catch (err: any) {\n        setError(err.message || \"Failed to fetch content\");\n      } finally {\n        setLoading(false);\n      }\n    }\n    fetchData();\n    // eslint-disable-next-line\n  }, [id]);",
```

_**Agent**_

Here’s how I’ll proceed to meet your requirements:

- **Add an “Add Slide” menu** with options:
  - “From Content Library” (fetches live data)
  - “Custom Slide” (GitHub/component)
  - “Split Screen” (choose left/right content)
- **When “From Content Library” is chosen:**  
  - Open a modal that fetches and lists content items from your backend (using the same logic as your content library page).
  - User can pick an item to add as a slide.
- **When “Custom Slide” is chosen:**  
  - Open a modal for GitHub URL or custom component selection.
- **When “Split Screen” is chosen:**  
  - Open a modal to configure left/right slides (can pick from content or custom).

---

## 1. **Update Data Model**

Expand your `SlideConfig` type:
```ts
export type SlideConfig = {
  type: 'prayerTimes' | 'announcements' | 'custom' | 'content' | 'split';
  template: string;
  theme?: Record<string, string>;
  content?: Record<string, any>;
  contentId?: string; // for content library slides
  customComponentUrl?: string; // for GitHub custom slides
  splitConfig?: { left: SlideConfig; right: SlideConfig }; // for split screens
};
```

---

## 2. **Add Slide Menu & Modal Logic**

I’ll scaffold:
- The “Add Slide” menu (dropdown or dialog)
- The Content Library modal (fetches live data)
- Stubs for Custom and Split modals

---

```diff
@@ -103,7 +107,90 @@
  }
  
- export default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[] }) {
+ function ContentLibraryModal({ open, onClose, onSelect, masjidId }: { open: boolean; onClose: () =&gt; void; onSelect: (item: any) =&gt; void; masjidId: string }) {
+   const [content, setContent] = useState&lt;any[]&gt;([]);
+   const [loading, setLoading] = useState(false);
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     if (!open) return;
+     setLoading(true);
+     fetch(&#96;/api/content?masjidId=${masjidId}&#96;)
+       .then(res =&gt; res.json())
+       .then(data =&gt; setContent(data))
+       .finally(() =&gt; setLoading(false));
+   }, [open, masjidId]);
+   return (
+     &lt;Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={v =&gt; !v &amp;&amp; onClose()}&gt;
+       &lt;DialogContent className="max-w-lg"&gt;
+         &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Select Content&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+         &lt;div className="max-h-96 overflow-y-auto"&gt;
+           {loading ? &lt;div&gt;Loading...&lt;/div&gt; : content.length === 0 ? &lt;div&gt;No content found.&lt;/div&gt; : (
+             &lt;ul className="divide-y"&gt;
+               {content.map(item =&gt; (
+                 &lt;li key={item.id} className="py-2 cursor-pointer hover:bg-[#550C18]/10 px-2 rounded" onClick={() =&gt; { onSelect(item); onClose(); }}&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="font-semibold"&gt;{item.title}&lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="text-xs text-[#3A3A3A]/70"&gt;{item.type}&lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;/li&gt;
+               ))}
+             &lt;/ul&gt;
+           )}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+           &lt;DialogClose asChild&gt;
+             &lt;button className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-gray-200"&gt;Close&lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/DialogClose&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogFooter&gt;
+       &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+     &lt;/Dialog&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ function CustomSlideModal({ open, onClose, onSubmit }: { open: boolean; onClose: () =&gt; void; onSubmit: (url: string) =&gt; void }) {
+   const [url, setUrl] = useState("");
+   return (
+     &lt;Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={v =&gt; !v &amp;&amp; onClose()}&gt;
+       &lt;DialogContent className="max-w-md"&gt;
+         &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Add Custom Slide (GitHub URL)&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+         &lt;input className="w-full border rounded p-2 mb-4" placeholder="GitHub Component URL" value={url} onChange={e =&gt; setUrl(e.target.value)} /&gt;
+         &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+           &lt;button className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-[#550C18] text-white" onClick={() =&gt; { onSubmit(url); onClose(); }}&gt;Add&lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;DialogClose asChild&gt;
+             &lt;button className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-gray-200"&gt;Cancel&lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;/DialogClose&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogFooter&gt;
+       &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+     &lt;/Dialog&gt;
+   );
+ }
+ 
+ function SplitScreenModal({ open, onClose, onSubmit }: { open: boolean; onClose: () =&gt; void; onSubmit: (split: { left: SlideConfig; right: SlideConfig }) =&gt; void }) {
+   // For brevity, just stub UI
+   return (
+     &lt;Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={v =&gt; !v &amp;&amp; onClose()}&gt;
+       &lt;DialogContent className="max-w-md"&gt;
+         &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Configure Split Screen&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+         &lt;div&gt;Split screen config UI goes here.&lt;/div&gt;
+         &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+           &lt;button className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-[#550C18] text-white" onClick={() =&gt; { onSubmit({ left: { type: "prayerTimes", template: "modern" }, right: { type: "announcements", template: "modern" } }); onClose(); }}&gt;Add&lt;/button&gt;
+           &lt;DialogClose asChild&gt;
+             &lt;button className="px-4 py-2 rounded bg-gray-200"&gt;Cancel&lt;/button&gt;
```

_**Agent**_

The linter errors are because the `type` property in the new slide objects is being set as a generic `string` (from the content item or input), but TypeScript expects it to be one of the specific allowed values (`"prayerTimes" | "announcements" | "custom" | "content" | "split"`).

**How to fix:**  
Explicitly set the `type` property to the correct string literal for each slide type.

I'll fix the linter errors by:
- For content slides: `type: "content"`
- For custom slides: `type: "custom"`
- For split slides: `type: "split"`

Let me make this correction now.
