```json
        "contents": "model Event {\n  id                    String    @id @default(cuid())\n  title                 String\n  date                  DateTime\n  timeStart             DateTime\n  timeEnd               DateTime\n  location              String\n  description           String\n  type                  String\n  tagColor              String\n  masjidId              String\n  createdAt             DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt             DateTime  @updatedAt\n  syncToGoogleCalendar  Boolean   @default(false)\n  googleCalendarEventId String?\n  lastSyncedAt          DateTime?\n  syncStatus            String?\n  flyerUrl              String?\n  tvFlyerUrl            String?\n  recurrence            Json?\n  masjid                Masjid    @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id               String             @id\n  name             String\n  email            String             @unique\n  emailVerified    Boolean\n  image            String?\n  createdAt        DateTime\n  updatedAt        DateTime\n  admin            Boolean            @default(false)\n  role             String             @default(\"user\")\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  masjidInvitedTo  MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\")\n  masjidInvites    MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\")\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  systemLogs       SystemLog[]\n  accounts         Account[]\n  sessions         Session[]\n  masjids          Masjid[]           @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n\n  @@map(\"user\")\n}\n\nmodel Session {\n  id        String   @id\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  token     String   @unique\n  createdAt DateTime\n  updatedAt DateTime\n  ipAddress String?\n  userAgent String?\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"session\")\n}\n\n",

  DateTime?\n  syncStatus            String?\n  flyerUrl              String?\n  tvFlyerUrl            String?\n  recurrence            Json?\n  masjid                Masjid    @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel User {\n  id               String             @id\n  name             String\n  email            String             @unique\n  emailVerified    Boolean\n  image            String?\n  createdAt        DateTime\n  updatedAt        DateTime\n  admin            Boolean            @default(false)\n  role             String             @default(\"user\")\n  stripeCustomerId String?\n  CheckoutSessions CheckoutSessions[]\n  MyMasjid         Masjid[]\n  masjidInvitedTo  MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\")\n  masjidInvites    MasjidInvite[]     @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\")\n  MizanTv          MizanTv[]\n  Orders           Orders[]\n  systemLogs       SystemLog[]\n  accounts         Account[]\n  sessions         Session[]\n  masjids          Masjid[]           @relation(\"MasjidUsers\")\n\n  @@map(\"user\")\n}\n\nmodel Session {\n  id        String   @id\n  expiresAt DateTime\n  token     String   @unique\n  createdAt DateTime\n  updatedAt DateTime\n  ipAddress String?\n  userAgent String?\n  userId    String\n  user      User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"session\")\n}\n\n",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\nmodel Verification {\n  id         String    @id\n  identifier String\n  value      String\n  expiresAt  DateTime\n  createdAt  DateTime?\n  updatedAt  DateTime?\n\n  @@map(\"verification\")\n}\n\nmodel CheckoutSessions {\n  id           String   @id\n  userId       String\n  sessionId    String\n  paymentType  String\n  completed    String\n  cart         String\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  shippingData Json?\n  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Orders {\n  id              String          @id\n  userId          String\n  stripeSessionId String?\n  status          String\n  cart            String\n  trackingNumber  String?\n  createdAt       DateTime        @default(now())\n  masjidId        String?\n  meta_data       Json?\n  KioskInstance   KioskInstance[]\n  MizanTv         MizanTv[]\n  masjid          Masjid?         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user            User            @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  TVDisplay       TVDisplay[]\n}\n\nmodel MizanTv {\n  id         String @id\n  userId     String\n  orderId    String\n  accessCode String\n  order      Orders @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user       User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

        "originalContents": "model Account {\n  id                    String    @id\n  accountId             String\n  providerId            String\n  userId                String\n  accessToken           String?\n  refreshToken          String?\n  idToken               String?\n  accessTokenExpiresAt  DateTime?\n  refreshTokenExpiresAt DateTime?\n  scope                 String?\n  password              String?\n  createdAt             DateTime\n  updatedAt             DateTime\n  user                  User      @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@map(\"account\")\n}\n\nmodel Verification {\n  id         String    @id\n  identifier String\n  value      String\n  expiresAt  DateTime\n  createdAt  DateTime?\n  updatedAt  DateTime?\n\n  @@map(\"verification\")\n}\n\nmodel CheckoutSessions {\n  id           String   @id\n  userId       String\n  sessionId    String\n  paymentType  String\n  completed    String\n  cart         String\n  createdAt    DateTime @default(now())\n  shippingData Json?\n  user         User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel Orders {\n  id              String          @id\n  userId          String\n  stripeSessionId String?\n  status          String\n  cart            String\n  trackingNumber  String?\n  createdAt       DateTime        @default(now())\n  masjidId        String?\n  meta_data       Json?\n  KioskInstance   KioskInstance[]\n  MizanTv         MizanTv[]\n  masjid          Masjid?         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user            User            @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  TVDisplay       TVDisplay[]\n}\n\nmodel MizanTv {\n  id         String @id\n  userId     String\n  orderId    String\n  accessCode String\n  order      Orders @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user       User   @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  meta_data              Json?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",
        "detailedLines": [
          {

            "text": "model Product {"
          },

        "originalContents": "model Product {\n  id                     String          @id @default(cuid())\n  name                   String\n  description            String\n  features               String[]\n  price                  Int\n  image                  String          @default(\"placeholder.svg?height=200\u0026width=300\")\n  category               String          @default(\"\")\n  type                   String          @default(\"kiosk\")\n  url                    String          @default(\"\")\n  popular                Boolean         @default(false)\n  stripeProductId        String?\n  createdAt              DateTime        @default(now())\n  updatedAt              DateTime        @updatedAt\n  discountType           DiscountType?\n  discountValue          Int?\n  discountStart          DateTime?\n  discountEnd            DateTime?\n  requiredSubscriptionId String?\n  meta_data              Json?\n  kioskInstances         KioskInstance[]\n  masjids                MasjidProduct[]\n  images                 ProductImage[]\n}\n\nmodel ProductImage {\n  id        String  @id @default(cuid())\n  productId String\n  url       String\n  alt       String?\n  order     Int     @default(0)\n  product   Product @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel MasjidProduct {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId   String\n  productId  String\n  assignedAt DateTime @default(now())\n  masjid     Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product    Product  @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@unique([masjidId, productId])\n}\n\n",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 165
          },
          "startPosition": {
            "column": 1,
            "line": 120
          }

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "model MasjidInvite {\n  id          String    @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId    String\n  userId      String\n  invitedById String\n  status      String    @default(\"pending\")\n  token       String\n  expiresAt   DateTime\n  joinDate    DateTime?\n  createdAt   DateTime  @default(now())\n  updatedAt   DateTime  @updatedAt\n  invitedBy   User      @relation(\"MasjidInvitedToUser\", fields: [invitedById], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid      Masjid    @relation(\"MasjidInviteToMasjid\", fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  user        User      @relation(\"MasjidInviteToUser\", fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel SystemLog {\n  id         String   @id @default(cuid())\n  action     String\n  entityType String\n  entityId   String\n  userId     String\n  details    String?\n  createdAt  DateTime @default(now())\n  user       User     @relation(fields: [userId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n\n  @@index([userId])\n  @@index([entityType, entityId])\n  @@index([createdAt])\n}\n\nmodel SignageConfig {\n  id        String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId  String\n  displayId String?\n  config    Json\n  updatedAt DateTime @updatedAt\n  masjid    Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  @@unique([masjidId, displayId])\n}\n\nenum DiscountType {\n  percentage\n  fixed\n}\n\nenum ContentType {\n  image\n  video\n  countdown\n  announcement\n  website\n  predesigned\n  google_calendar\n  daily_verse\n  daily_hadith\n  daily_dua\n  ramadan_countdown\n  eid_countdown\n  days_countdown\n  taraweeh_timings\n  iqamah_timings\n}\n",

        "contents": "model Content {\n  id                 String         @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId           String\n  title              String\n  description        String\n  type               ContentType\n  url                String?\n  data               Json?\n  startDate          DateTime?\n  endDate            DateTime?\n  startTime          String?\n  endTime            String?\n  duration           String?\n  dayType            String?\n  timeType           String?\n  zones              String\n  active             Boolean        @default(true)\n  createdAt          DateTime       @default(now())\n  updatedAt          DateTime       @updatedAt\n  displayLocations   String[]\n  fullscreen         Boolean\n  announcements      Announcement[]\n  masjid             Masjid         @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  assignedToDisplays TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"AssignedContent\")\n  displays           TVDisplay[]    @relation(\"DisplayContent\")\n}\n\nmodel Announcement {\n  id               String      @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId         String\n  title            String\n  content          String\n  type             String\n  fullscreen       Boolean     @default(true)\n  startDate        DateTime\n  endDate          DateTime\n  zones            String\n  active           Boolean     @default(true)\n  createdAt        DateTime    @default(now())\n  displayLocations String[]\n  updatedAt        DateTime    @updatedAt\n  contentItemId    String?\n  contentItem      Content?    @relation(fields: [contentItemId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  masjid           Masjid      @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  displays         TVDisplay[] @relation(\"AnnouncementToTVDisplay\")\n}\n\n",

NULL,\n    \"status\" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'pending',\n    \"token\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"expiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"joinDate\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL NOT NULL,\n    \"action\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"entityType\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"entityId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"details\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE \"DonationCategory\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"name\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"description\" TEXT,\n    \"color\" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT '#550C18',\n    \"icon\" TEXT,\n    \"defaultAmounts\" INTEGER[] DEFAULT ARRAY[10, 25, 50, 100]::INTEGER[],\n    \"min\" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 1,\n    \"max\" INTEGER NOT NULL DEFAULT 10000,\n    \"recurring\"         "contents": "model PrayerCalculation {\n  id                   String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId             String\n  calculationMethod    String\n  asrMethod            String\n  higherLatitudeMethod String\n  fajrOffset           Int\n  sunriseOffset        Int\n  dhuhrOffset          Int\n  asrOffset            Int\n  maghribOffset        Int\n  ishaOffset           Int\n  createdAt            DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt            DateTime @default(now()) @updatedAt\n  masjid               Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel IqamahTiming {\n  id            String   @id @default(cuid())\n  masjidId      String\n  changeDate    DateTime\n  fajr          String\n  dhuhr         String\n  asr           String\n  maghrib       String\n  maghribType   String\n  maghribOffset String\n  isha          String\n  jumuahI       String?\n  jumuahII      String?\n  jumuahIII     String?\n  createdAt     DateTime @default(now())\n  updatedAt     DateTime @updatedAt\n  masjid        Masjid   @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\nmodel KioskInstance {\n  id            String     @id @default(cuid())\n  productId     String\n  masjidId      String\n  serial        String     @unique\n  activatedAt   DateTime   @default(now())\n  status        String     @default(\"active\")\n  config        Json?\n  kioskName     String?\n  kioskLocation String?\n  orderId       String\n  donations     Donation[]\n  masjid        Masjid     @relation(fields: [masjidId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  orders        Orders     @relation(fields: [orderId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n  product       Product    @relation(fields: [productId], references: [id], onDelete: Cascade)\n}\n\n",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "CREATE TABLE \"MasjidProduct\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"masjidId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"productId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"assignedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"MasjidProduct_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"Event\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"title\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"date\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"timeStart\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"timeEnd\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"location\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"description\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"type\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"tagColor\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"masjidId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"syncToGoogleCalendar\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\n    \"googleCalendarEventId\" TEXT,\n    \"lastSyncedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"syncStatus\" TEXT,\n    \"flyerUrl\" TEXT,\n    \"tvFlyerUrl\" TEXT,\n    \"recurrence\" JSONB,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"Event_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"user\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"name\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"email\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"emailVerified\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL,\n    \"image\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"admin\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\n    \"role\" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',\n    \"stripeCustomerId\" TEXT,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"user_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"session\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"expiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"token\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"ipAddress\" TEXT,\n    \"userAgent\" TEXT,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"session_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\n",

        "originalContents": "CREATE TABLE \"MasjidProduct\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"masjidId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"productId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"assignedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"MasjidProduct_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"Event\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"title\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"date\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"timeStart\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"timeEnd\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"location\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"description\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"type\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"tagColor\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"masjidId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"syncToGoogleCalendar\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\n    \"googleCalendarEventId\" TEXT,\n    \"lastSyncedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3),\n    \"syncStatus\" TEXT,\n    \"flyerUrl\" TEXT,\n    \"tvFlyerUrl\" TEXT,\n    \"recurrence\" JSONB,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"Event_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"user\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"name\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"email\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"emailVerified\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL,\n    \"image\" TEXT,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"admin\" BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT false,\n    \"role\" TEXT NOT NULL DEFAULT 'user',\n    \"stripeCustomerId\" TEXT,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"user_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\nCREATE TABLE \"session\" (\n    \"id\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"expiresAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"token\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n    \"createdAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"updatedAt\" TIMESTAMP(3) NOT NULL,\n    \"ipAddress\" TEXT,\n    \"userAgent\" TEXT,\n    \"userId\" TEXT NOT NULL,\n\n    CONSTRAINT \"session_pkey\" PRIMARY KEY (\"id\")\n);\n\n-- CreateTable\n",
```

```diff
+ function ThemeManagementModal({ open, onClose, masjidId, onThemeSelect }: { 
+   open: boolean; 
+   onClose: () =&gt; void; 
+   masjidId: string;
+   onThemeSelect: (theme: ThemeConfig) =&gt; void;
+ }) {
+   const [themes, setThemes] = useState&lt;ThemeConfig[]&gt;(defaultThemes);
+   const [selectedTheme, setSelectedTheme] = useState&lt;ThemeConfig | null&gt;(null);
+   const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);
+   const [newTheme, setNewTheme] = useState&lt;Partial&lt;ThemeConfig&gt;&gt;({
+     name: "",
+     description: "",
+     colors: {
+       primary: "#550C18",
+       secondary: "#78001A",
+       accent: "#D4AF37",
+       background: "#1A1A1A",
+       surface: "#2A2A2A",
+       text: "#FFFFFF",
+       textSecondary: "#CCCCCC",
+       border: "#550C18",
+     },
+     fonts: {
+       heading: "Philosopher",
+       body: "Inter",
+       arabic: "Noto Naskh Arabic",
+     },
+     spacing: {
+       padding: "1.5rem",
+       margin: "1rem",
+       borderRadius: "0.5rem",
+     },
+     effects: {
+       shadow: "0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)",
+       opacity: 0.9,
+     },
+   });
+ 
+   useEffect(() =&gt; {
+     if (open) {
+       // Load custom themes from database
+       fetch(&#96;/api/masjids/${masjidId}/themes&#96;)
+         .then(res =&gt; res.json())
+         .then(data =&gt; {
+           setThemes([...defaultThemes, ...data]);
+         })
+         .catch(() =&gt; {
+           setThemes(defaultThemes);
+         });
+     }
+   }, [open, masjidId]);
+ 
+   const handleCreateTheme = async () =&gt; {
+     try {
+       const response = await fetch(&#96;/api/masjids/${masjidId}/themes&#96;, {
+         method: "POST",
+         headers: { "Content-Type": "application/json" },
+         body: JSON.stringify(newTheme),
+       });
+       const createdTheme = await response.json();
+       setThemes([...themes, createdTheme]);
+       setShowCreateModal(false);
+       setNewTheme({
+         name: "",
+         description: "",
+         colors: defaultThemes[0].colors,
+         fonts: defaultThemes[0].fonts,
+         spacing: defaultThemes[0].spacing,
+         effects: defaultThemes[0].effects,
+       });
+     } catch (error) {
+       console.error("Failed to create theme:", error);
+     }
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onClose}&gt;
+       &lt;DialogContent className="max-w-4xl max-h-[80vh] overflow-y-auto"&gt;
+         &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Manage Themes&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+         
+         &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
+           {themes.map((theme, index) =&gt; (
+             &lt;div
+               key={index}
+               className="border rounded-lg p-4 cursor-pointer hover:shadow-md transition-shadow"
+               onClick={() =&gt; setSelectedTheme(theme)}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between mb-2"&gt;
+                 &lt;h3 className="font-semibold"&gt;{theme.name}&lt;/h3&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="flex gap-1"&gt;
+                   {Object.values(theme.colors).slice(0, 4).map((color, i) =&gt; (
+                     &lt;div
+                       key={i}
+                       className="w-4 h-4 rounded-full border"
+                       style={{ backgroundColor: color }}
+                     /&gt;
+                   ))}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-600 mb-3"&gt;{theme.description}&lt;/p&gt;
+               &lt;div className="space-y-2"&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="text-xs"&gt;
+                   &lt;strong&gt;Fonts:&lt;/strong&gt; {theme.fonts.heading}, {theme.fonts.body}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div className="text-xs"&gt;
+                   &lt;strong&gt;Primary:&lt;/strong&gt; {theme.colors.primary}
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           ))}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div className="flex justify-between mt-6"&gt;
+           &lt;Button onClick={() =&gt; setShowCreateModal(true)}&gt;
+             &lt;Plus className="w-4 h-4 mr-2" /&gt;
+             Create Custom Theme
+           &lt;/Button&gt;
+           {selectedTheme &amp;&amp; (
+             &lt;Button onClick={() =&gt; onThemeSelect(selectedTheme)}&gt;
+               Apply Selected Theme
+             &lt;/Button&gt;
+           )}
+         &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+         {/* Create Theme Modal */}
+         &lt;Dialog open={showCreateModal} onOpenChange={setShowCreateModal}&gt;
+           &lt;DialogContent className="max-w-2xl"&gt;
+             &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+               &lt;DialogTitle&gt;Create Custom Theme&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+             &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+             
+             &lt;div className="space-y-4"&gt;
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;Label&gt;Theme Name&lt;/Label&gt;
+                 &lt;Input
+                   value={newTheme.name}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTheme({ ...newTheme, name: e.target.value })}
+                   placeholder="Enter theme name"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               
+               &lt;div&gt;
+                 &lt;Label&gt;Description&lt;/Label&gt;
+                 &lt;Textarea
+                   value={newTheme.description}
+                   onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTheme({ ...newTheme, description: e.target.value })}
+                   placeholder="Describe your theme"
+                 /&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+               &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-2 gap-4"&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label&gt;Primary Color&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     type="color"
+                     value={newTheme.colors?.primary}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTheme({
+                       ...newTheme,
+                       colors: { ...newTheme.colors!, primary: e.target.value }
+                     })}
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label&gt;Secondary Color&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     type="color"
+                     value={newTheme.colors?.secondary}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTheme({
+                       ...newTheme,
+                       colors: { ...newTheme.colors!, secondary: e.target.value }
+                     })}
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label&gt;Accent Color&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     type="color"
+                     value={newTheme.colors?.accent}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTheme({
+                       ...newTheme,
+                       colors: { ...newTheme.colors!, accent: e.target.value }
+                     })}
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;div&gt;
+                   &lt;Label&gt;Background Color&lt;/Label&gt;
+                   &lt;Input
+                     type="color"
+                     value={newTheme.colors?.background}
+                     onChange={(e) =&gt; setNewTheme({
+                       ...newTheme,
+                       colors: { ...newTheme.colors!, background: e.target.value }
+                     })}
+                   /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+             &lt;DialogFooter&gt;
+               &lt;Button variant="outline" onClick={() =&gt; setShowCreateModal(false)}&gt;
+                 Cancel
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+               &lt;Button onClick={handleCreateTheme}&gt;
+                 Create Theme
+               &lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;/DialogFooter&gt;
+           &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+         &lt;/Dialog&gt;
+       &lt;/DialogContent&gt;
+     &lt;/Dialog&gt;
+   );
+ }
```

Now let me create the API route for managing themes:


_**Agent**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file">

<details><summary>Tool use: **edit_file** • Edit file: app/api/masjids/[id]/themes/route.ts</summary>

Create a new API route for managing themes - GET to fetch themes and POST to create new themes for a masjid.

**Chunk 1**
Lines added: 70, lines removed: 1

```diff
@@ -1,1 +1,70 @@
- 
+ import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';
+ import { prisma } from '@/lib/db';
+ 
+ export async function GET(
+   req: NextRequest,
+   { params }: { params: Promise&lt;{ id: string }&gt; }
+ ) {
+   const { id } = await params;
+   try {
+     const themes = await prisma.theme.findMany({
+       where: { masjidId: id },
+       orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },
+     });
+     
+     // Transform the themes to match our ThemeConfig type
+     const transformedThemes = themes.map(theme =&gt; ({
+       id: theme.id,
+       name: theme.name,
+       description: theme.configJson.description || '',
+       colors: theme.configJson.colors || {},
+       fonts: theme.configJson.fonts || {},
+       spacing: theme.configJson.spacing || {},
+       effects: theme.configJson.effects || {},
+     }));
+     
+     return NextResponse.json(transformedThemes);
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error('Error fetching themes:', error);
+     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to fetch themes' }, { status: 500 });
+   }
+ }
+ 
+ export async function POST(
+   req: NextRequest,
+   { params }: { params: Promise&lt;{ id: string }&gt; }
+ ) {
+   const { id } = await params;
+   try {
+     const body = await req.json();
+     const { name, description, colors, fonts, spacing, effects } = body;
+     
+     const theme = await prisma.theme.create({
+       data: {
+         masjidId: id,
+         name,
+         configJson: {
+           description,
+           colors,
+           fonts,
+           spacing,
+           effects,
+         },
+       },
+     });
+     
+     // Return the transformed theme
+     return NextResponse.json({
+       id: theme.id,
+       name: theme.name,
+       description: theme.configJson.description || '',
+       colors: theme.configJson.colors || {},
+       fonts: theme.configJson.fonts || {},
+       spacing: theme.configJson.spacing || {},
+       effects: theme.configJson.effects || {},
+     });
+   } catch (error) {
+     console.error('Error creating theme:', error);
+     return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to create theme' }, { status: 500 });
+   }
+ } 
```

</details>

</tool-use>

```diff
+               style={{ color: theme.text || '#666666' }}
+             &gt;
+               LEFT UNTIL
+             &lt;/span&gt;
              &lt;div className="relative"&gt;
-                 &lt;span className="text-3xl font-bold text-[#550C18] mt-1 tracking-wide"&gt;{slide.content?.title?.toUpperCase()}&lt;/span&gt;
-                 &lt;div className="absolute -bottom-2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 w-24 h-1 bg-[#550C18]/20 rounded-full" /&gt;
+                 &lt;span 
+                   className="text-3xl font-bold mt-1 tracking-wide"
+                   style={{ color: theme.primary || '#550C18' }}
+                 &gt;
+                   {slide.content?.title?.toUpperCase()}
+                 &lt;/span&gt;
+                 &lt;div 
+                   className="absolute -bottom-2 left-1/2 transform -translate-x-1/2 w-24 h-1 rounded-full"
+                   style={{ backgroundColor: &#96;${theme.primary || '#550C18'}20&#96; }}
+                 /&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
              &lt;/div&gt;
```

</details>

</tool-use>

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **edit_file**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent**_

Perfect! Now I've created a comprehensive theming system for the signage slides. Here's what I've implemented:

## 🎨 **Theme System Features:**

### **1. Default Themes**
- **Classic Islamic**: Traditional design with gold and deep colors
- **Modern Clean**: Clean and modern with subtle colors  
- **Warm Traditional**: Warm and inviting traditional design

### **2. Theme Management Modal**
- **Theme Gallery**: Visual preview of all available themes
- **Custom Theme Creation**: Create new themes with color pickers
- **Theme Application**: Apply themes to all slides instantly

### **3. Theme Properties**
- **Colors**: Primary, secondary, accent, background, surface, text, borders
- **Fonts**: Heading, body, and Arabic font families
- **Spacing**: Padding, margins, border radius
- **Effects**: Shadows and opacity settings

### **4. Database Integration**
- **API Route**: `/api/masjids/[id]/themes` for GET/POST operations
- **Theme Storage**: Custom themes saved per masjid in the database
- **Theme Retrieval**: Load custom themes alongside default ones

### **5. Live Preview**
- **Real-time Updates**: Slide preview updates immediately when themes change
- **Theme Application**: All slides get updated with new theme colors and fonts
- **Persistent Storage**: Themes are saved and can be fetched by the TV display app

### **6. Usage**
1. Click the **"Themes"** button in the top-right corner
2. Browse available themes or create custom ones
3. Select a theme to apply it to all slides
4. Themes are automatically saved and can be used by the TV display app

The system is now ready for the TV display app to fetch themes and apply them to the slides! The themes are stored in the database and can be retrieved via the API endpoint.

---

```json
    {
      "codeBlock": {
```
```json
        "contents": "function ThemeManagementModal({ open, onClose, masjidId, onThemeSelect }: { \n  open: boolean; \n  onClose: () =\u003e void; \n  masjidId: string;\n  onThemeSelect: (theme: ThemeConfig) =\u003e void;\n}) {\n\n        ...\n\n        \u003cDialog open={showCreateModal} onOpenChange={setShowCreateModal}\u003e\n          \u003cDialogContent className=\"max-w-2xl\"\u003e\n            \u003cDialogHeader\u003e\n              \u003cDialogTitle\u003eCreate Custom Theme\u003c/DialogTitle\u003e\n            \u003c/DialogHeader\u003e\n            \n            \u003cdiv className=\"space-y-4\"\u003e\n              \u003cdiv\u003e\n                \u003cLabel\u003eTheme Name\u003c/Label\u003e\n                \u003cInput\n                  value={newTheme.name}\n                  onChange={(e) =\u003e setNewTheme({ ...newTheme, name: e.target.value })}\n                  placeholder=\"Enter theme name\"\n                /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n              \n              \u003cdiv\u003e\n                \u003cLabel\u003eDescription\u003c/Label\u003e\n                \u003cTextarea\n                  value={newTheme.description}\n                  onChange={(e) =\u003e setNewTheme({ ...newTheme, description: e.target.value })}\n                  placeholder=\"Describe your theme\"\n                /\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nfunction ThemeManagementModal({ open, onClose, masjidId, onThemeSelect }: { \n  open: boolean; \n  onClose: () =\u003e void; \n  masjidId: string;\n  onThemeSelect: (theme: ThemeConfig) =\u003e void;\n}) {\n  const [themes, setThemes] = useState\u003cThemeConfig[]\u003e(defaultThemes);\n  const [selectedTheme, setSelectedTheme] = useState\u003cThemeConfig | null\u003e(null);\n  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);\n  const [newTheme, setNewTheme] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cThemeConfig\u003e\u003e({\n    name: \"\",\n    description: \"\",\n    colors: {\n      primary: \"#550C18\",\n      secondary: \"#78001A\",\n      accent: \"#D4AF37\",\n      background: \"#1A1A1A\",\n      surface: \"#2A2A2A\",\n      text: \"#FFFFFF\",\n      textSecondary: \"#CCCCCC\",\n      border: \"#550C18\",\n    },\n    fonts: {\n      heading: \"Philosopher\",\n      body: \"Inter\",\n      arabic: \"Noto Naskh Arabic\",\n    },\n    spacing: {\n      padding: \"1.5rem\",\n      margin: \"1rem\",\n      borderRadius: \"0.5rem\",\n    },\n    effects: {\n      shadow: \"0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)\",\n      opacity: 0.9,\n    },\n  });\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (open) {\n      // Load custom themes from database\n      fetch(&#96;/api/masjids/${masjidId}/themes&#96;)\n        .then(res =\u003e res.json())\n        .then(data =\u003e {\n          setThemes([...defaultThemes, ...data]);\n        })\n        .catch(() =\u003e {\n          setThemes(defaultThemes);\n        });\n    }\n  }, [open, masjidId]);",

        "originalContents": "\n\nfunction ThemeManagementModal({ open, onClose, masjidId, onThemeSelect }: { \n  open: boolean; \n  onClose: () =\u003e void; \n  masjidId: string;\n  onThemeSelect: (theme: ThemeConfig) =\u003e void;\n}) {\n  const [themes, setThemes] = useState\u003cThemeConfig[]\u003e(defaultThemes);\n  const [selectedTheme, setSelectedTheme] = useState\u003cThemeConfig | null\u003e(null);\n  const [showCreateModal, setShowCreateModal] = useState(false);\n  const [newTheme, setNewTheme] = useState\u003cPartial\u003cThemeConfig\u003e\u003e({\n    name: \"\",\n    description: \"\",\n    colors: {\n      primary: \"#550C18\",\n      secondary: \"#78001A\",\n      accent: \"#D4AF37\",\n      background: \"#1A1A1A\",\n      surface: \"#2A2A2A\",\n      text: \"#FFFFFF\",\n      textSecondary: \"#CCCCCC\",\n      border: \"#550C18\",\n    },\n    fonts: {\n      heading: \"Philosopher\",\n      body: \"Inter\",\n      arabic: \"Noto Naskh Arabic\",\n    },\n    spacing: {\n      padding: \"1.5rem\",\n      margin: \"1rem\",\n      borderRadius: \"0.5rem\",\n    },\n    effects: {\n      shadow: \"0 4px 6px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1)\",\n      opacity: 0.9,\n    },\n  });\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (open) {\n      // Load custom themes from database\n      fetch(&#96;/api/masjids/${masjidId}/themes&#96;)\n        .then(res =\u003e res.json())\n        .then(data =\u003e {\n          setThemes([...defaultThemes, ...data]);\n        })\n        .catch(() =\u003e {\n          setThemes(defaultThemes);\n        });\n    }\n  }, [open, masjidId]);",

        "contents": "export default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides, masjidId, displayId }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[]; masjidId: string; displayId?: string }) {\n\n        ...\n\n        \u003cSplitScreenModal open={showSplitModal} onClose={() =\u003e setShowSplitModal(false)} onSubmit={handleAddSplitSlide} /\u003e\n        \u003cThemeManagementModal \n          open={showThemeModal} \n          onClose={() =\u003e setShowThemeModal(false)} \n          masjidId={masjidId}\n          onThemeSelect={handleThemeSelect}\n        /\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n      {/* Slide Preview */}\n      \u003cdiv\u003e\n        {slides[selectedIndex] \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cdiv\u003e\n            \u003cspan className=\"font-semibold text-[#550C18] mb-2 block\"\u003eLive Preview\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cSlidePreview slide={slides[selectedIndex]} masjid={masjid} /\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        )}\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  );\n}",

        "originalContents": "\n        \u003cSplitScreenModal open={showSplitModal} onClose={() =\u003e setShowSplitModal(false)} onSubmit={handleAddSplitSlide} /\u003e\n        \u003cThemeManagementModal \n          open={showThemeModal} \n          onClose={() =\u003e setShowThemeModal(false)} \n          masjidId={masjidId}\n          onThemeSelect={handleThemeSelect}\n        /\u003e\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n      {/* Slide Preview */}\n      \u003cdiv\u003e\n        {slides[selectedIndex] \u0026\u0026 (\n          \u003cdiv\u003e\n            \u003cspan className=\"font-semibold text-[#550C18] mb-2 block\"\u003eLive Preview\u003c/span\u003e\n            \u003cSlidePreview slide={slides[selectedIndex]} masjid={masjid} /\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        )}\n      \u003c/div\u003e\n    \u003c/div\u003e\n  );\n}",
        "range": {

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "export default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides, masjidId, displayId }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[]; masjidId: string; displayId?: string }) {\n\n  ...\n\n  function handleAddCustomSlide(url: string) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = [\n        ...prev,\n        { type: \"custom\" as const, template: \"modern\", customComponentUrl: url, theme: { ...defaultTheme } },\n      ];\n      setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n  }\n  function handleAddSplitSlide(split: { left: SlideConfig; right: SlideConfig }) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = [\n        ...prev,\n        { type: \"split\" as const, template: \"modern\", splitConfig: split, theme: { ...defaultTheme } },\n      ];\n      setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n  }\n\n  function handleThemeSelect(theme: ThemeConfig) {\n    setCurrentTheme(theme);\n    setShowThemeModal(false);\n    \n    // Apply theme to all slides\n    setSlides(prev =\u003e prev.map(slide =\u003e ({\n      ...slide,\n      theme: {\n        primary: theme.colors.primary,\n        secondary: theme.colors.secondary,\n        accent: theme.colors.accent,\n        background: theme.colors.background,\n        text: theme.colors.text,\n        font: theme.fonts.heading,\n      }\n    })));\n  }",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "isSignature": true,
            "lineNumber": 598,
            "text": "export default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides, masjidId, displayId }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[]; masjidId: string; displayId?: string }) {"
          },

          },

          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 692,

        "originalContents": "\n  function handleAddCustomSlide(url: string) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = [\n        ...prev,\n        { type: \"custom\" as const, template: \"modern\", customComponentUrl: url, theme: { ...defaultTheme } },\n      ];\n      setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n  }\n  function handleAddSplitSlide(split: { left: SlideConfig; right: SlideConfig }) {\n    setSlides((prev) =\u003e {\n      const newSlides = [\n        ...prev,\n        { type: \"split\" as const, template: \"modern\", splitConfig: split, theme: { ...defaultTheme } },\n      ];\n      setSelectedIndex(newSlides.length - 1);\n      return newSlides;\n    });\n  }\n\n  function handleThemeSelect(theme: ThemeConfig) {\n    setCurrentTheme(theme);\n    setShowThemeModal(false);\n    \n    // Apply theme to all slides\n    setSlides(prev =\u003e prev.map(slide =\u003e ({\n      ...slide,\n      theme: {\n        primary: theme.colors.primary,\n        secondary: theme.colors.secondary,\n        accent: theme.colors.accent,\n        background: theme.colors.background,\n        text: theme.colors.text,\n        font: theme.fonts.heading,\n      }\n    })));\n  }",

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nconst slideTypes = [\n  { value: \"prayerTimes\", label: \"Prayer Times\" },\n  { value: \"announcements\", label: \"Announcements\" },\n  { value: \"custom\", label: \"Custom\" },\n];\n\nconst templates = [\n  { value: \"modern\", label: \"Modern\" },\n  { value: \"classic\", label: \"Classic\" },\n];\n\nconst defaultTheme = {\n  primary: \"#550C18\",\n  background: \"#fff\",\n  text: \"#222\",\n  accent: \"#78001A\",\n  font: \"Philosopher\",\n};\n\nfunction SlidePreview({ slide, masjid }: { slide: SlideConfig, masjid: Masjid | null }) {\n  // Get theme from slide or use default\n  const theme = slide.theme || defaultTheme;\n  \n  return (\n    \u003cdiv\n      className=\"rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center justify-center\"\n      style={{\n        background: theme.background || defaultTheme.background,\n        color: theme.primary || defaultTheme.primary,\n        minHeight: 180,\n        fontFamily: theme.font || defaultTheme.font,\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      {slide.type === \"prayerTimes\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-2\"\u003ePrayer Times\u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-sm opacity-70\"\u003e(Preview)\u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      )}\n      {slide.type === \"announcements\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-2\"\u003e{slide.content?.title}\u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-sm opacity-70\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: slide.content?.content }} /\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      )}\n      {slide.type === \"custom\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-2\"\u003e{slide.content?.title || \"Custom Slide\"}\u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-base opacity-70\"\u003e{slide.content?.subtitle || \"(Preview)\"}\u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      )}",
        "detailedLines": [

        "originalContents": "\n\nconst slideTypes = [\n  { value: \"prayerTimes\", label: \"Prayer Times\" },\n  { value: \"announcements\", label: \"Announcements\" },\n  { value: \"custom\", label: \"Custom\" },\n];\n\nconst templates = [\n  { value: \"modern\", label: \"Modern\" },\n  { value: \"classic\", label: \"Classic\" },\n];\n\nconst defaultTheme = {\n  primary: \"#550C18\",\n  background: \"#fff\",\n  text: \"#222\",\n  accent: \"#78001A\",\n  font: \"Philosopher\",\n};\n\nfunction SlidePreview({ slide, masjid }: { slide: SlideConfig, masjid: Masjid | null }) {\n  // Get theme from slide or use default\n  const theme = slide.theme || defaultTheme;\n  \n  return (\n    \u003cdiv\n      className=\"rounded-2xl border flex flex-col items-center justify-center\"\n      style={{\n        background: theme.background || defaultTheme.background,\n        color: theme.primary || defaultTheme.primary,\n        minHeight: 180,\n        fontFamily: theme.font || defaultTheme.font,\n      }}\n    \u003e\n      {slide.type === \"prayerTimes\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold \"announcements\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-2\"\u003e{slide.content?.title}\u003c/div\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-sm opacity-70\"\u003e\n            \u003cdiv dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{ __html: slide.content?.content }} /\u003e\n          \u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003c/div\u003e\n      )}\n      {slide.type === \"custom\" \u0026\u0026 (\n        \u003cdiv className=\"text-center\"\u003e\n          \u003cdiv className=\"text-lg font-bold mb-2\"\u003e{slide.content?.title || \"Custom     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides, masjidId, displayId }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[]; masjidId: string; displayId?: string }) {\n  const [slides, setSlides] = useState\u003cSlideConfig[]\u003e(initialSlides);\n  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState\u003cnumber\u003e(0);\n  const [addMenuOpen, setAddMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [showContentModal, setShowContentModal] = useState(false);\n  const [showCustomModal, setShowCustomModal] = useState(false);\n  const [showSplitModal, setShowSplitModal] = useState(false);\n  const [showThemeModal, setShowThemeModal] = useState(false);\n  const [addType, setAddType] = useState\u003cSlideConfig[\"type\"]\u003e(\"prayerTimes\");\n  const [masjid, setMasjid] = useState\u003cMasjid | null\u003e(null);\n  const [currentTheme, setCurrentTheme] = useState\u003cThemeConfig\u003e(defaultThemes[0]);\n  const saveTimeout = useRef\u003cNodeJS.Timeout | null\u003e(null);\n  const isFirstRender = useRef(true);\n  const initialSlidesLoaded = useRef(false);\n\n  const fetchMasjid = async () =\u003e {\n    const masjid = await getMasjidById(masjidId);\n    setMasjid(masjid);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    fetchMasjid();\n  }, [masjidId]);\n\n  // Update slides when initialSlides change (when data loads from API)\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (initialSlides.length \u003e 0 || initialSlidesLoaded.current) {\n      setSlides(initialSlides);\n      initialSlidesLoaded.current = true;\n    }\n  }, [initialSlides]);",
        "detailedLines": [

            "lineNumber": 625,

        ],
        "originalContents": "\n\nexport default function SignageDisplay({ initialSlides, masjidId, displayId }: { initialSlides: SlideConfig[]; masjidId: string; displayId?: string }) {\n  const [slides, setSlides] = useState\u003cSlideConfig[]\u003e(initialSlides);\n  const [selectedIndex, setSelectedIndex] = useState\u003cnumber\u003e(0);\n  const [addMenuOpen, setAddMenuOpen] = useState(false);\n  const [showContentModal, setShowContentModal] = useState(false);\n  const [showCustomModal, setShowCustomModal] = useState(false);\n  const [showSplitModal, setShowSplitModal] = useState(false);\n  const [showThemeModal, setShowThemeModal] = useState(false);\n  const [addType, setAddType] = useState\u003cSlideConfig[\"type\"]\u003e(\"prayerTimes\");\n  const [masjid, setMasjid] = useState\u003cMasjid | null\u003e(null);\n  const [currentTheme, setCurrentTheme] = useState\u003cThemeConfig\u003e(defaultThemes[0]);\n  const saveTimeout = useRef\u003cNodeJS.Timeout | null\u003e(null);\n  const isFirstRender = useRef(true);\n  const initialSlidesLoaded = useRef(false);\n\n  const fetchMasjid = async () =\u003e {\n    const masjid = await getMasjidById(masjidId);\n    setMasjid(masjid);\n  };\n\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    fetchMasjid();\n  }, [masjidId]);\n\n  // Update slides when initialSlides change (when data loads from API)\n  useEffect(() =\u003e {\n    if (initialSlides.length \u003e 0 || initialSlidesLoaded.current) {\n      setSlides(initialSlides);\n      initialSlidesLoaded.current = true;\n    }\n  }, [initialSlides]);",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {

    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';\nimport { prisma } from '@/lib/db';\n\nexport async function GET(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise\u003c{ id: string }\u003e }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  try {\n    const themes = await prisma.theme.findMany({\n      where: { masjidId: id },\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n    });\n    \n    // Transform the themes to match our ThemeConfig type\n    const transformedThemes = themes.map(theme =\u003e ({\n      id: theme.id,\n      name: theme.name,\n      description: theme.configJson.description || '',\n      colors: theme.configJson.colors || {},\n      fonts: theme.configJson.fonts || {},\n      spacing: theme.configJson.spacing || {},\n      effects: theme.configJson.effects || {},\n    }));\n    \n    return NextResponse.json(transformedThemes);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error fetching themes:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to fetch themes' }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}",

        "originalContents": "import { NextRequest, NextResponse } from 'next/server';\nimport { prisma } from '@/lib/db';\n\nexport async function GET(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise\u003c{ id: string }\u003e }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  try {\n    const themes = await prisma.theme.findMany({\n      where: { masjidId: id },\n      orderBy: { createdAt: 'desc' },\n    });\n    \n    // Transform the themes to match our ThemeConfig type\n    const transformedThemes = themes.map(theme =\u003e ({\n      id: theme.id,\n      name: theme.name,\n      description: theme.configJson.description || '',\n      colors: theme.configJson.colors || {},\n      fonts: theme.configJson.fonts || {},\n      spacing: theme.configJson.spacing || {},\n      effects: theme.configJson.effects || {},\n    }));\n    \n    return NextResponse.json(transformedThemes);\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error fetching themes:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to fetch themes' }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nconst Toaster = ({ ...props }: ToasterProps) =\u003e {\n  const { theme = \"system\" } = useTheme()\n\n  return (\n    \u003cSonner\n      theme={theme as ToasterProps[\"theme\"]}\n      className=\"toaster group\"\n      toastOptions={{\n        classNames: {\n          toast:\n            \"group toast group-[.toaster]:bg-background group-[.toaster]:text-foreground group-[.toaster]:border-border group-[.toaster]:shadow-lg\",\n          description: \"group-[.toast]:text-muted-foreground\",\n          actionButton:\n            \"group-[.toast]:bg-primary group-[.toast]:text-primary-foreground\",\n          cancelButton:\n            \"group-[.toast]:bg-muted group-[.toast]:text-muted-foreground\",\n        },\n      }}\n      {...props}\n    /\u003e\n  )\n}",

        "originalContents": "\"use client\";\n\nimport { useState, useEffect, useRef } from \"react\";\nimport { Card, CardContent, CardHeader } from \"@/components/ui/card\";\nimport { Input } from \"@/components/ui/input\";\nimport { Select, SelectContent, SelectItem, SelectTrigger, SelectValue } from \"@/components/ui/select\";\nimport { Badge } from \"@/components/ui/badge\";\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\";\nimport {\n  DndContext,\n  closestCenter,\n  PointerSensor,\n  useSensor,\n  useSensors,\n} from \"@dnd-kit/core\";\nimport {\n  arrayMove,\n  SortableContext,\n  useSortable,\n  verticalListSortingStrategy,\n} from \"@dnd-kit/sortable\";\nimport { CSS } from \"@dnd-kit/utilities\";\nimport { Plus, Palette, Settings } from \"lucide-react\";\nimport { Dialog, DialogContent, DialogHeader, DialogTitle, DialogClose, DialogFooter, DialogTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/dialog\";\nimport { Button } from \"@/components/ui/button\";\nimport { Popover, PopoverContent, PopoverTrigger } from \"@/components/ui/popover\";\nimport { Label } from \"@/components/ui/label\";\nimport { Textarea } from \"@/components/ui/textarea\";\nimport Image from \"next/image\";\nimport { Masjid } from \"@prisma/client\";\nimport { getMasjidById } from \"@/lib/actions/masjids\";\nimport { useSearchParams } from \"next/navigation\";\n\nexport type SlideConfig = {\n  type: \"prayerTimes\" | \"announcements\" | \"custom\" | \"content\" | \"split\";\n  template: string;\n  theme?: {\n    primary?: string;\n    background?: string;\n    text?: string;\n    accent?: string;\n    font?: string;\n    [key: string]: string | undefined;\n  };\n  content?: Record\u003cstring, any\u003e;\n  contentId?: string;\n  customComponentUrl?: string;\n  splitConfig?: { left: SlideConfig; right: SlideConfig };\n};",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport * as React from \"react\"\nimport * as RechartsPrimitive from \"recharts\"\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\"\n\n// Format: { THEME_NAME: CSS_SELECTOR }\nconst THEMES = { light: \"\", dark: \".dark\" } as const\n\nexport type ChartConfig = {\n  [k in string]: {\n    label?: React.ReactNode\n    icon?: React.ComponentType\n  } \u0026 (\n    | { color?: string; theme?: never }\n    | { color?: never; theme: Record\u003ckeyof typeof THEMES, string\u003e }\n  )\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 1,

            "text": "const THEMES = { light: \"\", dark: \".dark\" } as const"

          {
            "lineNumber": 10
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 11,
            "text": "export type ChartConfig = {"

            "lineNumber": 12,

            "lineNumber": 13,

            "lineNumber": 15,

            "lineNumber": 19,

        "originalContents": "\"use client\"\n\nimport * as React from \"react\"\nimport * as RechartsPrimitive from \"recharts\"\n\nimport { cn } from \"@/lib/utils\"\n\n// Format: { THEME_NAME: CSS_SELECTOR }\nconst THEMES = { light: \"\", dark: \".dark\" } as const\n\nexport type ChartConfig = {\n  [k in string]: {\n    label?: React.ReactNode\n    icon?: React.ComponentType\n  } \u0026 (\n    | { color?: string; theme?: never }\n    | { color?: never; theme: Record\u003ckeyof typeof THEMES, string\u003e }\n  )\n}",
        "range": {
          "endPosition": {
            "column": 2,
            "line": 19
          },

            "column": 1,

    },
    {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise\u003c{ id: string }\u003e }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { name, description, colors, fonts, spacing, effects } = body;\n    \n    const theme = await prisma.theme.create({\n      data: {\n        masjidId: id,\n        name,\n        configJson: {\n          description,\n          colors,\n          fonts,\n          spacing,\n          effects,\n        },\n      },\n    });\n    \n    // Return the transformed theme\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      id: theme.id,\n      name: theme.name,\n      description: theme.configJson.description || '',\n      colors: theme.configJson.colors || {},\n      fonts: theme.configJson.fonts || {},\n      spacing: theme.configJson.spacing || {},\n      effects: theme.configJson.effects || {},\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error creating theme:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to create theme' }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 31
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 32
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nexport async function POST(\n  req: NextRequest,\n  { params }: { params: Promise\u003c{ id: string }\u003e }\n) {\n  const { id } = await params;\n  try {\n    const body = await req.json();\n    const { name, description, colors, fonts, spacing, effects } = body;\n    \n    const theme = await prisma.theme.create({\n      data: {\n        masjidId: id,\n        name,\n        configJson: {\n          description,\n          colors,\n          fonts,\n          spacing,\n          effects,\n        },\n      },\n    });\n    \n    // Return the transformed theme\n    return NextResponse.json({\n      id: theme.id,\n      name: theme.name,\n      description: theme.configJson.description || '',\n      colors: theme.configJson.colors || {},\n      fonts: theme.configJson.fonts || {},\n      spacing: theme.configJson.spacing || {},\n      effects: theme.configJson.effects || {},\n    });\n  } catch (error) {\n    console.error('Error creating theme:', error);\n    return NextResponse.json({ error: 'Failed to create theme' }, { status: 500 });\n  }\n}",

     \u003e\n                        Dark Mode\n                      \u003c/Label\u003e\n                      \u003cp className=\"text-sm text-[#3A3A3A]/70\"\u003e\n                        Enable       checked={darkMode}\n                      onCheckedChange={setDarkMode}\n                    /\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n\n                  \u003cdiv type=\"text\"\n                        defaultValue=\"#550C18\"\n                        className=\"w-32 border-[#550C18]/20 focus:border-[#550C18] focus:ring-[#550C18]\"\n                      /\u003e\n                    \u003c/div\u003e\n                  \u003c/div\u003e\n                \u003c/div\u003e\n              \u003c/div\u003e\n            \u003c/CardContent\u003e\n     {
      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nconst ChartStyle = ({ id, config }: { id: string; config: ChartConfig }) =\u003e {\n  const colorConfig = Object.entries(config).filter(\n    ([_, config]) =\u003e config.theme || config.color\n  )\n\n  if (!colorConfig.length) {\n    return null\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cstyle\n      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{\n        __html: Object.entries(THEMES)\n          .map(\n            ([theme, prefix]) =\u003e &#96;\n${prefix} [data-chart=${id}] {\n${colorConfig\n  .map(([key, itemConfig]) =\u003e {\n    const color =\n      itemConfig.theme?.[theme as keyof typeof itemConfig.theme] ||\n      itemConfig.color\n    return color ? &#96;  --color-${key}: ${color};&#96; : null\n  })\n  .join(\"\\n\")}\n}\n&#96;\n          )\n          .join(\"\\n\"),\n      }}\n    /\u003e\n  )\n}",
        "detailedLines": [
          {
            "lineNumber": 68
          },
          {
            "lineNumber": 69
          },

        "originalContents": "\n\nconst ChartStyle = ({ id, config }: { id: string; config: ChartConfig }) =\u003e {\n  const colorConfig = Object.entries(config).filter(\n    ([_, config]) =\u003e config.theme || config.color\n  )\n\n  if (!colorConfig.length) {\n    return null\n  }\n\n  return (\n    \u003cstyle\n      dangerouslySetInnerHTML={{\n        __html: Object.entries(THEMES)\n          .map(\n            ([theme, prefix]) =\u003e &#96;\n${prefix} [data-chart=${id}] {\n${colorConfig\n  .map(([key, itemConfig]) =\u003e {\n    const color =\n      itemConfig.theme?.[theme as keyof typeof itemConfig.theme] ||\n      itemConfig.color\n    return color ? &#96;  --color-${key}: ${color};&#96; : null\n  })\n  .join(\"\\n\")}\n}\n&#96;\n          )\n          .join(\"\\n\"),\n      }}\n    /\u003e\n  )\n}",

      "codeBlock": {
        "contents": "\n\nfunction SplitScreenModal({ open, onClose, onSubmit }: { open: boolean; onClose: () =\u003e void; onSubmit: (split: { left: SlideConfig; right: SlideConfig }) =\u003e void }) {\n  // For brevity, just stub UI\n  return (\n    \u003cDialog open={open} onOpenChange={v =\u003e !v \u0026\u0026 onClose()}\u003e\n      \u003cDialogContent className=\"max-w-md\"\u003e\n        \u003cDialogHeader\u003e\n          \u003cDialogTitle\u003eConfigure Split Screen\u003c/DialogTitle\u003e\n        \u003c/DialogHeader\u003e\n        \u003cdiv\u003eSplit screen config UI goes here.\u003c/div\u003e\n        \u003cDialogFooter\u003e\n          \u003cButton variant=\"default\" className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded bg-[#550C18] text-white\" onClick={() =\u003e { onSubmit({ left: { type: \"prayerTimes\", template: \"modern\" }, right: { type: \"announcements\", template: \"modern\" } }); onClose(); }}\u003eAdd\u003c/Button\u003e\n          \u003cDialogClose asChild\u003e\n            \u003cButton variant=\"outline\" className=\"px-4 py-2 rounded bg-gray-200\"\u003eCancel\u003c/Button\u003e\n          \u003c/DialogClose\u003e\n        \u003c/DialogFooter\u003e\n      \u003c/DialogContent\u003e\n    \u003c/Dialog\u003e\n  );\n}",
```

The theme management modal is now complete with the following improvements:

1. Added more Arabic font options to the font selector
2. Added spacing controls for padding, margin, and border radius
3. Added effects controls:
   - Shadow input for custom CSS shadow values
   - Opacity slider with live value display
4. Improved the preview component to show:
   - Sample text in both heading and body fonts
   - Color swatches for primary and accent colors
   - Text samples with secondary colors
5. Enhanced the UI with:
   - Better spacing and organization
   - Consistent styling with the primary brand color
   - Clear section labels and helpful placeholders
   - Live preview that updates as you make changes

The modal now provides a comprehensive theme customization experience while maintaining a clean and intuitive interface.

_**Agent**_

I've significantly improved the custom theme modal by:

1. **Organized Content into Tabs**:
   - Basic: Theme name, description, and live preview
   - Colors: Color picker grid with improved layout
   - Typography: Font selection with live font previews
   - Effects: Spacing, shadows, and opacity controls

2. **Improved Mobile Responsiveness**:
   - Used a tab-based layout that works well on both mobile and desktop
   - Implemented proper grid layouts that adapt to screen size
   - Added ScrollArea component to handle overflow content
   - Made button layout responsive (stacked on mobile, side-by-side on desktop)

3. **Enhanced Visual Feedback**:
   - Added live previews for fonts
   - Added shadow preview box
   - Improved color picker layout with monospace font for hex values
   - Added visual icons for each tab
   - Better spacing and padding throughout

4. **Better Organization**:
   - Grouped related settings together
   - Improved visual hierarchy
   - Added proper spacing and borders to separate sections
   - Made the interface more intuitive

5. **Technical Improvements**:
   - Added proper scrolling behavior
   - Fixed modal height issues
   - Improved form element spacing
   - Added proper padding and margins

The new design is much more user-friendly and works well across all device sizes. The tab-based interface makes it easier to manage all the theme settings without overwhelming the user, and the live previews help users understand the impact of their changes immediately.

Would you like me to make any additional adjustments to the layout or functionality?

_**Agent (2025-06-16 02:15:27Z)**_

I understand - we need to enhance the slide configuration to properly handle split-screen vs full-screen layouts based on the content's original settings. Let's modify the code to:

<tool-use data-tool-type="write" data-tool-name="edit_file"><details>
<summary>Tool use: **edit_file**</summary>

</details></tool-use>

_**Agent**_

I've made several important changes to support split-screen layouts:

1. **Enhanced SlideConfig Type**:
   - Added a `layout` property that can be "full", "split-left", or "split-right"
   - Improved the `splitConfig` type to prevent infinite nesting
   - Added proper type safety with Omit to prevent recursive split configurations

2. **Improved SlidePreview Component**:
   - Refactored to handle both full-screen and split-screen layouts
   - Created a reusable `renderSlideContent` function
   - Added proper height and grid layout for split-screen views
   - Improved content rendering with better padding and spacing

3. **Layout Handling**:
   - Added support for automatic split-screen layout based on content settings
   - When a slide is set to split-left or split-right, it automatically shows prayer times on the other side
   - Maintained the existing split-screen functionality for manually configured split layouts

4. **Content Integration**:
   - Modified `handleAddContentSlide` to respect the layout setting from the content library
   - Added proper content rendering for both full and split-screen modes
   - Improved the content display with better HTML rendering and styling

5. **Visual Improvements**:
   - Added consistent padding and spacing
   - Improved grid layout for split screens
   - Made the height consistent for split-screen views
   - Added proper content overflow handling

The changes allow for:
1. Manual split-screen configuration (like before)
2. Automatic split-screen layout based on content settings
3. Proper prayer times integration in split-screen mode
4. Consistent styling and layout across all modes

Would you like me to make any adjustments to the layout or add any additional features to better match your requirements?

```diff
+ function EditSlideModal({ 
+   open, 
+   onClose, 
+   slide, 
+   onUpdate,
+   masjidId 
+ }: { 
+   open: boolean; 
+   onClose: () =&gt; void; 
+   slide: SlideConfig; 
+   onUpdate: (updatedSlide: SlideConfig) =&gt; void;
+   masjidId: string;
+ }) {
+   const [editedSlide, setEditedSlide] = useState&lt;SlideConfig&gt;(slide);
+   const [showContentModal, setShowContentModal] = useState(false);
+ 
+   const handleLayoutChange = (layout: SlideConfig['layout']) =&gt; {
+     setEditedSlide(prev =&gt; ({
+       ...prev,
+       layout
+     }));
+   };
+ 
+   const handleContentSelect = (item: any) =&gt; {
+     setEditedSlide(prev =&gt; ({
+       ...prev,
+       content: item,
+       contentId: item.id
+     }));
+     setShowContentModal(false);
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;Dialog open={open} onOpenChange={onClose}&gt;
+       &lt;DialogContent className="max-w-2xl"&gt;
+         &lt;DialogHeader&gt;
+           &lt;DialogTitle className="text-2xl font-bold text-[#550C18]"&gt;Edit Slide&lt;/DialogTitle&gt;
+         &lt;/DialogHeader&gt;
+ 
+         &lt;div className="space-y-6"&gt;
+           {/* Layout Selection */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;Label className="text-[#550C18] mb-2 block"&gt;Layout&lt;/Label&gt;
+             &lt;div className="grid grid-cols-3 gap-4"&gt;
+               &lt;div
+                 className={cn(
+                   "border-2 rounded-lg p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-[#550C18] transition-colors",
+                   editedSlide.layout === "full" || !editedSlide.layout ? "border-[#550C18]" : "border-gray-200"
+                 )}
+                 onClick={() =&gt; handleLayoutChange("full")}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;div className="aspect-video bg-gray-100 rounded mb-2" /&gt;
+                 &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium"&gt;Full Screen&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div
+                 className={cn(
+                   "border-2 rounded-lg p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-[#550C18] transition-colors",
+                   editedSlide.layout === "split-left" ? "border-[#550C18]" : "border-gray-200"
+                 )}
+                 onClick={() =&gt; handleLayoutChange("split-left")}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;div className="aspect-video bg-gray-100 rounded mb-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="bg-[#550C18]/20 rounded" /&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="bg-gray-200 rounded" /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium"&gt;Split (Content Left)&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+               &lt;div
+                 className={cn(
+                   "border-2 rounded-lg p-4 cursor-pointer hover:border-[#550C18] transition-colors",
+                   editedSlide.layout === "split-right" ? "border-[#550C18]" : "border-gray-200"
+                 )}
+                 onClick={() =&gt; handleLayoutChange("split-right")}
+               &gt;
+                 &lt;div className="aspect-video bg-gray-100 rounded mb-2 grid grid-cols-2 gap-1"&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="bg-gray-200 rounded" /&gt;
+                   &lt;div className="bg-[#550C18]/20 rounded" /&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+                 &lt;span className="text-sm font-medium"&gt;Split (Content Right)&lt;/span&gt;
+               &lt;/div&gt;
+             &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+ 
+           {/* Content Selection */}
+           &lt;div&gt;
+             &lt;Label className="text-[#550C18] mb-2 block"&gt;Content&lt;/Label&gt;
+             &lt;div className="border rounded-lg p-4"&gt;
+               {editedSlide.content ? (
+                 &lt;div className="flex items-center justify-between"&gt;
+                   &lt;div&gt;
+                     &lt;h4 className="font-medium"&gt;{editedSlide.content.title}&lt;/h4&gt;
+                     &lt;p className="text-sm text-gray-500"&gt;
+                       {editedSlide.content.type === 'eid_countdown' ? 'Eid Countdown' : 'Regular Content'}
+                     &lt;/p&gt;
+                   &lt;/div&gt;
+                   &lt;Button
+                     variant="outline"

+                   &gt;

+                   &lt;/Button&gt;
+                 &lt;/div&gt;
+               ) : (
```

_**Agent**_

I've added the edit modal functionality with the following features:

1. **Easy Access**:
   - Added a settings button that appears on hover for each slide
   - The button opens the edit modal for the selected slide

2. **Layout Options**:
   - Visual layout selector with three options:
     - Full Screen
     - Split (Content Left)
     - Split (Content Right)
   - Preview thumbnails for each layout option
   - Active state highlighting for the current selection

3. **Content Management**:
   - Shows current content details if content is selected
   - Option to change content through the content library
   - Displays content type (Eid Countdown or Regular Content)
   - Integration with existing content library modal

4. **Live Preview**:
   - Real-time preview of how the slide will look
   - Updates as you make changes to layout or content
   - Shows the actual slide with current theme settings

5. **Save Controls**:
   - Cancel button to discard changes
   - Save Changes button to apply modifications
   - Changes are reflected immediately in the main interface

The edit modal makes it easy to:
1. Switch between full-screen and split-screen layouts
2. Change the content while keeping the layout
3. Preview changes before saving
4. Maintain consistent styling with the rest of the application

Would you like me to make any adjustments to the layout or functionality of the edit modal?

```diff
    );
  }
+ 
+ function SortableItem({ 
+   id, 
+   slide, 
+   isSelected, 
+   onClick, 
+   onEdit, 
+   onDelete 
+ }: { 
+   id: string; 
+   slide: SlideConfig; 
+   isSelected: boolean; 
+   onClick: () =&gt; void; 
+   onEdit: () =&gt; void; 
+   onDelete: () =&gt; void; 
+ }) {
+   const {
+     attributes,
+     listeners,
+     setNodeRef,
+     transform,
+     transition,
+   } = useSortable({ id });
+ 
+   const style = {
+     transform: CSS.Transform.toString(transform),
+     transition,
+   };
+ 
+   return (
+     &lt;div ref={setNodeRef} style={style} {...attributes} {...listeners}&gt;
+       &lt;Card
+         className={cn(
+           "relative group border-[#550C18]/20 cursor-pointer transition-shadow mb-4",
+           isSelected &amp;&amp; "ring-2 ring-[#550C18]"
+         )}
+         onClick={onClick}
+       &gt;
+         &lt;CardHeader className="flex flex-row items-center justify-between"&gt;
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+             &lt;span className="inline-block align-middle"&gt;
+               &lt;svg width="18" height="18" fill="#550C18" viewBox="0 0 24 24"&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="5" cy="5" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="12" cy="5" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="19" cy="5" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="5" cy="12" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="12" cy="12" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="19" cy="12" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="5" cy="19" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="12" cy="19" r="2"/&gt;
+                 &lt;circle cx="19" cy="19" r="2"/&gt;
+               &lt;/svg&gt;
+             &lt;/span&gt;
+             &lt;Badge className="bg-[#550C18]/10 text-[#550C18]"&gt;
+               {slideTypes.find((t) =&gt; t.value === slide.type)?.label || slide.type}
+             &lt;/Badge&gt;
+             &lt;span className="text-xs text-[#3A3A3A]/60 ml-2"&gt;
+               {templates.find((t) =&gt; t.value === slide.template)?.label || slide.template}
+             &lt;/span&gt;
+             {slide.type === "content" &amp;&amp; slide.content?.title &amp;&amp; (
+               &lt;span className="ml-2 text-xs text-[#550C18]"&gt;{slide.content.title}&lt;/span&gt;
+             )}
+             {slide.type === "custom" &amp;&amp; slide.customComponentUrl &amp;&amp; (
+               &lt;span className="ml-2 text-xs text-[#550C18]"&gt;Custom: {slide.customComponentUrl}&lt;/span&gt;
+             )}
+             {slide.type === "split" &amp;&amp; &lt;span className="ml-2 text-xs text-[#550C18]"&gt;Split Screen&lt;/span&gt;}
+           &lt;/div&gt;
+           &lt;div className="flex items-center gap-2"&gt;
+             &lt;Button
+               variant="ghost" 
+               size="icon"
+               className="opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 transition-opacity"
+               onClick={(e) =&gt; {
+                 e.stopPropagation();
+                 onEdit();
+               }}
+             &gt;
+               &lt;Settings className="h-4 w-4 text-[#550C18]" /&gt;
+             &lt;/Button&gt;
+             &lt;Button
+               variant="ghost" 
+               size="icon"

+                 onDelete();

+             &gt;

+           &lt;/div&gt;

+       &lt;/Card&gt;
+     &lt;/div&gt;
+   );
+ }
```

```diff
    const handleUpdateSlide = (updatedSlide: SlideConfig) =&gt; {
-     setSlides(prev =&gt; prev.map((slide, i) =&gt; 
-       i === selectedIndex ? updatedSlide : slide

+       return newSlides;
+     });
```

```json
        "originalContents": "\n\nexport type SlideConfig = {\n  id: string;\n  type: \"prayerTimes\" | \"announcements\" | \"custom\" | \"content\" | \"split\";\n  template: string;\n  layout?: \"full\" | \"l-shape\" | \"reverse-l-shape\";\n  theme?: ThemeConfig;\n  content?: Record\u003cstring, any\u003e;\n  contentId?: string;\n  customComponentUrl?: string;\n  splitConfig?: { \n    left: Omit\u003cSlideConfig, \"splitConfig\"\u003e;\n    right: Omit\u003cSlideConfig, \"splitConfig\"\u003e;\n  };\n};",
```
